**To: Tucker Carlson
From: A Happy Democrat
Date: April 25th, 2023**

Dear Tucker Carlson,

_ABOUT TIME!_

We cannot begin to tell you the immense relief we felt when we saw that you had _finally_ been fired from Fox News!

Not only did you routinely lie to this country, Tucker — you abused your platform to spread misinformation, promote division, and hurt our Democracy. Your departure marks a new day in America.

**You hurt Americans in every corner of this country and we will _all_ be better without your sham news segment.**

[I’m signing this letter alongside thousands of happy Democrats who are _thrilled_ you will no longer be on air anymore — and I’m chipping in $5 to wish you good luck on your job-search while we save the Senate, flip the House, and re-elect President Biden!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62309768/403049004/990024201?amount=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&refcode=UTS_20230425_EMLTR_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5NDc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjYyYTkwOTQ2LWM1ZTMtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=LOOIIYrhETKJcXZhmYTUaJ3A6cXyDddTRRhsWHEwOoo=) | [Chip in $5 to sign on! »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62309769/403049005/990024201?amount=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&refcode=UTS_20230425_EMLTR_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5NDc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjYyYTkwOTQ2LWM1ZTMtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=LOOIIYrhETKJcXZhmYTUaJ3A6cXyDddTRRhsWHEwOoo=)

So, **GOODBYE** and **GOOD RIDDANCE!**

Sincerely,
An ecstatic Democrat

name: Dr. Kim Schrier
subject: Building a resilient campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
Republicans spent millions to beat me last year. Now, they're already preparing for 2024. [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62309778/403049126/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2Y2E5MDk0Ni1jNWUzLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oZ2zh9P9L2Q8F851mgUOrOMvU_xTp3iaa8_Jd3ybkQ4=&emci=4b26eb8a-a2e3-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=6ca90946-c5e3-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=15820338)
---
Peter,

When I first ran for Congress, no Democrat had ever represented Washington’s 8th District before. But thanks to the incredible support of this grassroots team, we beat the odds and flipped WA-08 blue for the first time in 2018.

Since then, Republicans have never stopped trying to take this seat back. Last year, National Republican groups spent over $8 million dollars on ads attacking me.

And now, just months into this year, the National Republican Congressional Committee's (NRCC) campaign has already named me a top target for 2024.

Thanks to grassroots supporters chipping in what they can, when they can, we’ve been able to fight back against the attack ads before. But I need your help to do it again.

**To build another resilient campaign capable of responding to millions of dollars of attacks, it’s crucial we meet every goal we set. That’s why I’m asking:**

**[Before our end-of-month fundraising deadline on Sunday, can you chip in $5, or whatever you can to help protect this seat and retake the House majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62309779/403049127/-476631296?refcode=em23_230425_EOM 1_fnd_gq_act___KS_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230425_EOM 1_fnd_gq_act___KS_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=6ca90946-c5e3-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2Y2E5MDk0Ni1jNWUzLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oZ2zh9P9L2Q8F851mgUOrOMvU_xTp3iaa8_Jd3ybkQ4=)**

clean_body: Republicans spent millions to beat me last year. Now, they're already preparing for 2024. Peter, When I first ran for Congress, no Democrat had ever represented Washington’s 8th District before. But thanks to the incredible support of this grassroots team, we beat the odds and flipped WA-08 blue for the first time in 2018. Since then, Republicans have never stopped trying to take this seat back. Last year, National Republican groups spent over $8 million dollars on ads attacking me. And now, just months into this year, the National Republican Congressional Committee's (NRCC) campaign has already named me a top target for 2024. Thanks to grassroots supporters chipping in what they can, when they can, we’ve been able to fight back against the attack ads before. But I need your help to do it again. Peter,

In a minute I’m going to ask you to chip in to help protect and expand our Senate Democratic majority – but first, let me explain how President Biden announcing his reelection today makes a Democratic Senate so important.

Over the past three years, our Democratic Senate has worked with President Biden to make real, lasting change for American families. Together, we got families and communities the resources they needed to get through and build back from the pandemic and with the _Inflation Reduction Act_ , we lowered the cost of prescription drugs, took historic action on climate, and so much more.
There's no doubt in my mind that families in Washington state, and across the country, are better off today than they were when President Biden first took office. I'm proud to work with him to make sure our economy works for working families, build a stronger democracy, and work toward a more equitable country – **but there is still so much left to do.**

**Reelecting Joe Biden is our best chance at building on this progress, but that progress won’t be possible if we don’t have a Democratic Senate majority.**
**[Will you pitch in $5 right now to help make sure we protect and expand our Democratic Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62310258/403052482/-908392379?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk14-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YjY4YmZmNi1jNWUzLWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q_f1UzW271f_J-QWzkAbwwB3MR17uUnhWuYcJqYKBHo=)**
There is so much that I’m focused on getting done in the Senate – from fixing our child care crisis and restoring Roe v. Wade and a woman’s ability to make her own decisions about her body and future, to making sure we keep up the momentum on climate action. All of that is possible if we reelect President Biden _and_ protect and expand our Senate majority.
With President Biden paving the way, I know we can forge a path to a better future – together. But it’s going to take all of us doing our part in this fight.
Thank you,

Patty Murray
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/q9iNeaDCVUi-n6xIKf7j9g2?unsubscribedata=oTn9cTxbJbNJQjqqqQiBd2Rn%2Bxm%2B4xw7blcIvAOckY04fnXkALOpU0DBTn3l1mAem3zPJFpn9WzdDJnDfsSzJaNM6Xjd0KVnVPFxthtL8LPfGMxGHuF3H4q3Ydr5gvRuBWzYCtLbZHRhd7izdI7r3heuVRvaHEJ5ernlag1bShDcQSC658o2fEl5nwTVSbjECFHHGGv9vtK%2Bi5a71WVsC5lHC4QAGQ%2F%2B3W7RkFqJiUZqhBOOqXD6VI6lk1RKs6TGx4uzTH6P3WUt%2BYM%2BigoXTk761wzIGMuZ4cAtjpeeKUCWoYiOMnr13NiZH00Yg1I14icjPSFByw7yWt4yhgWzksYDYHWOrU%2FqTYDibDxlSCAZJz%2FR9vllJa5TFczleGNUa5U4mjmVqzKzLa1lB7vJoR4Cv2KunuvpbDbYXyCwpxJSF9vms9eh6SFQDey4LRsT) People for Patty Murray

Joe Biden and I are officially running for reelection in 2024. | | |
---
| | **It’s time. As vice president, I have the privilege and honor to travel across our nation to meet Americans from all walks of life working to make a difference.
No matter where I am, I meet so many folks who are optimistic about what is possible when we work together. People who agree that we have so much more in common than what separates us.
As Americans, we believe in freedom, liberty and justice. And we believe that our democracy is only as strong as our willingness to fight for it.
**It’s going to take all of us to build on the progress we’ve made and keep moving our country forward. So, I have to ask:**
[_**Will you stand with Joe, me, and Democratic leaders nationwide by splitting a $10 donation between the Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee's Grassroots Victory PAC and our reelection campaign today?**_](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zT6rzL4wqqptaDR_QzGYNv35tR94DkRP2KOedZCnFXopQR5014Rm4-GFbrCS7BMShwkWb148LwSVLERxQmpOczEGR3BWORDK2eLMbeAlhYjAXrSjTHxprjjh4EX9cZ1Awtrbc6Jn9gDyRbqMkdBKLGAuc57x8x3YkoapE9tmC5-oxp61HjJpG0XYTKp4ckGLzXqm5uBWHFzobjzchyN1RVqJzrITM_jR0hSBIJVrLC87EbzEPx0TaQhnKEIxCeebzMS-2u7fWBgKxdBygVgkllvsL0y6xb0y82BcFgiQtZ2HhD1vs1yrTIoS5brMJtrgJsq3jTEQHr31aD2Lz4Y_VU7HQ3BhFZsp2czj06TRtH9o-9r4fLpQ4bEtZ_4ojmV20JCew1A-H0WjrBm2L7oXcBgbePCgkMAennCsTW4e66l4QmYmIvxW6guG67of7OQ_9GeQC6LGQ4mc1lhbEvBh1UyZ5wSKibi0SU7zWj5VZFkTIKPukTq4o1DtERrNpUXs-8LIWRnJiActl2Z_z7mdzOr00g2sDCxpotOIFRw2XDCQ/3vo/v-8PUcYLQhOw2Nc0I7EN7A/h6/LnLZDxcDEe5T6BE58NOlqIj4CD77XBofgVLlPioSJlw)
Thank you for all that you do for our country.
-Kamala

_DLCC is asking for only $5,000 from federally permissible sources, such as individuals. DLCC is not asking for funds in excess of federal limits or from federally prohibited sources, such as corporations, labor unions, federal contractors, and foreign nationals._

clean_body: Joe Biden and I are officially running for reelection in 2024. | | | | | It’s time. Joe Biden and I are officially running for reelection in 2024. I’m so excited to get back on the campaign trail to make our case to the American people and I know that President Biden is too. Over the past two years we have accomplished so much together with the support of Democrats nationwide. As we kick this campaign into high gear, we need your support to win races from the bottom of the ticket to the top. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately and be split between the Biden-Harris reelection campaign and DLCC's Grassroots Victory PAC. | | | | | As vice president, I have the privilege and honor to travel across our nation to meet Americans from all walks of life working to make a difference. No matter where I am, I meet so many folks who are optimistic about what is possible when we work together. People who agree that we have so much more in common than what separates us. As Americans, we believe in freedom, liberty and justice. And we believe that our democracy is only as strong as our willingness to fight for it. It’s going to take all of us to build on the progress we’ve made and keep moving our country forward. So, I have to ask: Thank you for all that you do for our country. -Kamala DLCC is asking for only $5,000 from federally permissible sources, such as individuals. DLCC is not asking for funds in excess of federal limits or from federally prohibited sources, such as corporations, labor unions, federal contractors, and foreign nationals. | Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005 Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions or gifts to the DLCC are not tax deductible. | The Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee and Grassroots Victory PAC are dedicated to winning and defending Democratic majorities in state legislatures across the country. I have exciting news to share with you: **thanks to this team stepping up when I needed you most, we were able to report record-breaking fundraising in the first quarter of 2023.**

It is the honor of a lifetime to serve my home district in Congress, especially as the first Democratic woman to ever represent West Michigan! **After flipping a 50-year Republican stronghold BLUE in 2022, our historic fundraising even in the off-year is proof that MI-03 is staying blue. But we have to keep going – early and sustained organizing is critical to success.**

We are organized and ready to hold this seat and take back the House majority. Our next step – and this is _really_ important – is to keep up this momentum all the way through Election Day. It is the honor of a lifetime to serve my home district in Congress, especially as the first Democratic woman to ever represent West Michigan! After flipping a 50-year Republican stronghold BLUE in 2022, our historic fundraising even in the off-year is proof that MI-03 is staying blue. But we have to keep going – early and sustained organizing is critical to success. We are organized and ready to hold this seat and take back the House majority. **Meet Sheriff Lamb:** | GOD. FAMILY. FREEDOM.

Sheriff Mark Lamb is a husband, father, grandfather, and God-fearing patriot. From Hawaii to Manila, Arizona, Mark Lamb's rich experirences inspired his life of service. As the 24th Sheriff of Pinal County, Arizona, he drives a powerful agenda to ensure community safety and prosperity.

Sheriff Lamb trained with the Maricopa County Sheriff's Office Deputy Academy and was named Valedictorian of his class. He was hired by the Salt River Pima-Maricopa Indian Community, where he excelled as a police officer and was named Rookie of the Year. The following year, he received the Officer of the Year award. Having just launched my Senate race earlier this month, I’m counting on conservatives like you to help fill me in on where you stand pertaining to the border crisis. Please complete your . We’re going to stop accepting responses at 12:00 a.m. on the dot. Thank you, Sheriff Mark Lamb Republican for U.S. Senate Follow Sheriff Lamb On Social Media Meet Sheriff Lamb: | GOD. FAMILY. FREEDOM. Sheriff Mark Lamb is a husband, father, grandfather, and God-fearing patriot. From Hawaii to Manila, Arizona, Mark Lamb's rich experirences inspired his life of service. As the 24th Sheriff of Pinal County, Arizona, he drives a powerful agenda to ensure community safety and prosperity. Sheriff Lamb trained with the Maricopa County Sheriff's Office Deputy Academy and was named Valedictorian of his class. He was hired by the Salt River Pima-Maricopa Indian Community, where he excelled as a police officer and was named Rookie of the Year. The following year, he received the Officer of the Year award. He was later promoted as a Detective to the Gang Enforcement Unit and in his first year was named Detective of the Year. | Paid for by Mark Lamb for Senate

name: Joe Biden
subject: I truly believe our best days still lie ahead
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
If I’m going to win this thing, I’ll need you by my side from the very beginning.
#
**Derek, did you hear? I’m officially running for reelection.**
When I ran in 2020, I set out to do three things: Restore the soul of our nation, rebuild the backbone of America — the middle class — and create a government to work _for_ us, rather than _against_ us.
Together, we took our economy back from the brink. We took aggressive action to bring costs down for working people — all while making the wealthy and corporations pay their fair share. We passed the first federal gun violence prevention legislation in 30 years. We took the strongest action on climate in the world — I’m not kidding.
**We’ve got a lot of work to do and a lot of progress we’ve got to make in the second term.****_But we’ve got to finish the job_****. And I can only do that with you behind me.**
**[So, will you chip in a few bucks — or even $5 — split between Fetterman for PA and my reelection campaign? It’d mean the world to me to have you with me in this fight.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230425-1?refcode=em20230425-8347&refcode2=8347_434096__vMQZU&akid=8347%2E434096%2E_vMQZU)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230425-1?amount=5&refcode=em20230425-8347&refcode2=8347_434096__vMQZU&akid=8347%2E434096%2E_vMQZU)**
Grassroots supporters just like you helped elect Kamala, me, and Democrats up and down the ballot nationwide. And I’m so proud of the incredible progress we’ve made together, Derek.
But every generation has a moment where they have had to stand up for democracy. To stand up for their fundamental freedoms. _I believe this is ours._
**[So, will you stand with me and John by splitting a $5 donation between Fetterman for PA and my reelection campaign today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230425-1?refcode=em20230425-8347&refcode2=8347_434096__vMQZU&akid=8347%2E434096%2E_vMQZU)**
From the bottom of my heart, thank you.
—Joe
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230425-1?amount=5&refcode=em20230425-8347&refcode2=8347_434096__vMQZU&akid=8347%2E434096%2E_vMQZU)

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20230425-8347-footer&t=1&refcode2=8347_434096__vMQZU&akid=8347%2E434096%2E_vMQZU)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=2&akid=8347%2E434096%2E_vMQZU)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=8347%2E434096%2E_vMQZU)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

** KLAYMAN: HANNITY IS LYING: HE KNOWS WHY CARLSON WAS FIRED & HE IS LIKELY NEXT!
------------------------------------------------------------

Epoch Times

Sean Hannity Responds to Tucker Carlson Leaving Fox News: ‘I Don’t Own the Company’

Fox News host Sean Hannity said he’s not sure why former fellow host Tucker Carlson departed the network and appeared to suggest that he didn’t believe it was a good idea.

For years, Hannity’s 9 p.m. ET show would follow Carlson’s timeslot. Carlson was among the highest-rated cable news personalities before Fox News announced his departure in a news release on Monday.

“It’s very hard,” Hannity said during his “The Sean Hannity Show” radio program. “My phone has been blowing up all day. The hard part for me is I don’t have a clue ... I have no idea. Was it Tucker’s decision? Was it Fox’s? Was it a mutual agreement that they had? I don’t know.”

name: Helen Gym
subject: Less traffic. Lower emissions. Better public transit.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Helen Gym
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-april23-em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-april23-em]
When a parent takes the Broad Street line to drop a child off at daycare, a delivery worker carries groceries on their bicycle, a senior takes daily walks with a friend, or a wheelchair user rides the bus to work each morning, they deserve to feel confident, safe, and supported.

I’ve spent years fighting to make traveling our city safer and easier. As a Councilmember, I passed laws that saved workers money with pre-tax commuter benefits and required safer sidewalks around construction sites. And I led the efforts to make public transit more equitable by ending transfer fees and youth fares.

As Mayor, I’ll build on that track record by growing SEPTA ridership, reducing traffic fatalities, and ensuring everyone can easily, affordably, and confidently travel across the city. Here are the highlights of my plan:

*
Addressing
the
congestion
clogging
streets
and
polluting
our
air
through
a
mix
of
new
policies
and
enforcing
existing
ones
—
such
as
non-police
Public
Safety
Officers,
expanding
and
enforcing
dedicated
bus
lanes,
and
promoting
vehicle
electricization.

*
Increasing
public
transit
use
by
making
SEPTA
clean,
safe,
reliable,
and
service-oriented.
I
will
support
daily
cleaning
and
make
safety
on
buses,
subways,
and
in
stations
a
top
priority
—
increasing
coordination
between
SEPTA
and
City
police
and
ensuring
a
special
focus
on
the
times
children
are
commuting
to
and
from
school.

*
Making
sure
streets
and
sidewalks
are
accessible
and
safe
by
increasing
city
paving
capacity,
expanding
our
network
of
protected
bike
lanes,
and
creating
a
Sidewalk
Safety
Program
to
ensure
clear,
well-maintained
walkways.

*
Splitting
the
Transportation
and
Sanitation
Department
into
two
separate
departments
to
improve
services
and
ensure
a
clear
mission,
leadership,
and
accountability.

*
Ending
the
courtesy
tow
madness
and
ensuring
the
location
of
every
vehicle
subject
to
“courtesy
towing”
is
centrally
tracked.

My transportation agenda will unlock opportunities for employment, education, and economic development, and it will make Philadelphia a greener, cleaner city for the future.

But first, we need to win the primary election on May 16th, and with a historically deep field of candidates — including self-funding multimillionaires — that will take all of us stepping up.

If you’d like safer streets, cleaner air, and more accessible public transit for all Philadelphians, please make a donation of any amount to power my campaign to victory. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-april23-em]

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your contribution will go through immediately:

CHIP IN $5 NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-april23-em?express_lane=true&amount=5]

— Helen
Helen Gym is a Philly mom, a school teacher, a community organizer, and former City Councilmember. She has been fighting for Philly families and communities for decades — winning more resources for our schools, safer communities, and a more affordable Philadelphia. Our efforts are supported by everyday people like you who give what they can, whenever they can, because they want to see a safer, more prosperous, equitable Philadelphia that works for all of us. If you’d like to donate to Helen and help elect her as Philadelphia’s next Mayor, click here:
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-em-feb2023]

I’ve spent years fighting to make traveling our city safer and easier. And I led the efforts to make public transit more equitable by ending transfer fees and youth fares. My transportation agenda will unlock opportunities for employment, education, and economic development, and it will make Philadelphia a greener, cleaner city for the future. But first, we need to win the primary election on May 16th, and with a historically deep field of candidates — including self-funding multimillionaires — that will take all of us stepping up. name: Joe Biden
subject: We’ll win this together
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
I wanted to be sure to reach out after my announcement. | | |
---
It has been less than 24 hours since Kamala and I announced that we’re running for reelection. I’m so grateful for the outpouring of support we’ve received from folks in Pennsylvania and in every corner of the country. _I really mean it._ **We have a long road ahead of us to Election Day. Kamala and I are depending on this team to stand with us today and on November 5, 2024.** **[If you haven’t gotten a chance to pitch in to support our campaign yet, I'd really appreciate it if you’d contribute $25 today.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zwt2ZjhvUXOZbVTv3WSve4fJ1wNKC6-M6pLg2F212UKyzSeiPDuGIYCaHVwO9vvqUkw5nkjqMGDp8JUQ1PfPmDb-dGdeXQbw1c1YTlW384JmDKI5Wn-NPtUZJmRlC-wWMcnFQPZovtCZaQ0PgYJyfQYQcrmpd0USqJr9cTVijUNDRLhlhp-99iCDO0fdKt-zIDWbypR_6NV90hIG1wRacBf-PBilSGlkRu1tJV0MqoHwSoqyzKh3SBgFhWhto_GJneJ7ahGpxJxiWceWAtpdhJMinw5f9N_buYubU1GtyAGAp_suHsL0Jm9SGptEfkOGNDXfTdVlFI-0mWvmPw7p_jxJdKoFy2-kJaBV132CJc9JHoixbuC1MgytuMdnXY9bkd_DHxA0-P3E9kzw98apm7nIahsWZPT-XVw3pZH864l7vGJdACacIxipZvcyrVkicqtZinHeDD-diCPqZRjZvrTSzwzJPCshF8KMu6MB6LQAZMsomkUs-T3AfKKyAff3Y/3vo/mFlXJjfkQZis2FkzVxXX9Q/h0/HjfSy5t8q91K5nvb6PkmQVQHrwHhslWJNaKfB391gck) ** We’ll win this thing together, -Joe
\-----Forwarded message-----
Sender: **Joe Biden**
Date: Tues, April 25, 2023
Subject: I'm officially running for reelection Every generation has a moment where they have had to stand up for democracy. To stand up for their fundamental freedoms. _I believe this is ours._ **That is why I am running for reelection as president of the United States.[If you’re with me, I hope you’ll let me explain exactly why this campaign matters so much and then consider pitching in to support it. ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zwt2ZjhvUXOZbVTv3WSve4fJ1wNKC6-M6pLg2F212UKyzSeiPDuGIYCaHVwO9vvqUkw5nkjqMGDp8JUQ1PfPmDb-dGdeXQbw1c1YTlW384JhqIW-sPZx5Cp_X0PW5Dt_c_7Zw0AJZ_PBBPEAkmZvMahXcYXV56dHSYC4gaR57mSP94q9sKWalmeqd0dJMNe2kIoF8-bytg4lj6cFP2kSOKDBgSW2q8DmJFTJj8T5s2_w2JGpoaS-iiwKTI_6_EM2GHwsLqjFrOrTqcu3Ame34I78ZxGdYxEOlM-lzKYXu2vH40y_W6kF0Ep_0GZra0zD7B9zKnTl4HE4eN011ZgySpmzZXVsQ5msvrlv0Pb8i2s7LfK7FSYejl7-hPOl5ck9C_9MqXSTneXt6lUHZfWobVTDwKWaEXPvznToTKw7crZHJt_9N8U6NqW5HDSKz19BnNqtG6a_wTNXqo9nooCSgo0Re8p-hC4BsF56MdRH8oRw1YBtNSInqiaDzGU2cs0e0/3vo/mFlXJjfkQZis2FkzVxXX9Q/h1/0KpTtFZL_HGXWVLojaeUUc7Hc6vtvKCcGzH6f1FEa6I)** When I ran in 2020, I said we were in a battle for the soul of America. _We still are._ The question before us now is whether we’ll have more freedoms or fewer in the years ahead. More rights, or fewer. I know what I want the answer to be. **Giving folks a little more breathing room. Making your life a little freer._This has been the work of my lifetime. And we’ve made real progress these last few years._** But, across the country, MAGA extremists are lining up to take us backward. They’re trying to gut Social Security and Medicare. They’re trying to raise prices on prescription drugs and repeal the cost-saving measures we’ve put in place for the hardworking families, all while saying we have enough money to cut taxes for the rich. They’re telling women what health care choices they’re allowed to make. They’re telling you what books should be in your kids' schools. And if you don’t like it, tough luck: They’re going after your right to vote, too. **[But we can stop them. There is nothing beyond our capacity if we do it together. So, I am asking: Will you chip in $25 today to get our campaign off to a strong start?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zwt2ZjhvUXOZbVTv3WSve4fJ1wNKC6-M6pLg2F212UKyzSeiPDuGIYCaHVwO9vvqUkw5nkjqMGDp8JUQ1PfPmDb-dGdeXQbw1c1YTlW384JvaWyxrcHNga-DykaCiFGhtmaUfjFdPA0ekmKA4bpBGKc5GsiRkbLpAjmpL47CR4iBOUOx--ENcU9PEI3Tnav5T06y-LEveKWrL_YBFN2Cynin51vBzqMkZD0KksJ4bmP6Cs0meC9mudl2XF7iarrVveAEc96q0hNrVAvTjI-lH6GbKLsTjWRoPyT3vGXseZMLd7nFvC1ZcdAbLK1dq7uLxtrr1Eg-zwgdWz1DV6nSem4DT1kDOfQ2pkmWXHkyBnG26kKauv9usPwYoNNPU0pclR3Hrs6CoRbmywHkFzYRWAPdsL4IAZub3NQIPUwqKEwNJWBiYOfY57QuyjzIfxrZJo2PecLTzW-gTSh7IYmwSAv6DJaX7u3FvDhyq-RUvEboCc-HEMaIcudoW8LUc2tgk/3vo/mFlXJjfkQZis2FkzVxXX9Q/h2/X2OLKxvwBrQjLvP3hQyoH7BCHgqyIn4Nv6Wi3id0c2E)**

There’s a choice ahead of us. Do we continue to build a future full of opportunities for you and families like yours? Or will we turn the clock back? But here’s the honest truth: I’m more optimistic than I’ve ever been. And it’s because I’ve seen what this team can do when it comes together.
**In 2020, more than 6 million grassroots supporters just like you helped propel our campaign to victory.**
I’m so proud of the progress we made. We took our economy back from the brink, helping create more than 12 million jobs. We took aggressive action to bring costs down for working people -- all while making corporations pay their fair share. We took the strongest action on climate in our nation’s history -- I’m not kidding.
But there’s still so much left to be done. Where we passed the first major federal legislation on gun violence in decades, we now need to finish the job and ban assault weapons. Where we capped insulin at $35 for Medicare recipients, we need to cap it for everyone. And where we finally made the wealthiest corporations pay their fair share, we need to do the same for billionaires.
**We’ve got a lot of work to do and a lot of progress we’ve got to make in the second term._W_ _e’ve got to finish the job._ And I can only do that with you behind me. **
**[It’d mean the world to me to have you with me in this fight. If you’re in, will you pitch in $25 or even just a few bucks in support of my campaign today?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zwt2ZjhvUXOZbVTv3WSve4fJ1wNKC6-M6pLg2F212UKyzSeiPDuGIYCaHVwO9vvqUkw5nkjqMGDp8JUQ1PfPmDb-dGdeXQbw1c1YTlW384JjYbpyMFeSxaZ7w03I9NUbiFg2L071I7DCaiqXCwoY8UXKwgj2U-nWkqjqR7sKvH_9a_mSH6d6OVsiPDNB92xrSlKEgyTJofGhK94E7hom3C0OVkYtgwKedJe7rKT3ZUmrY8nAyNmJuCvXJ_eu1DAKOGiZCPPERkzL5UoZ2eKWLXUYpwlQc4ztcN2eW7LHMGaxC1FBy5F4IqtCCDoOyAifaLdKINRtwGIGC4thrLhcDnZ05WUDlButOGF9ATp5OixZcEgwSrXuwHVYYzX2nWQeq1z9gg7K7ttmTDl_ILzrYnj5pbmsZfP7rjvflJ8JTvSIBGflmggZ3oOSxGpgQZnaZkBMQXNCHa44SBxnBVVkdjOCvoht-DnOf1jGiO7fV5q2y2RvafIlGdvFB7rP1WUBk/3vo/mFlXJjfkQZis2FkzVxXX9Q/h9/SvkXgUf01JALpc8PdFt-A52vX7fOIB56foMRwH-vNx0)**

clean_body: I wanted to be sure to reach out after my announcement. | | | It has been less than 24 hours since Kamala and I announced that we’re running for reelection. I’m so grateful for the outpouring of support we’ve received from folks in Pennsylvania and in every corner of the country. I really mean it. We have a long road ahead of us to Election Day. Kamala and I are depending on this team to stand with us today and on November 5, 2024. We’ll win this thing together, -Joe \-----Forwarded message----- Sender: Joe Biden Date: Tues, April 25, 2023 Subject: I'm officially running for reelection Every generation has a moment where they have had to stand up for democracy. To stand up for their fundamental freedoms. I believe this is ours. That is why I am running for reelection as president of the United States. When I ran in 2020, I said we were in a battle for the soul of America. We still are. The question before us now is whether we’ll have more freedoms or fewer in the years ahead. More rights, or fewer. I know what I want the answer to be. Giving folks a little more breathing room. Making your life a little freer.This has been the work of my lifetime. And we’ve made real progress these last few years. But, across the country, MAGA extremists are lining up to take us backward. They’re trying to gut Social Security and Medicare. They’re trying to raise prices on prescription drugs and repeal the cost-saving measures we’ve put in place for the hardworking families, all while saying we have enough money to cut taxes for the rich. They’re telling women what health care choices they’re allowed to make. They’re telling you what books should be in your kids' schools. And if you don’t like it, tough luck: They’re going after your right to vote, too. | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | There’s a choice ahead of us. We took the strongest action on climate in our nation’s history -- I’m not kidding. But there’s still so much left to be done. Where we passed the first major federal legislation on gun violence in decades, we now need to finish the job and ban assault weapons. Where we capped insulin at $35 for Medicare recipients, we need to cap it for everyone. And where we finally made the wealthiest corporations pay their fair share, we need to do the same for billionaires. We’ve got a lot of work to do and a lot of progress we’ve got to make in the second term.W e’ve got to finish the job. And I can only do that with you behind me. Thank you for standing with us. name: Alan Keck
subject: Are you tired?
body:
Tired of the same ol’ politics?
[](https://keckforkentucky.cmail19.com/t/y-l-pyhkljl-dytiuyidkd-r/) _Ever since we continued our debate-winning streak with the Kentucky Sports Radio debate a few days ago, my team and I have been inundated with**hundreds** of messages from Kentuckians who are tired of the same ol' politics, **telling me that they 're getting behind us, our message and our Keck Game Plan! **__Piggy backing off such an outpouring of support,_ [__**I 'm launching my first television ad**__](https://keckforkentucky.cmail19.com/t/y-l-pyhkljl-dytiuyidkd-j/) _**to make sure every Kentuckian in the Commonwealth knows I 'm the candidate-not demonizing others, but-providing real solutions to some of Kentucky's biggest challenges.**_ _I 've done just that, having laid out my entire campaign platform on day one when I filed._ [__**If you have some spare time, give my first television ad a watch yourself and let me know what you think!**__](https://keckforkentucky.cmail19.com/t/y-l-pyhkljl-dytiuyidkd-t/) [](https://keckforkentucky.cmail19.com/t/y-l-pyhkljl-dytiuyidkd-i/) [📺 WATCH MY FIRST TELEVISION AD](https://keckforkentucky.cmail19.com/t/y-l-pyhkljl-dytiuyidkd-d/) Kentuckians deserve a race about the issues, but as of late, they're getting teddy bears and insults. Instead of demonizing each other, _we should be having real conversations about the issues and about how we are going to move Kentucky forward together._ It has become abundantly clear to me by the feedback I've received from hundreds of voters across Kentucky that they agree! [__**If you do too, then there isn 't a better moment to stand with our campaign for commonsense in the Commonwealth.**__](https://keckforkentucky.cmail19.com/t/y-l-pyhkljl-dytiuyidkd-h/) _**Just days ago, I set the FINAL small-dollar fundraising goal for my primary campaign -[_and we 're just $4,490 away from blowing past it!_](https://keckforkentucky.cmail19.com/t/y-l-pyhkljl-dytiuyidkd-k/)**__This goal is set specifically to keep my newest ad on the airwaves, and if you 're willing and able, [_**I hope I can count on your donation of time, talent or treasure to help me keep it there!**_](https://keckforkentucky.cmail19.com/t/y-l-pyhkljl-dytiuyidkd-u/)_ [RUSH $25 | <1% OF REMAINING GOAL 🌡️](https://keckforkentucky.cmail19.com/t/y-l-pyhkljl-dytiuyidkd-o/) [RUSH $50 | 1.1% OF REMAINING GOAL 🌡️](https://keckforkentucky.cmail19.com/t/y-l-pyhkljl-dytiuyidkd-b/) [RUSH $100 | 2.2% OF REMAINING GOAL 🌡️](https://keckforkentucky.cmail19.com/t/y-l-pyhkljl-dytiuyidkd-n/) [RUSH $500 | 11.1% OF REMAINING GOAL 🌡️](https://keckforkentucky.cmail19.com/t/y-l-pyhkljl-dytiuyidkd-p/) _If you 're tired of the same ol' politics, then I'm your candidate. [_**Together, let 's do something only the Keck Game Plan can accomplish--make Kentucky win again.**_](https://keckforkentucky.cmail19.com/t/y-l-pyhkljl-dytiuyidkd-x/)_God Bless. [](https://keckforkentucky.cmail19.com/t/y-l-pyhkljl-dytiuyidkd-m/) [](https://keckforkentucky.cmail19.com/t/y-l-pyhkljl-dytiuyidkd-c/) Alan Keck ### | [Unsubscribe](https://keckforkentucky.cmail19.com/t/y-u-pyhkljl-dytiuyidkd-q/)

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: Things got heated with Don Lemon
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
Don Lemon was WRONG on this.

| [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c18988%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Cv9RD3zaCjdXox%2fUbByumQ&sysid=1)
Fellow American,

Things got a little heated on CNN.

While debating post Civil War history, Don Lemon preposterously claimed that "black people still aren't allowed to enjoy their freedoms."

**That's an insult to the progress we've made over the last 160 years.** His comments embody what's wrong with the dialogue about race in America. I told him so without apology.

My exchange with Don Lemon and CNN that has sparked controversy and anger from some in the mainstream media.

[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c18988%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Cv9RD3zaCjdXox%2fUbByumQ&sysid=1)
I spoke passionately about the importance of the Second Amendment and the need for civil discourse in our country. I stand by my words, but of course, some in the media have chosen to twist them and attack me.

**I refuse to back down, Fellow American.** I believe that we need to have honest, open discussions about the issues that matter most to Americans. That's why I am running for office. That's why I am working every day to make sure I have a prime spot on the debate stage in August.

In order to continue my campaign and fight for the values and principles that set this country into motion, I need your support. I can't do it alone. **[Any amount will bring us closer to our unique donor goal. I need your help to continue spreading my message of freedom and progress.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c18989%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=DHiXVmUmCFk%2fbKvvWTBTRg&sysid=1)**

**[Please consider making a small donation to my campaign today. Your contribution will help me continue my fight to revive the values that this nation was founded on: free speech. The rule of law. Excellence over grievance.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c18980%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=uDiiAgA%2fw3XFTRmNMIWfrw&sysid=1)**

Thank you for your support. Together, we can make a difference.

Sincerely,

[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c18988%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Cv9RD3zaCjdXox%2fUbByumQ&sysid=1)
Vivek Ramaswamy

P.S. I am committed to bringing fresh radical ideas to the table that will help put America back on track. But I can't do it without your support. **[Please chip in $1 or more to help me continue this fight.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c18981%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=e1jW0avT9Rv4jMcsaknmxA&sysid=1)**

| [** WATCH NOW → **](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c18982%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=O6%2bHK3UDde2gJNwHZrh5ww&sysid=1)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[ ** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c18983%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=BUAn4FrhTAf26oP%2bFnhQRQ&sysid=1)

---

name: Kash Patel
subject: BREAKING - J6 Choir tops music charts
body:
Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z6fgnq77lmh83n6ik5tgfob2tf7jmoo5f82a85eg_rp22sh2s8i66o72clg6coj3c9h2bs)

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It’s an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z86k8de3ljegpqo96m8648ifalk6o9psatm9or58_rp22sh2s8i66o72clg6coj3c9h2bs)

[_**Please listen to this song and support our efforts to provide legal resources to some Jan 6 families. **_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zslp2hgbhf28bpbba57qklnim9ltaj1onk2oknco_rp22sh2s8i66o72clg6coj3c9h2bs)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no _“deadly insurrection.”_ **The video evidence proves it for many!** This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

It’s time to act and help to support these families.

My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. **Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families?**

**Click below to show your support today!**

**Support the January 6th Families**

**Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com

Goal: **1,000 Donors

[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zbaphgst5buvtbgkbvk1478vmjoq73k2rijmiqag_rp22sh2s8i66o72clg6coj3c9h2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2za8p5a8aeq17cdo0tgbk9p4f5j62cnk4fek64fho_rp22sh2s8i66o72clg6coj3c9h2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z44gtfm3jujc3k9smr9ah53fushekso09q1llojo_rp22sh2s8i66o72clg6coj3c9h2bs)**
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zgvff630ktjtb5katspt03i411ca131ltcl0jipg_rp22sh2s8i66o72clg6coj3c9h2bs)
[**_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zagi935ori7d7lphj2jc8rteorciklgso6hjq7do_rp22sh2s8i66o72clg6coj3c9h2bs)

**I launched the _Kash Foundation_ to offer legal help to America First families like the ones from the Jan 6th witch hunts. **

I know what it’s like. I’ve been the target of the government gangsters in the Department of Justice myself.

I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump.

The FBI used innocent protestors to push their agenda. Now they are doing everything they can to hide any evidence that they tried to provoke the protesters. As the former head of counterterrorism and former senior aide to President Trump, _I will do everything in my power to help out_.

**Friend, I‘m humbly asking you to help us get justice for the Jan 6th detainees and set them free. **

[_**Will you be one of the 1,000 patriots brave enough to fight for some of the Jan 6th detainees and their families? You can show your support by donating $10, $25, $50, or even $100 today. Click here to step up >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zdljecjhb02kpkt9usj4ltfcp6899rvadjn6n94g_rp22sh2s8i66o72clg6coj3c9h2bs)

Please hurry.

And as moving as it is to hear them sing every night from their prison cells, it will sound so much sweeter when they can sing our national anthem underneath the stars with their freedom restored.

And they have sung this song proudly every night for more than 700 straight nights. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It’s an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag. We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need. The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts! We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them. But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them. Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no “deadly insurrection.” The video evidence proves it for many! This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before. It’s time to act and help to support these families. My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families? Click below to show your support today! Support the January 6th Families Email: dpwillis67@gmail.com Donor Status: MISSING Goal: 1,000 Donors I launched the Kash Foundation to offer legal help to America First families like the ones from the Jan 6th witch hunts. I know what it’s like. I’ve been the target of the government gangsters in the Department of Justice myself. I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump. The FBI used innocent protestors to push their agenda. Now they are doing everything they can to hide any evidence that they tried to provoke the protesters. As the former head of counterterrorism and former senior aide to President Trump, I will do everything in my power to help out. Friend, I‘m humbly asking you to help us get justice for the Jan 6th detainees and set them free. Please hurry. And as moving as it is to hear them sing every night from their prison cells, it will sound so much sweeter when they can sing our national anthem underneath the stars with their freedom restored. For Freedom, Kash Patel The Kash Foundation is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit. All donations are tax-deductible. 1600 Daily 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: Bringing conservative values to CNN
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
Don Lemon was WRONG on this.

| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zidq7gilg0sp47md38e0fbldp41577je2s76ogo0_rp22sh2s8i66o72clg6coj3c9h2bs)
Fellow American,

Things got a little heated on CNN.

While debating post Civil War history, Don Lemon preposterously claimed that "black people still aren't allowed to enjoy their freedoms."

**That's an insult to the progress we've made over the last 160 years.** His comments embody what's wrong with the dialogue about race in America. I told him so without apology.

My exchange with Don Lemon and CNN that has sparked controversy and anger from some in the mainstream media.

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2znqn53c194lgj2pqike71repvvhlckjcltja94p0_rp22sh2s8i66o72clg6coj3c9h2bs)
I spoke passionately about the importance of the Second Amendment and the need for civil discourse in our country. I stand by my words, but of course, some in the media have chosen to twist them and attack me.

**I refuse to back down, Fellow American.** I believe that we need to have honest, open discussions about the issues that matter most to Americans. That's why I am running for office. That's why I am working every day to make sure I have a prime spot on the debate stage in August.

In order to continue my campaign and fight for the values and principles that set this country into motion, I need your support. I can't do it alone. **[Any amount will bring us closer to our unique donor goal. I need your help to continue spreading my message of freedom and progress.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zrqv0g5rm2siupp44qn154em1udvubhepavssb9g_rp22sh2s8i66o72clg6coj3c9h2bs)**

**[Please consider making a small donation to my campaign today. Your contribution will help me continue my fight to revive the values that this nation was founded on: free speech. The rule of law. Excellence over grievance.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z61tr6l5l8gngnttrrqkc5bjifc0mi5ktdkfln6g_rp22sh2s8i66o72clg6coj3c9h2bs)**

Thank you for your support. Together, we can make a difference.

Sincerely,

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z490dvcpqap6kba1akic5d7ejv218jg5tbr2fmag_rp22sh2s8i66o72clg6coj3c9h2bs)
Vivek Ramaswamy

P.S. I am committed to bringing fresh radical ideas to the table that will help put America back on track. But I can't do it without your support. **[Please chip in $1 or more to help me continue this fight.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zn913q44p99kltjkkd1pme7gvskh31b9vmigs66g_rp22sh2s8i66o72clg6coj3c9h2bs)**

| [** WATCH NOW -> **](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zievbv3he943eno5lc5kajl5v2cs3e7kr8002j68_rp22sh2s8i66o72clg6coj3c9h2bs)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

clean_body: Don Lemon was WRONG on this. | Fellow American, Things got a little heated on CNN. While debating post Civil War history, Don Lemon preposterously claimed that "black people still aren't allowed to enjoy their freedoms." That's an insult to the progress we've made over the last 160 years. His comments embody what's wrong with the dialogue about race in America. I told him so without apology. My exchange with Don Lemon and CNN that has sparked controversy and anger from some in the mainstream media. I spoke passionately about the importance of the Second Amendment and the need for civil discourse in our country. I stand by my words, but of course, some in the media have chosen to twist them and attack me. I refuse to back down, Fellow American. I believe that we need to have honest, open discussions about the issues that matter most to Americans. That's why I am running for office. That's why I am working every day to make sure I have a prime spot on the debate stage in August. In order to continue my campaign and fight for the values and principles that set this country into motion, I need your support. I can't do it alone. Thank you for your support. Together, we can make a difference. Sincerely, Vivek Ramaswamy P.S. I am committed to bringing fresh radical ideas to the table that will help put America back on track. But I can't do it without your support. | GET TO KNOW VIVEK: Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam , along with his second book, Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence. - Cori Bush (D-MO) is demanding his impeachment...

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: They're mutilating young girls and we have to stop them
body:
I’m asking for your immediate help to stop the radical Left’s medical mutilation of our children

| |
---
| |
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative, My name is Harmeet Dhillon, the founder and Chief Executive Officer of the Center for American Liberty, and I’m asking for your immediate help to stop the radical Left’s medical mutilation of our children in the name of “gender dysphoria.”
---
| | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c18905%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=VzJA1jELN%2fyA1TYNxnnX2A&sysid=1)
---
| We were recently on Tucker Carlson Tonight, announcing that we just launched a landmark case against the hospitals AND doctors who coerced Chloe Cole to transition to a “boy” at the young age of 13.
---
| | **In case you missed our announcement on Tucker’s show, let me quickly give you the details of our case:** As a young 13-year-old girl, doctors began transitioning Chloe to become a boy...
---
_This included putting her on experimental drugs like**Lupron** , a drug that has been used to chemically castrate violent sex offenders..._
---
_... Giving her constant testosterone injections..._ _... And removing both of her breasts in a double-mastectomy surgery at the age of 15._ **_How was this allowed to happen?_** It’s because the doctors and hospitals lied to the family -- including one powerful lie constantly used to scare parents into agreeing to this medical mutilation:
---
“Would you rather have a dead daughter or a live son?”
---
This lie is repeated to struggling families so doctors and hospitals can perform lucrative transgender medical experimentation on children... And I’m asking for your help today to put an end to it! [**Specifically, I’m asking you to make a one-time emergency donation of $25 today to hold the hospitals AND doctors responsible for their barbaric actions.**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c18906%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=RmP6UVD6WCwZ1M7BsDx79Q&sysid=1) Because until these predators are held responsible things will never change... And if we don’t act right away, more and more children will be put under the knife and experimented on. Medical facilities are actively promoting, encouraging, and advertising these barbaric treatments to minors. Chloe has suffered physically, socially, emotionally, and psychologically from their lies and experiments. Chloe also has no idea if she’ll ever experience the profound joy of motherhood... and if she is able to one day have kids, she knows she will not be able to breastfeed them. The medical experimentation performed on Chloe as a young child caused permanent and irreversible damage to her body and the predators that did this must be held accountable... ...and that’s where you come in. [**Please make an urgent donation of $25 today - but of course if you can give more, say $35, $50, $100, $250 or more I would be eternally grateful. **](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c18907%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=lFz9giNsbkpsGTm62llG%2fQ&sysid=1) Whatever amount you’re able to give today will be used to hold these radical activists pushing this disgusting agenda on our children accountable. ** **
---
| | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c18905%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=VzJA1jELN%2fyA1TYNxnnX2A&sysid=1)
---
| So please, do not delay. Chloe’s landmark case is the case that can put a stop to these “physicians” abusing and mutilating children... With your help we can save many more lives like Chloe's.
---
| | [**So please consider a generous contribution of $25, 35, $50, $100, $250 or more today.**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c18908%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2bj%2bkvurgHyQF9R4rgoCMPw&sysid=1) Sincerely,
---
| |
---
|
---
| | P.S. We must put an end to the medical mutilation happening to thousands of children across the country -- and winning Chloe Cole’s landmark case is how we stop them. Our case holds the hospitals AND doctors responsible for their experimentation and will ensure that these predators who abuse our children in the name of a radical Left-wing agenda think again. [**I hope I can count on your urgent tax-deductible donation of $25, 35, $50, $100, $250 or more today.**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c18909%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=1zFc8rt2m%2bS%2fvPsP9V4Zvg&sysid=1)
---
| | [**DONATE NOW**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c18900%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=1a%2bkz7%2fFEb2ddG6iPiQWMA&sysid=1)
---
| | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c18901%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=R2vcOtxBoWV1wV7o0Odm9g&sysid=1)

## Trump-DeSantis Ticket?
---
The **New York Post** released an article claiming that **President Trump** is "_listening_ " to insiders about choosing Ron DeSantis to be his running mate in 2024. This has sparked a ton of speculation among Conservatives. However, **Roger Stone** has clearly pointed out that this WILL NOT HAPPEN. **First** , according to **Mr. Stone** , a **Trump-DeSantis** ticket would be, _"a violation of the Electoral College Rules which effectively (if not actually) prohibit the selection of two people who are legal residents of the same state (lest they forfeit that state's Electoral College votes if they carry the state)."_ **Second** , Ron DeSantis has shown his _disloyalty_ to the MAGA movement and President Trump by running a shadow Presidential campaign on the dime of Florida taxpayers. His close ties to the Bush's, Paul Ryan and Karl Rove should be alarming as well. America deserves a much better candidate for VP than DeSantis. I am confident that **President Trump** will choose the right person for the job when he is elected for the third time in 2024. God Bless America Thank you,
Jackson Lahmeyer Follow me on [TruthSocial](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=20869222.11883.1.18c71ed54119f852a62af5c3eae360e4), GAB, [Facebook](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=20869222.11884.1.899a21ea0c3d99a60802d580d14e1708), [Instagram](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=20869222.11885.1.bc54bb17b5ee621a6caebd3c3950ec3b), [Twitter](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=20869222.11886.1.bc920419fae1b5facf1f45fb32d61844), [Telegram](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=20869222.11887.1.a389e2fb4c7f37ae1fcf0b2654c27c21), GETTR & [YouTube](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=20869222.11888.1.8731f6e32d4592e5358da4914e42be72)). subject: Your Supreme Court survey
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vsIlxsWDLN

Hillsdale College

Your participation in Hillsdale College's National Survey
on the United States Supreme Court is requested.

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osIlxsWDLN

Please see a special message from our
sponsor:

Dear Friend,

Your participation in Hillsdale
College's National Survey on the United States Supreme Court is
requested.

Your response will only take a few
minutes, but the subject is crucial to the future of liberty and
the separation of powers in America.

In an interview published in Imprimis,
Hillsdale's digest of liberty, Associate Justice of the Supreme
Court Clarence Thomas explained what he sees as his role on the
nation's highest court: "My job is to apply the Constitution."

But progressives see the Court
differently. They want activist judges to legislate from the
bench.

Do you agree that the role of the
Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution as it is written and
NOT to make laws or advance a particular policy agenda?

YES

NO

Even worse, progressives dismayed by
recent Supreme Court decisions want to "pack" the bench with
additional justices to advance a preferred policy agenda.

As Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) put
it in a Boston Globe op-ed: "To restore balance and integrity to
a broken institution, Congress must expand the Supreme Court by
four or more seats."

That is why I'm reaching out to you
today...

What is your opinion about the Supreme
Court's role in our constitutional republic?

Please share your thoughts with me
using the College's National Survey on the United States Supreme
Court right away.

Your response will help Hillsdale form
effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the
importance of the Constitution to liberty-including the proper
role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution
instead of legislating from the bench.

You can easily complete your National
Survey on the United States Supreme Court using this secure link:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61738440:sIlxsWDLN:m:3:2532013465:F1F73A15C6172E1ADDFDD53811C8C65B:r

Thank you for your time and
attention-and for your support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn

President, Hillsdale College

Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty
since 1844

Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI
49242 USA

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system January 18, 2022.
For more information please follow the URL below:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/isIlxsWDLN

Follow the URL below to update your preferences or opt-out:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osIlxsWDLN

with "Unsubscribe" as the subject line.

name: Freedom First Project
subject: Doctor's #1 Piece of Advice for Bad Knees
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---

There's no such thing as a "magic fix" or a "miracle cure" when it comes to easing long-term joint discomfort. Even so...

...thanks to a Boston MD, thousands of folks across the country are re-discovering what it's like to feel as if they're decades younger...

...and enjoying activities they were once forced to give up.

And while these older folks have been dealing with knee, hip, and shoulder issues for years...

The speed of their recovery almost defies belief.

For some, it's taking a few months...

For others, it's weeks...

And for the lucky few, it's happening in as little as 5 days.

But the most remarkable thing isn't how FAST they're getting these results... but HOW they're doing it.

And it all comes down to a doctor's simple routine. Something so counterintuitive... it's surprising to almost anyone that tries it (heck, most people resist it at first for that EXACT reason).

But it works, and thousands of success stories prove it (and you can [learn more about this on the next page](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.))...

| | | | | Peter, **[_This Horrible GOP Extremist Won By Only 1600 Votes Last Time And Must Lose!_](https://default.salsalabs.org/T48c0e1f0-0c06-40ba-896b-73252f4e92a8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** **_The extremist Congressman--in one of our top opportunities to give Democrats a House Majority--is NRA backed John James, from Michigan’s 10th District, who wants to let every terrorist and criminal have a gun._** **_Meanwhile, an incredible Democrat has jumped in the race. Emily Busch went through hell and back on Nov. 30th, 2021, when her son was at Oxford High School as a mass shooter--a terrorist armed by GOP policy--murdered four and injured seven with a weapon he NEVER should have had._** _Her son Andrew had to run for his life, and luckily he survived. But in the long tradition of Mothers Against Drunk Driving and Moms Demand Action, she wasn't going to just go on with her life, feeling lucky. __**She wept for the four sets of parents whose kids didn't come home, and decided to do something about it.**_ [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T162ca9ce-edce-4cef-a908-681d5ad30081/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _We need public servants like Busch who care about their community and run not for power, but what's right. For these very same reasons, Rep. James, who won by the skin of his teeth last time, MUST become an ex-Congressman._ [**_Busch just kicked off her campaign. Will you join us in helping her gear up immediately by giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to this brave, empathetic mother & congressional candidate, so we can take the House and pass the gun safety measures we so desperately need?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T215b3944-9544-4bd7-bc92-1bfb604da289/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Thank you for trying to put an end to our country's gun madness._ Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te6ce14e0-522e-46e8-97e9-b32e71448109/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Kash Patel
subject: BREAKING - J6 Choir tops music charts
body:
Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

[](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79942%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=jpff3OZlK%2bWSnC2JCKKF5w&sysid=1)

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It’s an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

[](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79942%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=jpff3OZlK%2bWSnC2JCKKF5w&sysid=1)

[_**Please listen to this song and support our efforts to provide legal resources to some Jan 6 families. **_](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79943%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=cwS66U%2bVVCGNMZpNgoYIeA&sysid=1)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no _“deadly insurrection.”_ **The video evidence proves it for many!** This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

It’s time to act and help to support these families.

My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. **Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families?**

**Click below to show your support today!**

**Support the January 6th Families**

**Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**Donor Status: MISSING
Goal: **1,000 Donors

[**_Donate Now >>_**](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79944%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=qPlsq8HLeOHzhB9owqH44w&sysid=1)

**[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79055%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=hH7MhjF9%2bE48lylYzazQog&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $25 >>>**_](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79056%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=txUsUUukuPbkq%2bH%2bqyLLXQ&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79057%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=QGcCutTE3ltOizQ3C%2f5oXg&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79058%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=kf2uLq8OZN9nhouqLLS5DA&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79059%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=lEua%2bYx%2bxOfkf0fcOmcGjg&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79050%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ozaDo8tZXJoRLrB5pA02uw&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79051%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=uEhG%2fyR1ZPw%2fZ2AFlb0EKQ&sysid=1)**
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79052%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=UfuXYgvwX3t1cezwrYkJsw&sysid=1)
[**_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_**](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79053%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=kz8e5rZZcb8uTJy%2f4viWpA&sysid=1)

**I launched the _Kash Foundation_ to offer legal help to America First families like the ones from the Jan 6th witch hunts. **

I know what it’s like. I’ve been the target of the government gangsters in the Department of Justice myself.

I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump.

The FBI used innocent protestors to push their agenda. Now they are doing everything they can to hide any evidence that they tried to provoke the protesters. As the former head of counterterrorism and former senior aide to President Trump, _I will do everything in my power to help out_.

**Friend, I‘m humbly asking you to help us get justice for the Jan 6th detainees and set them free. **

[_**Will you be one of the 1,000 patriots brave enough to fight for some of the Jan 6th detainees and their families? You can show your support by donating $10, $25, $50, or even $100 today. Click here to step up >>>**_](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79054%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=JRO3aqgAh%2f99iJ7G%2b3EmkQ&sysid=1)

Please hurry.

And as moving as it is to hear them sing every night from their prison cells, it will sound so much sweeter when they can sing our national anthem underneath the stars with their freedom restored.

[_**You can rush your urgent donation by clicking here.**_](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79065%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=q9NYhKpqEjg9VxP0i11LBQ&sysid=1)

For Freedom,

Kash Patel

_The Kash Foundation is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit. All donations are tax-deductible._

Great American Update
---
_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_

_[**unsubscribe**](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79066%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=AACX8nj9CUji4An0ZJ0QVA&sysid=1)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79067%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=dyNYhfo4L5psQQNFNrTG9A&sysid=1)_
[](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c7778%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=9uCt8OBiu3m2y%2bTyQwbGQQ&sysid=1)

name: Rep. Dana Criswell
subject: Support Chris Brown - Public Service Commissioner
body:
|
---
| | |
---
| |
---
For the past three years, Biden and the Liberal Left have shown the American people that Democrats have an out-of-touch and overreaching environmental and energy policy. I'm Chris Brown and I’m running for Public Service Commissioner for the Northern District of Mississippi because Mississippi deserves a common-sense approach to power.
I’m an eighth-generation Mississippian. I know this state well. I grew up in DeSoto County, graduated from Walnut High School in Tippah County, attended Northeast MS Community College in Prentiss County, and settled down in Monroe County. I love Mississippi, which is why I chose to raise my family and build my businesses here.
I've spent over a decade fighting for conservative ideals in Mississippi's State House. I was committed to standing up to big government and the Radical Left's agenda as a state legislator, and I'll be happy to do the same as Public Service Commissioner.
Washington Democrats have pushed policies that kill jobs, destroy American energy independence, and crush middle-class families. While these radical hypocrites lecture everyday Americans about gas stoves and cow flatulence, they fly private jets to climate summits and ignore massive chemical spills. As Public Service Commissioner, I will stand up to unconstitutional mandates from these "climate activist" elites.
[**Will you help me fight to keep Mississippi values at the forefront of our Public Service Commission?**](https://www.votervoice.net/BroadcastLinks/oyNKHLqDd5OMfIC2rRX6Jg)
It's no secret that Joe Biden's presidency and Nancy Pelosi's stint as Speaker of the House have spelled disaster for America. All around the country, conservatives are standing up and joining the fight against radical ideals. I was proud to be a founding member of the Mississippi Freedom Caucus in 2013, and I'm unashamed to say that I'll fight as hard as possible to keep the Green New Deal out of Mississippi.

[**Will you join our team with a donation of $10, $25, $50, $100 or anything you can contribute today?**](https://www.votervoice.net/BroadcastLinks/oyNKHLqDd5OMfIC2rRX6Jg)

Sincerely,
---

Chris Brown
| You are receiving this email because you signed up for alerts from Mississippi Freedom Caucus.
Click [here](https://www.votervoice.net/BroadcastLinks/YY0x4xnknfnrUPRwmC5ZTA) to unsubscribe from this mailing list.

---
| | [ ](https://www.votervoice.net)
---

name: Biden Approval Survey (Team Claudia)
subject: BREAKING: Biden announces 2024 campaign
body:
It’s official. Joe Biden has officially announced he’s running for re-election in 2024...
---
| | | | | | | | | | | [](https://click.email.claudiatenneyforcongress.com/?qs=33a2f693d1356394998354b1174991f424c6c96e3aa92e91666b2593aba06f515a317ad45f2734105f3c6005099064daf482af1f2fdb295d)
---
| | **BREAKING: President Joe Biden Announces 2024 Re-election Bid** **_Do you think Joe Biden is the _WORST_ president in U.S. History?_**
---
| | [YES](https://click.email.claudiatenneyforcongress.com/?qs=33a2f693d1356394f975066855ce511cb2b4b97eec45c585e579204bdcf964d7d9418e8864750c98259c960bd4f288e2eaf93c36f97d8188)
---
| | [NO](https://click.email.claudiatenneyforcongress.com/?qs=33a2f693d1356394dabbd020df551e1744b3e08cb4df608484c38c1840cab70bd1a06037e680ae0def6c17b4b2e2a65f6e59edf63a2a308d)
---
Peter, it's official. Joe Biden has officially announced he's running for re-election in 2024. **[We want to get your thoughts on his recent announcement before April 30th>>](https://click.email.claudiatenneyforcongress.com/?qs=33a2f693d13563941dac6c5f76c85924098adf416f8cdd04b30ae766381620b1a025e632b4ddf8dc79483d98c5147ddaa2b8a1c8f5fc18b4 "We want to get your thoughts on his recent announcement before April 30th >>")**. It's undeniable that our country is currently struggling. Under Joe Biden's leadership, we've witnessed... **➡️ A _disastrous exit_ from Afghanistan.** **➡️ A _record increase_ in prices on everything from gas to groceries.** **➡️ A _complete weaponizatio_ n of government against the American people.** **➡️ A _radical shift_ from American independence to dependence on America's enemies.** **➡️ And much, much more. ** That's why we're reaching out to you today to ask for your opinion on an important issue. **[Do you agree with Claudia that President Biden is the worst president in history?](https://click.email.claudiatenneyforcongress.com/?qs=33a2f693d135639477bf77f85df03f7149b82b0d9c4836efd8df2261b1494f26d15f459cf143805957397029be1491bf9f40bdcc8c22aa3e "Do you agree with Claudia that President Biden is the worst president in history?")** We've created**** this flash poll to gauge public opinion on this, and we would be grateful if you could take a moment to **[share your thoughts.](https://click.email.claudiatenneyforcongress.com/?qs=33a2f693d13563941db5430b7034801003818dbac4de0999d7a035b0516eb9d527342e938e1d21188dedb89b7d8fa39db3257c201cc87be9 "share your thoughts. ")** Your **[input](https://click.email.claudiatenneyforcongress.com/?qs=33a2f693d1356394f924d51ebc1afc1c5ee7a7697ada0f0374edccfe78972542c5f714d624d89d26b06691bf8a6c015bb85637aaadbd62dd "input")****** is crucial to help Claudia hold Joe Biden and his administration accountable for their radical agenda against the American people.
---
| | [TAKE THE POLL NOW >>](https://click.email.claudiatenneyforcongress.com/?qs=33a2f693d1356394998354b1174991f424c6c96e3aa92e91666b2593aba06f515a317ad45f2734105f3c6005099064daf482af1f2fdb295d)
---
Thank you, Team Claudia

name: Bill Spadea
subject: Tucker Carlson Ousted: WE MUST UNITE!
body:
Peter, The silencing and deplatforming of conservative voices in the United States continues on. Yesterday, Fox News ousted
|
---
| Peter, The silencing and deplatforming of conservative voices in the United States continues on.
Yesterday, Fox News ousted its top-rated host, Tucker Carlson, without providing any reasoning for the shocking move. Ironically, this announcement was made shortly after Tucker Carlson Tonight surpassed all other cable news shows in terms of ratings AND viewers. **So why would Fox News get rid of its most-watched and best-rated host?** _**Is it because he spoke the truth?**_ **We know that speaking truth and challenging the ‘group think’ narrative makes people like Tucker Carlson a threat to the mainstream media's radical far left agenda.** So where we go from here? Now more than ever, we must stand together in support of common sense, truth, and the open exchange of ideas. The Common Sense Club was created for these exact reasons, and if you haven't already, I urge you to join it today.
