[**Claim your membership here now, or if you're already a member you can gift a membership to a friend.**](https://xtz223.keap-link011.com/v2/click/08acc3c2b74253610233d3de40017cf5/eJyNkMsOgkAMRf-laxQZfAR2hhBDUBdG12aEKqMwTMYqIuHfHdS40sTt7elpbhsglFxSlIIPN7oz5oIFGhOhBEoKSkk8eU7ZaOi4jgW5kKeZLi8K_Obr8gfoYm_sWUC1QkOsV9Mgjpaz7TxaxgZUXJsTf2kmnvPRhItpNIe2_enFQlB4Neoz-KQv2PVJhelEG50bPiNSZ9-2q6rqH0shKcO9OGTEBsztJ2Vhd2EPCy7y3s74uFIo0_crYqxf1vYBXLpnLw==) Its times like these when we are reminded of the lengths that the radical left will go to silence our voices and impede common sense solutions from being implemented. **But the joke is on them.** **Every time they try to silence us, we come back louder, stronger, and more motivated than before—and so will be the case with Tucker Carlson.** Make sure you [**show your support for common sense here.**](https://xtz223.keap-link011.com/v2/click/6fc3145c9b5141bb8b88f2b2f8621446/eJyNkMEOgjAMht-lZxQZKpGbIYQQ1IPRs5lQZQpjmVVUwrs71HjSxOvfr1_ztwFCySXFGfhwpTtjLligMRVKoKSgksTT55SNho7rWFAIeYx0dVbgN1-XP0AXT8aeBXRTaIjVchok8SLazOJFYkDFtTnxl8abOB9NOJ_GM2jbn14sBYUXoz6BT_qMXZ9MmE601oXhcyJ18m27ruv-oRKSctyJfU5swNx-WpV2F_aw5KLobY2PK4Uye78iwdvL2j4AWwhnLQ==) Talk soon, Bill

name: Joe Biden
subject: Peter, I’m officially running for reelection:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
If you’re with me, I hope you’ll let me explain exactly why this campaign matters so much and then consider pitching in to support it. | | |
---
Every generation has a moment where they have had to stand up for democracy. To stand up for their fundamental freedoms. _I believe this is ours._ **That is why I am running for reelection as president of the United States.[If you’re with me, I hope you’ll let me explain exactly why this campaign matters so much and then consider pitching in to support it. ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zwt2ZjhvUXOZbVTv3WSve4fJ1wNKC6-M6pLg2F212UKyzSeiPDuGIYCaHVwO9vvqVmmueuXIuHUBEc2ouMZFc6vT8sQhBOo5pkLJO0iKVBQOzRHd7l6FIOcqNa24kCpCBPXllWi61e2WLv1rdFlkzwvAvNs1QpDnR1y5BxbIx3aTSo4DskOliw1i5gJxE6v3Nu2yHmLSHDSemmN8eqGwASpE0KmQvWE4GD78CbqQjxUxpczZnHVFSBbz40ZD8snAYOaubcdxwqlsplCQvW1L8fuqORhKREfKX-KO8YKIVxdVVEWFQulrsZAmpqz2miW0UM9pnA_I2ZPdkg_4ojAYNxWz7oEYadc-1jNEjxTQ9R9dMolywGoRLHHepkgBVuwA2Byh-my1APlJ382vgd0VMGB45jLYuK0oljJsXjmnFRgQjjFMezZ7Tr47SIkpeLrAbazZfsS5Q51zJTthwKg4svrmJmRt0nei7ADYmBMmG0rUlrp9baKOAkBWmdoehoaGsPuRr4DsEk6g0it_oV8BNU_jeQXAr-QYCMTsElgziStm8LKsh-PsYdW7hovNSuo50IZzfIC02slFFFug9NdlBU-TMkHsOpBqxhsHweGxRixhtXwXlHLh8L8xU2NDh3DPA/3vo/yoq3AzxZQLKSQ8gDfi1BXg/h0/nCPbvuitO6j-gO-IPbXua9G-MPXNEAxqQlYhft_Cpt0)** When I ran in 2020, I said we were in a battle for the soul of America. _We still are._ The question before us now is whether we’ll have more freedoms or fewer in the years ahead. More rights, or fewer. I know what I want the answer to be. **Giving folks a little more breathing room. Making your life a little freer._This has been the work of my lifetime. And we’ve made real progress these last few years._** But, across the country, MAGA extremists are lining up to take us backward. They’re trying to gut Social Security and Medicare. They’re trying to raise prices on prescription drugs and repeal the cost-saving measures we’ve put in place for the hardworking families, all while saying we have enough money to cut taxes for the rich. They’re telling women what health care choices they’re allowed to make. They’re telling you what books should be in your kids' schools. And if you don’t like it, tough luck: They’re going after your right to vote, too. **[But we can stop them. There is nothing beyond our capacity if we do it together. There’s a choice ahead of us. Do we continue to build a future full of opportunities for you and families like yours? Or will we turn the clock back? But here’s the honest truth: I’m more optimistic than I’ve ever been. And it’s because I’ve seen what this team can do when it comes together.
**In 2020, more than 6 million grassroots supporters just like you helped propel our campaign to victory.**
I’m so proud of the progress we made. We took our economy back from the brink, helping create more than 12 million jobs. We took aggressive action to bring costs down for working people -- all while making corporations pay their fair share. We took the strongest action on climate in our nation’s history -- I’m not kidding.
But there’s still so much left to be done. Where we passed the first major federal legislation on gun violence in decades, we now need to finish the job and ban assault weapons. Where we capped insulin at $35 for Medicare recipients, we need to cap it for everyone. And where we finally made the wealthiest corporations pay their fair share, we need to do the same for billionaires.
**We’ve got a lot of work to do and a lot of progress we’ve got to make in the second term._W_ _e’ve got to finish the job._ And I can only do that with you behind me. **
**[It’d mean the world to me to have you with me in this fight. name: Kirsten Gillibrand
subject: EMILYs List just endorsed me for reelection!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
Friends,

I wanted to let you know first: EMILYs List just endorsed me for reelection!

It’s an honor to have the support of EMILYs List and their amazing network—and to stand alongside my fellow women senators running this year.

EMILYs List has been there for me from the beginning. I first ran for Congress in 2006, taking on a GOP incumbent in a 2:1 Republican district. When I launched that campaign, my mom was just about the only person who thought I could win.

But with EMILYs List (and my then-two-year-old son Theo) by my side, I defied the odds and flipped my upstate House district blue.

We’ve accomplished a lot since then—from securing health care for 9/11 first responders to ending the military’s discriminatory Don’t Ask, Don’t Tell policy to passing a federal ban on gun trafficking.

I’m running for reelection because we still have so much left to do. We need to codify Roe v. Wade into federal law and restore reproductive freedoms across our country. We need to pass national paid family and medical leave and affordable child care. We need to make health care more affordable, protect voting rights, and take meaningful action on climate change.

But I need your help. With so much at stake, Democrats are hanging onto our Senate majority by a thread. Mitch McConnell only needs to flip two seats to retake control—and after New York Republicans secured historic victories across the state during the midterm elections, the GOP is targeting me for defeat.

Please, will you make a donation to help me defeat the GOP in New York, defend our narrow Democratic majority and continue fighting for you in the Senate?
Kirsten
[https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif] https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gfs_footer [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gfs_footer] [https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif]
A note from Kirsten:
Friend, I can’t thank you enough for standing by my side in the critical fights ahead of us. As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever.
While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 – and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, Nate Silver’s FiveThirtyEight is saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority.
As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. So please, chip in to help defend our narrow Democratic Senate majority. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gfs_footer] And if you’d like to become a core member of my team and receive exclusive texts from my campaign, text JOIN to 60708. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gfs_footer]
Thank you,
Kirsten Gillibrand
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
Click here to unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/46LjluwB30OIUfgIWihL4Q2?unsubscribedata=DWM7A%2FTMyXo6JnmY8FuM81xRxWv08c8UR973oyPPJduhyle971%2FSgl5TgRkLSfwcvxIZtGmNlz4y%2F0cdgoi0c1sRj3BjRTo28assFa9TzdH2O3niuIUWZMKjxfjLI53Zq56g%2FaNxrKm%2BvpKp%2FQusO27kHLh%2F7L1TKQTy%2B8s0ET4VB4YoIAYKuQ3sbGD8sRpKEuRqFvsLhn%2FffmVFx9ESuifRlQ9uevlPz1okPvUfjafozRC5hYk%2F7Y71UMPeQU8318%2B2FsTULdjUjtCkzJubcAtze1uwiliHIjOtf%2B8TLgf0%2F9YTEEUheE2tzssB6u7%2BoRP6IV%2FKzDaMAIXRHa1eVYmoBCp63DlA5BSq%2BPnGy8Wc%2B1Umh0oVGxsMxEC0dsfgmq%2FhMagovmKIaH31dA5XkifbC%2Fg3MSi%2FbuOGIAJe8xg%3D .

name: =?utf-8?Q?Scott=20Jensen?=
subject: Our lawsuit: what's next?
body:
what to expect in this journey | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/drscottjensen/whats-next?e=9828080a05)
---
| |
---
| | Peter,

I am thankful and grateful. In just 5 days, we've raised $150,000 in an effort to bring forth a lawsuit against Keith Ellison and the Board of Medical Practice. We will fight for doctors and all professionals who labor under a licensure, to make sure they ALWAYS have 1st Amendment and 14th Amendment rights. [Please click here and listen to my audio message](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=6b355f2a40&e=9828080a05) to you about this monumental feat:
---
| [ ](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=0a28d79bdd&e=9828080a05)
---
| This is about freedom, free speech, and re-empowering doctors and other professionals, so they don't have to live in fear of expressing their political opinions. I was shocked to learn from Dr. Jordan B. Peterson that nurses may be losing their jobs just by [_commenting_ on my videos](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=369bef4d4b&e=9828080a05). This is a big reason why [I'm pursuing this lawsuit](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=5996a44382&e=9828080a05); I'm ready to invest the weeks, months, years it will take to ensure that professionals can have a voice. We must set a new precedent in favor of free speech.

Though we believe the amount we've raised thus far will be satisfactory for us to get started, I am leaving the [GiveSendGo](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=44e5c8d870&e=9828080a05) open - in case you, your friends, and your family feel inclined to [give further](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=0b37c0dc2d&e=9828080a05). As we work through the court system, we may need even more resources.

_Here's what will happen next:_
* Over the next few weeks, my legal team and I will be developing a plan of action for the lawsuit. We will keep you abreast of every update along the way. Expect to hear more specifics on the language and filings in mid-late May.
* I will continue to provide you with relevant updates about the suit and its progress. I will be as transparent with you as possible, without compromising the case.
* I will keep [DrScottJensen.com](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=31579c1cdf&e=9828080a05) open and update it with relevant documents as they become public. [You are invested in this with me](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=d7fc5393e1&e=9828080a05), and this lawsuit has the potential to have wide-ranging implications if we are successful.
* Please continue to follow our social media channels to stay up to date with us as well:
* [Follow us on Twitter](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=a5327e4aeb&e=9828080a05)
* [Subscribe to us on YouTube](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=3ce64f8478&e=9828080a05)
* [Follow us on Instagram](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=bf7c364234&e=9828080a05)
* [Follow us on Facebook](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=bee5ec5b43&e=9828080a05)
* We need you to be "digital warriors" and share content on these social channels as we get it out there.

Please stay tuned for more. I will keep you engaged and involved in this process. It will be a long journey, but I'm thankful [you're in it with me](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=cede607727&e=9828080a05). The time to fight back is now.

In Freedom,

Dr. Scott Jensen
Minnesota Family Doctor
---
|
---

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: You may know Mississippi Gov. Tate Reeves from his "greatest" hits of a massive public corruption scandal and refusal to accept Medicaid dollars--which has worsened his constituents' health, and, let's be honest, killed some of them. Let’s replace him with a rockstar Democrat!
body:
Brandon Presley for Mississippi!
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4ba8c2e0-52f4-456a-928e-636f6e19dad7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, [**We have a chance this year to rid ourselves of another awful Republican Governor and elect a rock star...**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td5d20a68-f5c1-43c9-93ae-316cc0443406/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _You may know Mississippi Gov. Tate Reeves from his "greatest" hits of a massive public corruption scandal and __refusal to accept Medicaid dollars--which has worsened his constituents' health, and, let's be honest, killed some of them._ **_There's also been the water crisis in Jackson, with residents unable to access clean running water_** , **_and the fact that Reeves is even hated by his own party, so much so that the Speaker of the State House, Philip Gunn, is openly talking about taking him on in a primary._** _From Mississippi Today:_ [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te7de0514-869a-4c03-88db-ee0d639f56b7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _But the best news of all? Our rock star, Public Service Commissioner of the Northern District of Mississippi, Brandon Presley, is thinking of running. He's helped rural Mississipians get broadband and taken on corporations to keep utility rates low._ **_Oh, and did we tell you his name's Presley? Yeah, as in, that guy. Ok so he's not a rock star himself, but a second cousin to Elvis Presley. In the name recognition and positive feelings department in MI, he may as well be the rock star himself._** [**_So will you join us in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to return Tate Reeves to sender, so Mississippi can't help falling in love with Brandon Presley?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T12673e9e-a72e-44ea-a0e0-28d04bdac9a3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Mississippi, and America, deserve better than the loathsome Tate Reeves. Cliff
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
|
---

1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212
513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com

| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T15afc86c-2474-4ce8-8cf3-4601b3f5250a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

Cliff | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good ---|--- | | | | | Follow Us | | ---|--- | Blue Amp Strategies 1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212 513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com | Having trouble viewing this email? | | | | | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect: after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t. When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families. Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can. | | or

name: Protect Freedom PAC
subject: PRESS: Protect Freedom PAC endorses Alex Mooney for U.S. Senate in West Virginia
body:
| | | |
---
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE: April 26, 2023
---
| Contact: Michael Biundo michael@ascent-strategic.com, 202-809-6014
---
---
| Protect Freedom PAC Endorses Alex Mooney for U.S. Senate in West Virginia
---
|
---
| Athens, GA - Protect Freedom PAC, an independent organization dedicated to supporting pro-liberty and freedom-minded candidates, has endorsed Congressman Alex Mooney for U.S. Senate in West Virginia. Congressman Mooney is Protect Freedom PAC's first endorsement of the 2024 cycle.
Last cycle, Protect Freedom PAC endorsed in approximately a dozen key House races and three pivotal Senate races, spending nearly $8 million.
Mike Biundo, Protect Freedom PAC's Chairman, issued the following statement:
"Congressman Mooney has established an impressive record as a member of Congress and has always stood firm in defense of the Constitution and our freedom. We need more fighters like him in the U.S. Senate to protect our liberty and preserve the ideals and principles of our Founding Fathers."
---
| |
---
| Protect Freedom PAC was founded for the purpose of supporting pro-freedom and liberty-minded candidates using the tactics, technology, and strategy that best fits each race individually. Since 2018, Protect Freedom PAC has made expenditures totaling approximately $26 million. The organization was founded by seasoned political operatives with decades of national campaign experience, which includes a team of veterans of the Donald Trump, Ron Paul, and Rand Paul campaigns for President.
---
---
| ###
---
|
---
| | | | | | | Protect Freedom PAC | 196 Alps Rd, Ste 2-244, Athens, GA 30606

body:

It's Official: President Joe Biden announced his campaign for re-election in 2024! So, Peter, **Unite the Country just launched a powerful TV spot to highlight President Biden's 2024 vision for America.** It's currently airing in key battleground states around the country, but we urgently need your support to keep it on the air. **[You don’t want to miss it! Click here to watch, then donate whatever you can before the end of today to spread our message>>>](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62333887/403092993/1396901639?refcode=em_UTC_FR_Biden2024ReelectionSeries2NewAD_042723_L1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc4OTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNhNDkyOWRiLTI5ZTQtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=F5YCoNqg8VfvT4qt21pDYK72Mh_uZV_6lNC9kWuQ_3w=)** [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62333893/403092997/1396901639?refcode=em_UTC_FR_Biden2024ReelectionSeries2NewAD_042723_img1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc4OTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNhNDkyOWRiLTI5ZTQtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=F5YCoNqg8VfvT4qt21pDYK72Mh_uZV_6lNC9kWuQ_3w=) We must ensure that President Biden's message of hope and progress is heard loud and clear during this historic election. Joe has already achieved significant accomplishments during his first term, such as protecting marriage equality, improving healthcare for veterans, supporting middle-class families, and revitalizing American manufacturing, just to name a few. But this fight is far from over. That’s where we come in. My Senate Republican colleagues and I just left a BIG 2024 Election meeting, but we ran into a problem - we needed more up-to-date information to make better strategic decisions. I'm entrusting YOU with completing the because of your excellent track record of providing valuable input for the Conservative movement. Your opinions, concerns, and interests are CRITICAL to formulating our 2024 campaign platform. We can only WIN in 2024 when we create an agenda that best represents the will of the American people. You'll be the voice of your fellow patriots in your area, so we're counting on your quick response. 2024 is the most important election of our lifetime. name: =?utf-8?Q?Greater=20New=20Haven=20Green=20Party?=
subject: TABLE with us!
body:
Saturdayat North Haven Earth Day, and Monday,May Day,on the New Haven Green!

** TABLE with us! Saturday at North Haven Earth Day, and Monday, May Day, on the New Haven Green!
------------------------------------------------------------

** North Haven Earth Day!
------------------------------------------------------------
10AM-1:30PM
North Haven High School
221 Elm St, North Haven

Table with the Greater New Haven Green Party at this Earth Day Event to help grow the party!

Respond to this email to RSVP.

Live Raptors from A Place called hope, Foster Dogs from Where is the Love, over 40 area groups participating. An Earth-friendly crowd!

** MAY DAY! MAY DAY!
------------------------------------------------------------

** International Workers Day.
MAY 1st. 12PM-6PM
New Haven Green

Come Table with the Green Party at this workers' solidarity event on the New Haven Green. Hear from speakers at Unidad Latina en Accion and others.
3PM Maypole Dance
4PM Rally
5PM March!
------------------------------------------------------------

** Monthly Meetings will be
SECOND WEDNESDAYS
Next Meeting May 10
7pm
------------------------------------------------------------

** Register HERE (https://us02web.zoom.us/meeting/register/tZcscuigqjkrGdGl9Vf0x0Godup8SoJcb8eq) for our monthly Zooms!
------------------------------------------------------------
At our last minute we did some fine-tuning of the bylaws and we are ready to put them into practice. Ratifying them requires a 2/3 vote at 2 meetings. Please ATTEND our next meeting to vote for the bylaws and for officers. We are seeking candidates for Vice-Chair, Secretary, and Deputy Treasurer!

** We are the Party of People, Planet, and Peace!
------------------------------------------------------------
The need for an independent left party is clear. We are an ecosocialist peace party who fight for social, economic, and environmental justice. Come to our meetings and events to meet us and get involved!
The Greater New Haven Green Party is a chapter
of the Green Party of Connecticut!

Find our chapterBylaws
HERE (https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1RdZ-DjmwN76_XrktMoS83csmQ4zukzDZ?usp=share_link) .
Read minutes of our past meetings HERE (https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1QeCwDL4ybnWA2GIhE2ka7_6s2PFjsYo-?usp=sharing) .

============================================================
Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can ** update your preferences (https://justin4all.us10.list-manage.com/profile?u=9d3bf03d4d24177d79cb656ca&id=18b5d036be&e=91a3f04de5&c=86baf9eb93)
or ** unsubscribe from this list (https://justin4all.us10.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=9d3bf03d4d24177d79cb656ca&id=18b5d036be&e=91a3f04de5&c=86baf9eb93)
.

name: URD
subject: Small towns deserve better
disclaimer_text: Paid for by United Rural Democrats](https://click
body:
Peter, Carrollton needs your help. | | | Hi Peter – Carrollton is a small town in Missouri on the outskirts of the Missouri River. Here, community members are close-knit and the population sits at just under 4,000. Carrollton is known for the best road-side burgers and farmland, but in recent years, it's been a hotspot for debate and hardship. The small town is known as the "Cannabis capital of Missouri" and has also struggled with increased flooding from the Missouri River. What was once a small, quiet town has faced unprecedented upheaval. **In Missouri, small towns like Carrollton are also facing upheaval brought on by the Missouri Republican Party and their GOP representatives.** Missourians are facing Republican-led efforts to decrease support for public libraries, abortion rights, and democracy. These outsiders and right-wing politicians don't care about small towns like Carrollton. They aren't fighting to make sure that residents and families in Carrollton have access to affordable healthcare and quality education. **_[URD is proud to have endorsed Democratic candidates like Lucas Kunce who are running against the GOP in Missouri. Will you chip in to make sure we can continue supporting candidates who will fight for small towns like Carrollton?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xNG6r6b6yi4Uz9vCRXD2GcpuMPVlA77sBahcOuFUibQnBqA2alywouJpfBBAnesodvuwqrbhKeCoV3BfW9J9Md9ygRqBwyYZBbNEHMJ4rnbgIDHyzz-qJWvGzUV93HYO_mTYqg7imiQLizDL-9vu7z-9IqnGGM3IDmGoaVrn-pFjK04qx-egIsYIoLJBkaUWONcydAeDiDbj3J5QsqzCoqGMK_NkZVqdcDwOEWZg9JuRV4yXQXqbVYjmmhqDoiYBNQpQmLZf2X-YLXvasyvzQc4wSElxiPa9_ZVW_DuXm_Sz9AH8ucmPggYqCQDgvfy_6qlZXru-aXtSe-WY9BxWi9/3vo/eAcMpwQYSwuwpNj8w0MjHw/h0/CtUvmpYEsREJwYtBi5xx3_3F54jTdf1kLJqpWPlR1WE)_** **[CHIP IN HERE](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xNG6r6b6yi4Uz9vCRXD2GcpuMPVlA77sBahcOuFUibQuuY92OwhHMbvQ1oPdMSl-0opjcaaVQJX7ytmE14DmKoAPSpvh_F2JrgCu-9wpCTwSNhDvBLx14MlWxPqdwO1Hw2ekmXWEb9PGgjX-peayBlkKz8tuA7oamUCiDMxDuWjInde_ijrxeBbBb6ts7g36le9BHBIC5MDNVN2FxAStWkY-2jekr_MkrJCHRJx-2Sm63nXDvJtZ_UGpXThuOqNuggIt0LopO8Ziogih8bFeU35T7s1tpghlHiei8mUdSDBhdocelcHvg38jnsVm7WGQQikuvM1kQnWRuL_zAQZ3nJ/3vo/eAcMpwQYSwuwpNj8w0MjHw/h1/j8zSEqXuB1jgQKSvlHJev7iCHv0J3BDVuzrLq7s7GKY)** Thank you for your support, Peter. – URD HQ

We need all hands on deck NOW. = | | = Thanks. – Carville \---------- Forwarded message ---------- From: James Carville Date: Tue, Apr 25, 2023 Subject: It's go time! Friend, the race for the White House is officially on, and it's likely to be a 2020 rematch. In case you missed it, Trump has already raised over $18 MILLION to support his campaign. Now that he's facing criminal charges, we know he and his MAGA minions will work even harder to get him back into power so he can avoid accountability. It's simple, friend: Joe Biden is the president we need and deserve, but we're going to have to fight like hell to make sure he stays in office. And for that, we need ALL HANDS ON DECK. | | Thank you, Tucker. My name’s Ryan Girdusky. In May of 2021 I founded the 1776 Project PAC to take back our schools by replacing leftist school board members with brave conservatives. **[Tucker Carlson heard about my plan and had me on this show.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zqdh73trgmpdc30v55s4ntt25c2r0ume4jcnt5ro_rp22sh2s8i66o72clh61ob6cjh2bs)** IMMEDIATELY, we had a FLOOD of thousands of brave patriots flocking to support our mission. There’s no doubt in my mind that if Tucker didn’t give me a chance to come on his show- we wouldn’t have achieved half as much as we did. _**[Will you join us in thanking Tucker Carlson for his bravery, and for being a historic champion of the conservative movement?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zd655honreg2g6fctfsc95elq75s3414eicihek8_rp22sh2s8i66o72clh61ob6cjh2bs)**_

name: Bob Lorinser
subject: Gun Violence
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE FRIENDS OF DR
body:
Bob Lorinser Running for Congress in the Rural Heartland to End Gun Violence in America
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/friends-of-dr-bob-1 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/friends-of-dr-bob-1]

Living in a rural Congressional district, we're often told that firearms are essential to our 'culture.' Well, so is the safety of our children.
While I agree with and support safe ownership of firearms for sport, hunting, and sometimes protection, folks in rural America need to be mindful that the proliferation of gun violence in America is a national public health crisis.
We need to act, and there are resolutions on which we all can agree. I'm running for Congress and seeking founding donors of my campaign to end gun violence in America.
, can you contribute right now [http://bit.ly/FundDrBob] to my campaign for Congress so I can advocate for gun reform?
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately.
CONTRIBUTE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/friends-of-dr-bob-1?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=express_lane_25]
CONTRIBUTE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/friends-of-dr-bob-1?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=express_lane_50]
CONTRIBUTE $75 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/friends-of-dr-bob-1?express_lane=true&amount=75&refcode=express_lane_75]
ANOTHER AMOUNT [bit.ly/FundDrBob]
In the rural heartland, firearms can be tools, but gun violence is also the leading cause of death for children in the United States. We need to do something and the best arguments for common sense firearm reform come from districts like ours.
I'm a Democrat — a blue dot in a red sea — making waves by running for Congress to flip a seat held by a MAGA extremist Republican who recently proudly stated he isn't willing to do his job [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jbonshootings] to stop mass shootings.
"Bad guys don't care about laws," said Rep. Jack Bergman. "Bad guys don't care about rules. So we can add laws, rules, and restrictions all day long, but the bad people don't."
I shudder to think of his defeatist attitude applied to other criminal behavior. Should we not have drunk driving laws and rules because drunk drivers "don't care"?
Should we not license drivers, register vehicles, wear seatbelts, or regulate the auto industry because drunk drivers "don't care"?
The implication is that criminal legislation doesn't work, so we should throw all efforts to the wayside. The logic against the rule of law is absurd.
I need your help getting Congress [bit.ly/FundDrBob] to advocate for universal background checks, federal research, safe storage, extreme risk protection laws, high-capacity firearm regulation, closing gun show loopholes, waiting periods, and mental healthcare investments.
I'm a family doctor and a public health professional. With gun violence and healthcare being two of the top issues in America, we need a doctor in the House to solve problems with healing policy.
, will you please you stand in my corner today?
ABOUT ME [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/friends-of-dr-bob-1]
WHY IM RUNNING [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/whydrbob]
MY POSITION ON GUN VIOLENCE [https://www.votedrbob.com/search?q=gun]
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/92793/images/1629770877521_regional_screenshot.png]
PAID FOR BY THE FRIENDS OF DR. BOB LORINSER
FRIENDS OF DR. BOB
PO BOX 936
Marquette, MI 49855
United States

subject: We’ve uncovered George Soros’ secret plan…
body:
George Soros is heading to Virginia, and we’re following him there... | | | Peter, In 2019, _[**liberal billionaire George Soros**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=a4c5c6cb964c40779a17df75420a1dc6&_e=KTqoMNHjPzZ4xqyY_gLRcIxUNH_fDxgnJUwSAZFz9FB_8wcUpck3i0ITgzTImUE_vpga5UCaKOU4-pBG6yD8BDfgaJVT6gFctKYhDMrMuQOKOLogNgLnoyF6UasrAGGJ6f64FlzIPGOPdnGkGmxtvrlCLezP5Y2a69avxvwLzCdXsNW-MFp-Zo6Dg5k8InmIw7LY-QAW45EFSZl9jz-1n18j3oJWnwJAG17SWDqJzv8n1c_PB2ohQDWTuOXAivlJlgLNrz08T0Ekf7auKk0GkyReZwS9-kyaKXTqXVo_0QkNHGm5GpPWNr4huhL2AIJ5_fvYWHKbTfX4jbrmljqRIexoSTp9eXsMNs-iCf38ZcrTISsP5E5sJjaUpI5FgNokbbPS_vFAb9zHgMxkIkfaSmkTE97SYEIHrnvg_A8fOj4%3D)_ spent nearly $2.1 million to capture three prosecutorial offices across Virginia. Since then, the three prosecutors he got elected have wreaked havoc on the state. Crime rates are surging, violent offenders are being let free, and families across Virginia constantly worry for their safety.
---
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=a4c5c6cb964c40779a17df75420a1dc6&_e=KTqoMNHjPzZ4xqyY_gLRcIxUNH_fDxgnJUwSAZFz9FB_8wcUpck3i0ITgzTImUE_vpga5UCaKOU4-pBG6yD8BDfgaJVT6gFctKYhDMrMuQOKOLogNgLnoyF6UasrAGGJ6f64FlzIPGOPdnGkGmxtvrlCLezP5Y2a69avxvwLzCdXsNW-MFp-Zo6Dg5k8InmIw7LY-QAW45EFSZl9jz-1n18j3oJWnwJAG17SWDqJzv8n1c_PB2ohQDWTuOXAivlJlgLNrz08T0Ekf7auKk0Gk-4_tX8qj6Cxn2c0d6s9vhbvKg6WBaT3jGwExXsCZHhdSC2mCtbuld9r3i9cI5-A8ouMoIp1lxKSchTgeKQnyFtjOqBYKTGKLQmLQP_qbM_HgzcqoGNEEwVK5TVr3H9W5C0ctN2pNMaBv5DRvY7CbZ8%3D)

| | This year, Virginians can elect new prosecutors who will restore law and order. There's only one problem... _[**George Soros plans to return to Virginia**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=a4c5c6cb964c40779a17df75420a1dc6&_e=KTqoMNHjPzZ4xqyY_gLRcIxUNH_fDxgnJUwSAZFz9FB_8wcUpck3i0ITgzTImUE_vpga5UCaKOU4-pBG6yD8BDfgaJVT6gFctKYhDMrMuQOKOLogNgLnoyF6UasrAGGJ6f64FlzIPGOPdnGkGmxtvrlCLezP5Y2a69avxvwLzCdXsNW-MFp-Zo6Dg5k8InmIw7LY-QAW45EFSZl9jz-1n18j3oJWnwJAG17SWDqJzv8n1c_PB2ohQDWTuOXAivlJlgLNrz08T0Ekf7auKk0Gk2mJBbXbdmySw4NwPukwny0fPwlrSKQSwCFd3DN_ViQKoIcqilc6UTEZidh-1Gx1jX7KCVcaKaGDQzRhMspUKNQr-ynHUZpHTe6J10mXBmm7_QJS9kFfnbErkK45lu41tQHo-dqwGK6Tfdn6bHbeN1o%3D)_**and leverage his mega millions to try and keep control of these offices. ** Here's what we know so far:
* Between the last election and the end of 2022, Soros moved more than $2.4 million into the Justice & Public Safety PAC, which donated millions of dollars to these wreckless prosecutors in 2019.
* The election season has barely even kicked off, and Soros has already funneled nearly $20,000 into these candidates' elections.

**But unlike 2019, he's going to have someone fighting back. Fair Courts America is taking on George Soros head-to-head and dollar-for-dollar.**
---
[**HELP US FIGHT BACK**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=a4c5c6cb964c40779a17df75420a1dc6&_e=KTqoMNHjPzZ4xqyY_gLRcIxUNH_fDxgnJUwSAZFz9FB_8wcUpck3i0ITgzTImUE_vpga5UCaKOU4-pBG6yD8BDfgaJVT6gFctKYhDMrMuQOKOLogNgLnoyF6UasrAGGJ6f64FlzIPGOPdnGkGmxtvrlCLezP5Y2a69avxvwLzCdXsNW-MFp-Zo6Dg5k8InmIw7LY-QAW45EFSZl9jz-1n18j3oJWnwJAG17SWDqJzv8n1c_PB2ohQDWTuOXAivlJlgLNrz08T0Ekf7auKk0GkzakQCg79UlGUkIWH7h7ntTNEnM9dxxSIIlZldeJSaCICQ1FmDYRTpmjF-W6WAiw5TgOcAk2xZyDz27Sc6OIq-u80F9iZ4dCMBwM7s4Q3l3H53fehdSzINf9hsGut-zO_X5ygF-OWZOQF1VlVDmmD60%3D)

clean_body: George Soros is heading to Virginia, and we’re following him there... | | | Peter, In 2019, spent nearly $2.1 million to capture three prosecutorial offices across Virginia. Since then, the three prosecutors he got elected have wreaked havoc on the state. Crime rates are surging, violent offenders are being let free, and families across Virginia constantly worry for their safety. | | This year, Virginians can elect new prosecutors who will restore law and order. There's only one problem... leverage his mega millions to try and keep control of these offices. Here's what we know so far: Between the last election and the end of 2022, Soros moved more than $2.4 million into the Justice & Public Safety PAC, which donated millions of dollars to these wreckless prosecutors in 2019. The election season has barely even kicked off, and Soros has already funneled nearly $20,000 into these candidates' elections. But unlike 2019, he's going to have someone fighting back. Fair Courts America is taking on George Soros head-to-head and dollar-for-dollar. As the nation's premier organization dedicated to upholding integrity in our justice system, Fair Courts America is ready to fight and win this battle. We will run ads, send mail, and do everything we can to warn Virginians about the dangers of Soros-funded prosecutors. But we can't do it without you! Anything you could give to our would leave a major impact. Thank you for your support. Every penny counts when fighting the liberal dark money machine. In Justice, Andrew WynneExecutive Director | Fair Courts America | | | | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | | .

How did our Editor do today? [ Drop us a line](mailto:editor@jointheflyover.com?subject=Feedback for The Flyover) and tell us exactly what you liked or didn't like in today's edition. ## President Joe Biden Ready for Round Two
President Joe Biden announced officially that he's [running for re-election](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskD1v8yAURn-NvRHB5csMDO-SLe_a0bqGS0KEjQW0Uf99lc4dn-csR-fjtt4wl3zc_-NOfqS6nq32lSsGhoFc9Rx9IgKSM3lhFtDgtOXzw1OyKIlUVAQYNxeT1nxTHDbigls3Zw8cJFdghJSgxEVa66JYlHMioSI3KU4xj9ouz5qP8aBUvusXtUuo-1z8Y4yzT_LfBNcJrnge9Opv9B5t5FBoguuzEttypINRoTByPRhwUOxs1N_3YJH2GhqOzkb73E_mggUhtNFm0Tri4lCJgEEm6xCN3ubm4_nKpeRu7KT4fcdcfpXGX31-AgAA__9ccmTb) in 2024, and Republicans immediately released an [AI-generated ad](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsj7FugzAUAL_G3oLs9wzGg4dKVaZSqVPVCRn8DG5NjMAJyd9X6dz1TjrpPru-czHFy_TuFrIl5H7d8t4LdYLmBNjX3NtABIScrGxaqMHUWvDZatPUCCN6p6kVKgxgQCo51MprGFrPowUBKBQ0EhGUrFBr42WrjJHBKTJMCfKx5K36zvFSZgrpkW-0VWNeeLJzKevO8IXBmcH5OI7qka_lOtDTP4kr48zwfGP4-vPWdfep3D_kF9-sX4-YUtwbzZSYFhfTX7L89_cbAAD__-Y8T08) showing the grim American future that would result from his re-election. Biden continues to be [viewed unfavorably](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsj71uKyEQRp8GurVg-DMFxW3c-bYpVwQGMxFeVixx5LeP7Drt9x3p6Hxc12ukRtvtf7xjmKWv--jHKvQCdgG1Gp5DQQRUHIO0ZzDgjRO8BoHJS22z1gINCANQXEFvnMkmeWs5BRCghAYrlQItT8o5n-VZey9L1OiZFphp9nH66rTNiqU9-wPHKfU7b6HOuR9M_WNwYXAp9MBZacwn0q3OF_NaMc7vgQeDyydl3JaB2DBN6tsCAvSSatzS--cj5P2HWqPDOqbF7R6pvVXzr-7fAAAA__8BblgV) by a majority of Americans, due at least partly to his age. Rep. Ronny Jackson, a former White House physician to several presidents, is circulating a letter in Congress demanding Biden [take a cognitive test](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LGSgyAQgOGn0Q4HF9RYUFyTLtde6RBY4uaQdYDEy9vf5Oqrv-af_-uyXCxFSrdPu6GpgZc9c1mkFjAKUMvQehMQAVWLph9PMMA8TLJdzXV0YQoWhkEFN_QqgPZa2xCuFkeUsiUDEpTUMPZKge47NU2z7096nvtgNc6Nluipcu7uTKmuGOKLn5g7x1sbzVrrXhr10cC5gfNxHF3gn4RHeXsD550jVXLljStVFCs_CgrPrnIWmVN6ibt134WTuJLHJBzfElV6oqhYqvCZd8GPKkCCFtk6bLPx-0ExUhmnRsvbZin-5dT_3vwGAAD__yuMZ34) or drop out of the 2024 race. Biden and his running mate Kamala Harris will be the first to campaign under a completely revised Democratic Party [primary calendar](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLHO4yAQhJ8Gd7ZgwWAKimvc5dorLQJLshE2Fkbx5e1_OfXfjEYzxYy-f7fl5inT9vjrV3QtlWWv5Vi46kH3IJexiy4hAsoOndATjGBHw7un48nz4EcvRi11FOqOJolgohDJQtRTRw44SK5ACylBiUEaY6OYlLUieYWWKY6RWqnDq9DWnpjyp7yxDqGsXXbP1vaDyT8MZgbzeZ7Du_y_OgbzXjI1CgeD-RphMKvLjpdIbcfJaAbzq2B_p4hbH3EtofpGod_KSptvVLZ-r7T6-ukxY_gGwEF11cX9pJzp0IYp_lg95e-l9hufnwAAAP__FVBjsA). For the first time in modern history, the long primary slog for Democrats will no longer start in Iowa and New Hampshire, while the GOP's will. [Experts are divided](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLHO4yAQhJ8Gd7ZgwWAKimvc5dorLQJLshE2Fkbx5e1_OfXfjEYzxYy-f7fl5inT9vjrV3QtlWWv5Vi46kH3IJexiy4hAsoOndATjGBHw7un48nz4EcvRi11FOqOJolgohDJQtRTRw44SK5ACylBiUEaY6OYlLUieYWWKY6RWqnDq9DWnpjyp7yxDqGsXXbP1vaDyT8MZgbzeZ7Du_y_OgbzXjI1CgeD-RphMKvLjpdIbcfJaAbzq2B_p4hbH3EtofpGod_KSptvVLZ-r7T6-ukxY_gGwEF11cX9pJzp0IYp_lg95e-l9hufnwAAAP__FVBjsA) on the ultimate impact of this for the parties.
## Depositors Flee First Republic Bank
First Republic Bank shares [plummeted](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLFutDAQhJ8GOiN7bTAUFH9Dd3-bEhm8HJszNvL6gvL20V3adKNvphh9H7f55ihQvP93B45lS_OZE8_SCOgE6Lmt_bghAuoaR9X10MLQWlnvo7XOml4ZAGVdh71uvbSr6yQYu6ztWtMIErQ00CmtwahGWzt41ZthUJszOFRGoqeScvOZKJYdt_CdvjA3azrqMO6lnFzpfxVMFUyHyw8s3CxPpojMFJn877aCKeLFFUxc0vp4hY0yF5HxfC6BVrG4-BDvUlAUW0bcXAjiorILJeXyoh7PxFT4TX12VxSOGYtgF5BFSOmgeBdKaoB2GKyp8-jPi0Ig7mxl5P1wFN7fy18ifwIAAP__eZp1lA) to a record low following its first-quarter earnings report, which showed that the bank lost $100 billion in deposits to customers withdrawing their money. The news spooked the stock market overall, which finished down for the day, and sparked fears in Washington that it could become the [third bank to fail](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskDGvozAQhH-N6RaZtQNxQZGG7t2rTleiBa-DD4OR7QTl35-4-lUjzeiTRt-fr_GLfPD78xdt3BcXxyPFPEoN2AKq8VbZ3jEjq4r7pr3jDc2tk9XS3xU7PSO2lifZTiR1pwxZQ8ZqzUZVvkeJSmpsG6VQN7XqOmObuzamcaTZCC3Z-hJT_Tf6vSzswie-OdVz3KrQL6UcWaiHwEHgcJ5nveX92gQOvMMrCxy2uPPnSkorl6txPuUCiY_XFPwMucR5hTlRXjhDiUAhQPEbQ4gnUIbJW94hOudnTyFfZEyFbfhAnhNtU-ALy_RmmGhfBQ6U4PFoaP39_V2l3h6nD8HnthNaPjfy4f__8pPMfwEAAP__4lR35A) this year. The bank announced that it would [cut up to 25 percent of staff](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LFuwyAUQNGvwRsWPLAxA0MXb-na0cLwiEmJQUBq9e-rdu58hyudj9t2szHF8_5un2h6yFupuW1MUpgpiG0avAmIgGJAw-cFJtCTYsNhFnALTBiccp5LhDAxvXO-aGtnL8EN0QADwSTMXAiQfBRKac8XqTUPVqImkqGPPdfxkePZDwzpO39hHV1-DskcvZdGxBuBlcB6XdfYwt12_M0E1o7uILDa2qNLSGANsbZOK5bXnqKjuz0_6SPv1L16o1xprqYFxnKUoRpfrphSbLMikt2fNqa_af9P4CcAAP__09tbYQ), slash executive pay and condense office space. It's also pursuing "strategic options," which could include extensive asset sales or another capital infusion.
## First Private Moon Lander Appears Lost
A Japanese lunar lander appears to [have crashed](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LFuwyAQgOGnsTciOMDAwNAlW7p2tC7hiEmxQUBTtU9ftXPnf_il7-2yXjDldNxfcSc_YllrK33lisHCQK56Dj4SAcmZvFgsaHDa8HnzAqK2Cm0Qyt6AuL4q48RVLDFYLayckwcOkitYhJSgxEka44KwyjkRUZGbFKeQRmmnR0nH2Cjmr_KkdrqVfc5-G6P2Sb5McJ7gfE_fewnlt01wfmDFo7Pa0hMHsQ3fP0ZhjWU8AjWGtRK2zm4N-0aB7aUcTFjNpZFG8rn5UD9TzqkvZlL8vmPKf9fxH8FPAAAA___a8VuU) while attempting to land on the moon. The mission, by Japan's ispace, would have marked the first successful moon landing by a private company. The ispace lander was just moments away from touchdown on the moon when the company lost communication with the vehicle, [l](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskD1v8yAURn8N3ojg8uF4YHgXtrxrR4vgS0yLuZahifLvK3fu-OgZztH5uM23kEuuj_9hQ9cTzftBbRaag-WgZjMsLiECqgGdtFcwMJlRDKuTwRpzBZlsjGjuSZl4N1EYCPa-pJCG7ECAEhqsVAq0vKhxnBZ51dMkU9A4MS1wyZ2Oyyfl2ldM5U1PPC6RtqG4tfe9MfWPgWfgS2hPfITWvuv5M_AVX42BPyEMfNiPcxgGvtPXm3ikbQ_1zQs1bDxS7SF2_sp95RtR5SXUBQ-eKy-ZgR8Ot-yvXEpudmRaPLaQy69J_yvLTwAAAP__98hjLQ)iterally [in the last 33 feet](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL1uxCAQhJ8Gd1h4wX8FxTXuLm1Ki4O1TQ6zFpBYfvvIqVONRqORPn2fz_lpfPBx_TA76rLQfCTKs1AcOg5ybiunF0RAWaFuugFaGNteVJsWzr6axajBNHIU8HK269t-EP2rG40yWHkNAqRQ0DVSgmpq2fejawY1jvcPR6YEOl8o1V_kY9lwCRf9YKot7VXQWylHZvLBYGIwnedZ7zneG4MJI__ODKaI5x0F7RYp0Hrdhd4XcUv7YeLFA2XM3FIsxhZ--rLxnSjyYKLDxH3kwb8xXNwmkzcGk0n88WiMX-27Stodpw_B565nSqy78eGPrvyn6jcAAP__df5rkA) when the lander was going 16 mph. There's no certainty yet about what happened, but the company already has a second moonshot in the works for next year.
➤ **Hunter Biden** has been ordered to appear in an Arkansas court over child-support issues, after ducking all involvement since the case began. The judge's order comes as Biden's lawyers meet separately with US attorneys on four tax- and gun-related charges. Today we're covering Tucker Carlson’s departure from Fox News, a new home for Aaron Rodgers, and riot police in Montana’s state house. Want to hear more news? and stay in touch. | President Joe Biden Ready for Round Two President Joe Biden announced officially that he's in 2024, and Republicans immediately released an showing the grim American future that would result from his re-election. Biden continues to be by a majority of Americans, due at least partly to his age. Rep. Ronny Jackson, a former White House physician to several presidents, is circulating a letter in Congress demanding Biden or drop out of the 2024 race. Biden and his running mate Kamala Harris will be the first to campaign under a completely revised Democratic Party . For the first time in modern history, the long primary slog for Democrats will no longer start in Iowa and New Hampshire, while the GOP's will. on the ultimate impact of this for the parties. Depositors Flee First Republic Bank First Republic Bank shares to a record low following its first-quarter earnings report, which showed that the bank lost $100 billion in deposits to customers withdrawing their money. The news spooked the stock market overall, which finished down for the day, and sparked fears in Washington that it could become the this year. The bank announced that it would , slash executive pay and condense office space. It's also pursuing "strategic options," which could include extensive asset sales or another capital infusion. First Private Moon Lander Appears Lost A Japanese lunar lander appears to while attempting to land on the moon. The mission, by Japan's ispace, would have marked the first successful moon landing by a private company. The ispace lander was just moments away from touchdown on the moon when the company lost communication with the vehicle, when the lander was going 16 mph. There's no certainty yet about what happened, but the company already has a second moonshot in the works for next year. ➤ Hunter Biden has been ordered to appear in an Arkansas court over child-support issues, after ducking all involvement since the case began. Fellow American,

Joe Biden officially announced that he's running for president.

He's not *really* running - it's just the managerial class using Joe Biden as a front to advance its own agenda. **To them Biden's cognitive impairment isn't a bug._It's a feature._ **

The administrative state more effectively controls its puppets when they are hollowed-out husks of themselves. The fact that it's elder abuse is just a cost of doing business for Biden's handlers. It's revealing that the DNC refuses to host primary debates this year; they're spitting in the face of their grassroots base.

Fellow American, that's why it's so important to me that, on the Republican side, we have a robust primary - one where we can actually debate the *real* issues Americans face every day.

But to have a primetime spot on the debate stage in August, I need your help. **GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[ ** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=68c698ff27ec4cb0968b1045b5afa35e&_e=G-YU02_aNIuncMAm4_UICtNAmGk8NrQtkQKlG32VOyge83pIPNaMqXezTZWG3z4G2keWt-1Q-YqmJ2HdNcZY1zfGSHgKxUot3TCba2GY8bhNd4N-e66WxMcD4_ozJtFx1qft6Cm9D0dbs3zDqsiXZF7MLziyJ-0P2_JrKozFjYPun3GQM49ehtvIlev0br_YV9OsWzNAtQjonTljVKXyyuGaIWXClKmzQUF-whtYLUDC4ZU6_r7jOj-VWkStsekZAwFGQ6Bi0mt3ddgvSByI50LymnT0W6YyD6bEqFa7AAwVHQ4n_LWaNBxpOcaIL0j-JXjdUyLrL0EsqtnsFTaGQCPvIHUiu-HjzSYSf8U4YqUpHaGT4EMA-k5qvBjxus-Ge_UbYmU3Snc6Zf1O_OW3RQ%3D%3D)

body:
I need you to stand with me

|
---
| | | |
---

Hi Friend,

This is All-American swimmer Riley Gaines reaching out.

---
| [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c18061%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=a%2bmu7k89v3MHyGB7m6fjgw&sysid=1)
---

**KEEP MEN OUT OF GIRLS’ SPORTS**
---
| | | [SIGN THE PETITION ](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c18062%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ZyR1o1NXl7iKCBwpyI0tsg&sysid=1 "Generic Button")
---
I need your help to fight the Radical Left’s attack on girls’ sports. Young women everywhere deserve the chance to compete on **fair** and **equal** terms, without men dressed up as women on the field with them.

Most people rightfully consider this common sense, but clearly the Left doesn't have that.

Matter of fact, EVERY Democrat in the House just voted AGAINST keeping men out of girls’ sports. **This has gone too far.**
**STAND WITH RILEY:**
---
| | | [SIGN THE PETITION ](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c18062%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ZyR1o1NXl7iKCBwpyI0tsg&sysid=1 "Generic Button")
---
Men in the women’s locker room? Hell no.

**[It’s up to men and women like us to stand up for girls’ sports before it’s too late. The Left has no plans to stop forcing transgender ideology on America, and we need to resist this nonsense at every turn. Please, don’t be on the wrong side of history. Sign my petition TODAY!](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c18063%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=xjFmD9%2fUpjrDfgUb5CFLZw&sysid=1 "It’s up to men and women
like us to stand up for girls’ sports before it’s too late. The Left has no plans
to stop forcing transgender ideology on America, and we need to resist this
nonsense at every turn. Please, don’t be on the wrong side of history. Sign my
petition TODAY!")**
---
| | | [SIGN MY PETITION ](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c18064%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=NQqGi1hjWjttwXGR4OgEsg&sysid=1 "Generic Button")
---
Thank you,

Riley Gaines

body:
Vice President Kamala Harris says that “we have a secure border.” But this is a lie.
[Unsubscribe](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_s=32a7132d94af4bd0aa5e62fa832d95f7&_t=HFCyxvCZ10zhB3eU_em5Ya6Hkkm6hUfEw-ydYH0ZpmqI3V-_qiEoe5tX24KTR7CdpQfHJbouchglT0cMgS8Qk1b-f4viO0boMzSs-34IeTg%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_s=32a7132d94af4bd0aa5e62fa832d95f7&_t=HFCyxvCZ10zhB3eU_em5Ya6Hkkm6hUfEw-ydYH0ZpmqI3V-_qiEoe5tX24KTR7CdpQfHJbouchglT0cMgS8Qk1b-f4viO0boMzSs-34IeTg%3D)

|
Fellow Conservative,

We emailed last week and the response was tepid, at best. If we’re going to secure our southern border and stop Mexican drug cartels from, **we're going to need your input.**

**Homeland Security Secretary Alejandro Mayorkas says** that our “ _border is secure_.”

**White House Press Secretary Karine Jean Pierre says** that “ _we are securing the border_.”

**Vice President Kamala Harris says** that “ _we have a secure border_.”

**But these are all lies.** There have been 1,029,953 border encounters in fiscal year 2023 so far; in 2022, there were 2,378,944!

**OFFICIAL 2023 BORDER SECURITY QUESTIONNAIRE**

**PREPARED FOR:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**RESPONSE** : **PENDING**

[**IS OUR BORDER SECURE?
SUBMIT YOUR QUESTIONNAIRE TODAY-> **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=32a7132d94af4bd0aa5e62fa832d95f7&_e=Ea3JEy08LpFt86HNpFJBYy9R7wJI2AMMT5LRAmj3RImui72d6eo-ic_MWQmiHx7U98X1ffjMJLR6tfepahi9mqUNZijtWaSO0XOfegw7yRggxonxvEAGr39ZAp4lFUug5_3s61n8mrrwWAwq9Eus11UiL7wUe3_hOhnVXWqmniS1xWSOg7RHLxUgMdudEz8grWd4HVKzK_xsQaqZ5tbPENIJdU8grBUF4Q8sTpy7hgoaGb_sKqRE2w3LFVHx-0Su6LWGi98uhoBgRjiILtHeOlQxROklxYyCxzsTOYG0rP0JHYikSTpDAx1aly4eD6_j8KlsvIhzWHr2XaLYx_lafM28plTOsSgNE3NwvXQRXyMFq7pBrO7Q6FqzsijC6Ra5tl1ghkQgwF268g-IwEV_4y0je7ZHs4ei6nmzSX0Wsu2MWq57_q22TnwJRaJMFJ9f5Q3gX6SvOIiWQmQ-_l5YsL98Ru0u__KZ3hD3o-HrjFQYm0F5T0jzle9_OOK-RrrlZvu2IChPtR-n_-DmbfXszlxmRrGKVQIVcW3f42I17jrYJXd7PnjvImLy7wtrFSISPSgxvg6u3hIypNVXFvfUjA%3D%3D)

My team and I are reaching out to concerned Americans because **the only way to defeat Democrats and remove them from positions of power is at the ballot box**. When the president of the United States is more concerned about visiting Ireland than he is about visiting the southern border, you know we have a problem.

Let me be clear - **[your input is needed by our campaign right now](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=32a7132d94af4bd0aa5e62fa832d95f7&_e=Ea3JEy08LpFt86HNpFJBYy9R7wJI2AMMT5LRAmj3RImui72d6eo-ic_MWQmiHx7U98X1ffjMJLR6tfepahi9mqUNZijtWaSO0XOfegw7yRggxonxvEAGr39ZAp4lFUug5_3s61n8mrrwWAwq9Eus11UiL7wUe3_hOhnVXWqmniS1xWSOg7RHLxUgMdudEz8grWd4HVKzK_xsQaqZ5tbPENIJdU8grBUF4Q8sTpy7hgoaGb_sKqRE2w3LFVHx-0Su6LWGi98uhoBgRjiILtHeOlQxROklxYyCxzsTOYG0rP0JHYikSTpDAx1aly4eD6_j8KlsvIhzWHr2XaLYx_lafM28plTOsSgNE3NwvXQRXyMFq7pBrO7Q6FqzsijC6Ra5tl1ghkQgwF268g-IwEV_4y0je7ZHs4ei6nmzSX0Wsu3rwvUwSi2ZgPhp8vZRL9JJZEa1SrR8yr9o6kfezliAOhkSG0vdcYiJwIu2-J7-6GEojw7DdzKCGbEqEQa9FTCak0JNrUTM70zrfNVJ75Z3vtPGjvz5PWMd_QK8_mXFX_7BcYM614Lun9Ixm5gGvEpkrzHFXuL19WBs_8eMg_RgsQ%3D%3D)**. Having just launched my Senate race earlier this month, I’m counting on conservatives like you to help fill me in on where you stand pertaining to the border crisis.

Please complete your **[OFFICIAL 2023 BORDER SECURITY QUESTIONNAIRE by midnight tonight](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=32a7132d94af4bd0aa5e62fa832d95f7&_e=Ea3JEy08LpFt86HNpFJBYy9R7wJI2AMMT5LRAmj3RImui72d6eo-ic_MWQmiHx7U98X1ffjMJLR6tfepahi9mqUNZijtWaSO0XOfegw7yRggxonxvEAGr39ZAp4lFUug5_3s61n8mrrwWAwq9Eus11UiL7wUe3_hOhnVXWqmniS1xWSOg7RHLxUgMdudEz8grWd4HVKzK_xsQaqZ5tbPENIJdU8grBUF4Q8sTpy7hgoaGb_sKqRE2w3LFVHx-0Su6LWGi98uhoBgRjiILtHeOlQxROklxYyCxzsTOYG0rP0JHYikSTpDAx1aly4eD6_j8KlsvIhzWHr2XaLYx_lafM28plTOsSgNE3NwvXQRXyMFq7pBrO7Q6FqzsijC6Ra5tl1ghkQgwF268g-IwEV_4y0je7ZHs4ei6nmzSX0Wsu2BM_EixHlMPGNKEk9KvN33suCb7U-rUSiAexc19SYkeV-FP12RpFBOdITfDSXJ_tQ69gmDSLAgOj2b-TJzSoFN9gN1yLbTKi8W9TVeHk4DMphmuWCJbXCVAUBkEqkiUXSLC-1r2APmX4Xv1-zdQ5ZjFT2Di_O18UK0Ia6KOqEuoA%3D%3D)**.
**

clean_body: Vice President Kamala Harris says that “we have a secure border.” But this is a lie. | | Fellow Conservative, We emailed last week and the response was tepid, at best. If we’re going to secure our southern border and stop Mexican drug cartels from, we're going to need your input. Homeland Security Secretary Alejandro Mayorkas says that our “ border is secure.” White House Press Secretary Karine Jean Pierre says that “ we are securing the border.” Vice President Kamala Harris says that “ we have a secure border.” But these are all lies. There have been 1,029,953 border encounters in fiscal year 2023 so far; in 2022, there were 2,378,944! When the president of the United States is more concerned about visiting Ireland than he is about visiting the southern border, you know we have a problem. Let me be clear - . name: Candace Owens, Chair of BLEXIT at TPUSA
subject: Counting on you
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vsC0ELWDON

BLEXIT -- the nonprofit I founded to free minorities from the
Left's victimhood mentality, or "plantation of the mind" -- is
joining Turning Point USA

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osC0ELWDON

Fellow
American,

Candace
Owens here - and I've got exciting news.

BLEXIT --
the nonprofit I founded to free minorities from the Left's
victimhood mentality, or "plantation of the mind" -- is joining
Turning Point USA!

Alongside
my friend Charlie Kirk, the Turning Point USA team, and
grassroots patriots like you, I am ready to:

Defeat
toxic and racist Leftist ideologies like Critical Race Theory -
getting them out of our kids' classrooms forever,

Free
black Americans and all minorities from the tyranny of the Left's
victimhood mentality and inspire them to pursue their American
Dreams, and

Win
against the radical Left as Turning Point USA goes toe-to-toe
with fake news media, toxic pop culture, biased "educators," Big
Tech, and more!

To
accomplish these massive - and important goals - I must raise
$100,000 as soon as possible. Can I count on your support of $25,
$50, $75, $100, $250, $500, or more right now?

Stand
with Candace and Turning Point USA

When the
BLEXIT team and I decided that it was time for us to offer even
more life-changing programs … expose even more of the
Left's toxic and racist lies … and reach even more
minorities with our inspiring message about the American Dream, I
thought of my friend Charlie Kirk and Turning Point USA right
away.

That's
because, in the fight to save America from the Left, Turning
Point USA is the real deal - organizing 600,000+ student
activists to FIGHT and WIN today's Culture War.

But to
hit the ground running in this exciting new partnership, I must
raise $100,000 as soon as possible.

Will you
stand alongside me, my friend Charlie Kirk, Turning Point USA,
and TPUSA's BLEXIT programs by making your gift of $25, $50, $75,
$100, $250, $500, or more right now?

Stand
with Candace and Turning Point USA

In 2018,
I founded BLEXIT to inspire Black Americans to turn away from the
victimhood mentality and to reject the Left's new "plantation" of
the mind.

Now, in
2023, I'm proud to have BLEXIT work alongside Turning Point USA
to expose even more of the Left's toxic and racist lies and reach
even more Americans with TPUSA's inspiring, pro-America message -
that teaches every American to love our country again, work hard,
and pursue their American Dream!

Today I'm
counting on your help to hit the ground running. Will you please
make your most generous gift of $25, $50, $75, $100, $250, $500,
or more today to help me reach our critical $100,000 goal?

Stand
with Candace and Turning Point USA

Working
together with Turning Point USA, BLEXIT will inspire MILLIONS
more young people from all backgrounds to escape the Left's
"Woke" dystopia and to love America once more.

If you're
with me, please make your gift right now.

Time is
running out -- I hope to hear from you today!

Candace
Owens
Chair of
BLEXIT
Turning
Point USA

Support
Turning Point USA

4940 East
Beverly Road
Phoenix,
Arizona 85044

name: Cherise Trump, Speech First
subject: Lawsuit filed against Texas State University
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.secureandprosper._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9U1BPMzgxMTIifQ/a2kAtwbMh0H4iY1aDFYcsQ)
---
Fellow American, We're suing Texas State University for its unconstitutional speech policies. The university has implemented policies that _restrict_ how _students can discuss politics or any of the societal issues_ of the day, which you and I know means conservative viewpoints will be silenced and those students who are brave enough to speak up will be punished. Students are afraid to invoke their constitutional right to speak out against issues such as abortion, illegal immigration, and gender identity- they fear disciplinary actions for broadly defined harassment policies. Our lawsuit against Texas State has significant implications for campus free speech protections, but we need your help! [**To stand up against the suppression of free speech by Texas State University - and help Speech First to PROTECT the First and Fourteenth Amendments and WIN this lawsuit - I need your emergency gift of $25, $35, $50, $100, $500, or more today.**](http://trk.secureandprosper._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9U1BPMzgxMTIifQ/MQTF6RNNRLtVsHo4eqpYtA)
---
[Help us WIN this FREE SPEECH lawsuit](http://trk.secureandprosper._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9U1BPMzgxMTIifQ/PviV4LkLZ9M-lPld61R1Rg)
---
Texas State's Discriminatory Harassment Policy and its Computer Policy are clearly designed to _deter_ student speech all together. These policies are designed to work in tandem to limit free expression and the exchange of viewpoints on campus. Institutions of higher education should _encourage_ the free exchange of ideas, intellectual exploration, and open discourse, but Texas State instead chose the inverse - forcing students to opt-out of classroom discussion for fear of the consequences. When universities deny constitutionally mandated rights to students, Speech First takes action to ensure the law is being upheld, and that ALL students share the same rights to speech. [**_Defending free speech is a costly endeavor,_ but it's one that we _cannot afford to ignore._ Our lawsuit against Texas State is vital to protecting First and Fourteenth Amendment rights, and I hope we can count on your support of $25 or more today.**](http://trk.secureandprosper._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9U1BPMzgxMTIifQ/6uknlILnPMn9CK9abNR50A) Speech First is no stranger to **suing institutions of higher education** and **WINNING**. **_We've successfully won lawsuits against the University of Central Florida, the University of Houston, the University of Michigan, the University of Texas, the University of Illinois, and Iowa State University._** Last summer, a federal judge found in favor of the conservative students we represented in their lawsuit against the University of Houston. The school had to end a vaguely worded and far-reaching harassment policy that stifled constitutional rights to free speech. Then, in the fall, we had another victory for free speech when a federal judge forced the University of Central Florida to end its "bias response team" on campus. This was a historic victory for our student plaintiffs. [**Speech First has a history of winning, and we will do everything in our power to achieve victory against Texas State University, but it takes critical resources to fight the higher education machine. Your gift today will allow us to keep fighting Texas State's oppressive speech policies!**](http://trk.secureandprosper._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9U1BPMzgxMTIifQ/-XEXd98d0c8zdF1poL7_xg) Colleges and universities across our nation are wrongly silencing conservative students- and your hard-earned tax dollars are helping to pay these schools as they do it. America's higher education system should teach our kids and grandkids - the next generation of business owners and civic leaders - to value free speech, discussion, and even disagreement and debate. Instead, these institutions are suppressing the speech of students who are brave and bold enough to stand up for the core American value of free speech. _Make no mistake, extremist campuses - including Texas State University - want to destroy the America you and I know and love. And they're starting with stifling the free speech rights of conservative students who are brave enough to speak out._ [**Please join us in fighting for the constitutional FREE SPEECH rights of students at Texas State, and ALL students across the nation, with your gift of $25, $35, $50, $100, or more.**](http://trk.secureandprosper._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9U1BPMzgxMTIifQ/vaFidXstytqiA2m_ouez-Q)

clean_body: | | Please see a special message from our sponsor. | | | | Fellow American, We're suing Texas State University for its unconstitutional speech policies. The university has implemented policies that restrict how students can discuss politics or any of the societal issues of the day, which you and I know means conservative viewpoints will be silenced and those students who are brave enough to speak up will be punished. Students are afraid to invoke their constitutional right to speak out against issues such as abortion, illegal immigration, and gender identity- they fear disciplinary actions for broadly defined harassment policies. Our lawsuit against Texas State has significant implications for campus free speech protections, but we need your help! Texas State's Discriminatory Harassment Policy and its Computer Policy are clearly designed to deter student speech all together. These policies are designed to work in tandem to limit free expression and the exchange of viewpoints on campus. Institutions of higher education should encourage the free exchange of ideas, intellectual exploration, and open discourse, but Texas State instead chose the inverse - forcing students to opt-out of classroom discussion for fear of the consequences. When universities deny constitutionally mandated rights to students, Speech First takes action to ensure the law is being upheld, and that ALL students share the same rights to speech. Speech First is no stranger to suing institutions of higher education and WINNING. We've successfully won lawsuits against the University of Central Florida, the University of Houston, the University of Michigan, the University of Texas, the University of Illinois, and Iowa State University. Last summer, a federal judge found in favor of the conservative students we represented in their lawsuit against the University of Houston. The school had to end a vaguely worded and far-reaching harassment policy that stifled constitutional rights to free speech. Then, in the fall, we had another victory for free speech when a federal judge forced the University of Central Florida to end its "bias response team" on campus. This was a historic victory for our student plaintiffs. Colleges and universities across our nation are wrongly silencing conservative students- and your hard-earned tax dollars are helping to pay these schools as they do it. America's higher education system should teach our kids and grandkids - the next generation of business owners and civic leaders - to value free speech, discussion, and even disagreement and debate. Instead, these institutions are suppressing the speech of students who are brave and bold enough to stand up for the core American value of free speech. Make no mistake, extremist campuses - including Texas State University - want to destroy the America you and I know and love. And they're starting with stifling the free speech rights of conservative students who are brave enough to speak out. Thank you for standing up for free speech! Cherise TrumpExecutive DirectorSpeech First 1300 I St NW Suite 400EWashington, DC 20005 Secure & Prosper PO Box 455 Leesburg, VA 20178If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us to unsubscribe.

name: Riley Gaines
subject: Men DO NOT belong in girls’ sports
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
I need you to stand with me

|
---
| | | |
---

Hi Friend,

This is All-American swimmer Riley Gaines reaching out.

---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zmvnm0iojkkq28gn5ij8cv24dlhmotrgd45ihn90_rp22sh2s8i66o72clj64o31c1h2bs)
---

**KEEP MEN OUT OF GIRLS ' SPORTS**
---
| | | [SIGN THE PETITION](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zkrmkepgj61gbe1j0shm5aa588bemq5ldp1u77l0_rp22sh2s8i66o72clj64o31c1h2bs "Generic Button")
---
I need your help to fight the Radical Left's attack on girls' sports. Young women everywhere deserve the chance to compete on **fair** and **equal** terms, without men dressed up as women on the field with them.

Most people rightfully consider this common sense, but clearly the Left doesn't have that.

Matter of fact, EVERY Democrat in the House just voted AGAINST keeping men out of girls' sports. **This has gone too far.**
**STAND WITH RILEY:**
---
| | | [SIGN THE PETITION](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z0rsnoq4idpptpvcl8ecekjhsp66ej9f32l39rig_rp22sh2s8i66o72clj64o31c1h2bs "Generic Button")
---
Men in the women's locker room? Hell no.

**[It's up to men and women like us to stand up for girls' sports before it's too late. The Left has no plans to stop forcing transgender ideology on America, and we need to resist this nonsense at every turn. Please, don't be on the wrong side of history. Sign my petition TODAY!](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z32vft9hkhimruugtqjkgrj93jpe431l217tnru0_rp22sh2s8i66o72clj64o31c1h2bs "It’s up to men and women like us to stand up for girls’ sports before it’s too late. The Left has no plans to stop forcing transgender ideology on America, and we need to resist this nonsense at every turn. Please, don’t be on the wrong side of history. Sign my petition TODAY!")**
---
| | | [SIGN MY PETITION](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zmrf8h9amguoe6ftt2qsg6h66q8l8c2pleags9sg_rp22sh2s8i66o72clj64o31c1h2bs "Generic Button")
---
Thank you,

Riley Gaines

---
| |

I took the debate straight to Don Lemon, and now he’s FIRED.

> _**FIRST:**_ I had to teach Don Lemon a history lesson when it comes to the Second Amendment and the rights of black citizens.
>
> _**THEN:**_ Don Lemon told me I couldn't speak the truth because I am not a black American. _**I reject that.**_
>
> _**NOW:**_ Don Lemon is OUT at CNN.
Fellow American, I am not afraid to bring the debate to anyone who is willing to talk about the important issues, but I won’t back down.

I am committed to bringing fresh, radical ideas to the table that will help put America back on track. But I can't do it without your support.

**[In the next 30 minutes, will you chip in $1 or more to make sure we can continue to take the debate to the Left?](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=e8c63b8983ef4754b37b44668e7f8ac1&_e=f0P3c75avChftHu7PPvlGXtHlPbL3SCe7L5HsaKr3Gg2MT75G2PxKVzk_wPzCZBdbsBN8VllKQzyLogqMwqypayF0xmwui5QudG4R4rDHnNi6-kP9piTr5dOVDfwHTAEUMg0naXYDC6AlcKAwEY_qM0yT7cSzgqqnhXfGMSxt9SYdfLEwO2BQSZvxF2eiEIvXJvYiW1XZZSQkWUM7eO8Ffv68Jq8ltjM4KRd-oKKCK-Z3T99Laf63wBZUpjnuCnDEtNDVXTP5NaJwVk78jP46C4DHMmrKUjoOg4eyVBpEqsQLfSwlP9dyYOcjCdchdtTQ0JBZBTki7SJSKY6JbkHh1UbU01HSB22Vx6EZBSuoywVhOw0LRapovx_VvwfE-JRF_eEiPUXaR9BcRCZ8TACvfR75mYjqm8UaahSkUSmmKs%3D)**

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for individuals whose contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle.

Team,
When right-wing special interests are working nonstop to restrict our right to vote, end our right to choose, make us less safe, it’s my job as the People’s Lawyer to have your back.
Doing this work has been the honor of my life, but it doesn’t come without its challenges – especially when those same interests have essentially endless sums of money to spend on attack ads against me.
It’s ok. I’m used to it. I’ve been a top target of the far right for decades, and my belief that true strength lies with people-power has only grown stronger over time. They might have the money, but we have the many.
That’s why I’m reaching out personally this morning. Our next end-of-month deadline is coming up on Sunday, and according to our records, we’re still missing your support this year.
The good news is that Minnesota’s Political Contribution Refund (PCR) program reset on January 1, which means you can make a contribution right now and get up to $50 (or $100 for couples) fully refunded.
[**Team, we still have a long way to go to reach our target and we’re running out of time. name: Team  Andy Kim
subject: Preserving America’s foundation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andy Kim for Congress
body:
Democracy is the very foundation of our nation. We, the people, decide who should lead. Our leaders don't draw their authority through force or birthright but by gaining the confidence of the nation.

But not everyone respects the will of the people.

Authoritarianism is on the rise, from the January 6 attacks to the recent expulsion of democratically elected representatives in Tennessee for exercising their right to free speech.

We must hold our leaders to a higher standard and demand that they not only protect our democracy but help it thrive.

Andy believes democracy is about representing people, which is why he doesn't take corporate PAC money and relies on the power of this grassroots movement. Can you donate now and support the fight for democracy before our end-of-month deadline? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-andy-kim?refcode=2023-04-26-eom-democracy&recurring=0&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=d6259a11-3de4-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73]

Andy maintains that democracy and our most fundamental American ideals are worth preserving, protecting, and holding up as a beacon to the world. He fights to make sure every voice is heard.

In Congress, Andy is committed to expanding voting rights and promoting greater access to the ballot box. He understands that for democracy to succeed, everyone must have an equal opportunity to participate.

And Andy is fighting for bold action to restore public trust and confidence in our elected officials by leading the charge to set one standard across all three branches of the federal government – including Congress, the President, Vice President, and the Supreme Court – to prohibit ownership of individual stocks. He knows that transparency, accountability, and trust are the keys to strengthening our democracy and Americans' trust in their representatives.

Leaders like Andy are our first line of defense. Will you donate before our end-of-the-month deadline and help power our grassroots movement for democracy? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-andy-kim?refcode=2023-04-26-eom-democracy&recurring=0&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=d6259a11-3de4-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73]

Together, we can create an America where democracy, civility, trust, and respect flourish.

Team Andy
