| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6c230481-613f-4a63-b395-2b81f5ecbdb0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: FOUR MORE YEARS?!
subject: This is news to us

| | Calling All Conservatives:Do you know an Independent, NPP, or Libertarian?
---
| |
---
| | |
---
| | We The People have chosen to register to other Parties such as an Independent, Libertarian, or NPP / No Party Preference, due to the complete disgust of the Republican In Name Only / RINO Party- aka Communists. I get it!But it has actually divided us at a time when we need to Unite to fight the Communist Take Over of our Country. I don’t have to tell you of the destruction at every level of our free society, including our own children. Just turn on the “news”.They have truly divided us all and that alone weakens us greatly! So, No! We must Unite Now and Fight Together as One People. It’s the only way we have a chance to take back our country. Re-Register as a Republican. Don’t worry about those Communist RINOs because we are taking back our Party too!Re-Register to vote in the upcoming Primaries, yes, but more importantly and long term, re-register to Unite We The People. We are all Conservatives and the ONE thing we must not do is be divided any longer! Re-register to Unite simply because we must to fight the Communists! Listen, bottom line is you’re a Republican because you’re a Conservative. Your conservatism comes from discernment which comes from Jesus Christ. Remember the book of Esther! The Time To Stand is Now, United, against the evil of Communism. Or else we lose this wondrous country we were blessed with, this great experiment called America! And we truly are the last stand against Globalism. This is the hill to die on. Re-register, then plan on running for your local Republican Central Committee to kick out the Communist RINOs. **Peter, this election cycle, reproductive freedom was on the ballot.**

And Americans in several states – from Kentucky to Vermont – resoundingly rejected the GOP’s attempts to take away our reproductive freedom. Peter, this is an incredibly powerful first step in our fight to protect reproductive rights after Roe v. Wade was overturned – but we cannot relent.

**[Peter, will you add your name now to my petition to protect reproductive rights? I need 371 more signatures before midnight tonight, and I’m still missing YOUR response. ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62347890/403146536/1753456815?code=jtk1059-su-nd&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2FLJ4NY23-repro-rights-0223&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYmJjMmRiMy00M2U0LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hxFoxEDaKcLo-snkosuqcCbGetg7c5I-t3kRMhSoXlM=&emci=8eaf42e5-9cdf-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=cbbc2db3-43e4-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=25369504)**

Now that Democrats have officially lost the House of Representatives, reproductive rights continue to be in a precarious position. **That’s why I’m calling on fearless fighters like you to step up now and join my fight to protect reproductive freedom.

Let me be clear:** I will not accept a future where Americans are denied access to essential health care products and services. Since the moment Roe v. Wade was struck down this past summer, I’ve fought tirelessly to make New York a safe haven for all those seeking reproductive care, and I’m proud to say that we’ve already made _real_ progress.

I’ve fought in court against state laws that outlaw abortion with no exceptions, convened a task force to assist reproductive health care providers and patients in this new legal landscape, and called for the creation of an abortion fund – all because I know that abortion access is a social justice issue.

**But, Peter, we can only win this fight for reproductive freedom if we _all_ work together. That’s why I set a goal to collect 5,000 signatures on my reproductive rights petition before midnight tonight — and I’m counting on you to step up now.

[Will you please take 30 seconds to add your name to my petition to protect reproductive rights? With the House now under Republican control, we cannot lose our momentum in this fight.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62347894/403146542/1753456815?code=jtk1059-su-nd&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2FLJ4NY23-repro-rights-0223&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYmJjMmRiMy00M2U0LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hxFoxEDaKcLo-snkosuqcCbGetg7c5I-t3kRMhSoXlM=&emci=8eaf42e5-9cdf-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=cbbc2db3-43e4-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=25369504)**

| | Here's how we fight back: [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62347770/403146233/541775293?sourceid=1049969&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MTVlMjQ5MC00M2U0LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6Nfk822ETiYR_dNuTTer0jsqhW7MVDmb9k6C-C-xW_c=&emci=2ca96ea4-42e4-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=815e2490-43e4-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934) It's been a bad month for abortion rights, Peter.

From coast to coast, the GOP is dead-set on restricting our autonomy over our own bodies — despite most Americans (including Republicans) being pro-choice. Though we knew what a post-_Roe v. Wade_ America could look like, it's still shocking to watch the rapid dissolution of our most basic human rights.

**[**I see one clear way to fight back, and that's to keep electing pro-choice Democrats at _every_ level of government — especially in state and local office, where so many of these life-or-death decisions are getting made. If you agree, please consider chipping in $7 to support Democratic pro-choice women candidates across the country.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62347787/403146254/541775293?sourceid=1049969&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MTVlMjQ5MC00M2U0LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6Nfk822ETiYR_dNuTTer0jsqhW7MVDmb9k6C-C-xW_c=&emci=2ca96ea4-42e4-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=815e2490-43e4-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934) Two weeks ago, **Florida** Governor Ron DeSantis signed into law what is effectively a**total abortion ban**. This is not only devastating for Floridians, but also for people in states with bans across the South, for whom Florida has offered some abortion access since the overturning of _Roe_.

New data out of **South Carolina** show that out-of-state patients account for **half of the abortions** in the state. That proportion will only continue to grow, likely overwhelming clinics, when Florida's six-week ban goes into effect.

Things will get even more dire in South Carolina when and if **North Carolina's** state legislature is successful in passing its own ban. That's right: although the Tar Heel State has a Democratic governor, Republicans in the state legislature now have a big enough majority to override the governor's veto, after a Democratic legislator recently switched parties. As of this week, Republicans are looking to introduce a **12-week abortion ban** , severely limiting access for North Carolinians.

And on the opposite side of the country, in **Idaho** , OBGYNs are **leaving the state** because of its draconian abortion laws. Just last month, a hospital in rural Idaho announced it was forced to _close its labor and delivery unit_ , forcing pregnant patients to travel 46 miles to the next-nearest hospital to give birth.

In a statement about the closure, the hospital cited abortion bans that **"criminalize physicians for medical care nationally recognized as the standard of care."**

While the GOP will claim these bans are about protecting women and strengthening families, we know the truth: Republicans want to control what people, especially women, do with our own bodies. ****So, how do we fight back? We keep electing Democratic pro-choice women who will protect and restore reproductive rights in every corner of the country. Donate now to join the fight:**

**[https://emilyslist.org/go/Help-Women-Win-April23](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62347791/403146257/541775293?sourceid=1049969&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MTVlMjQ5MC00M2U0LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6Nfk822ETiYR_dNuTTer0jsqhW7MVDmb9k6C-C-xW_c=&emci=2ca96ea4-42e4-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=815e2490-43e4-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934)**** Thank you,

Sarah Curmi (she/her/hers)
Vice President of State & Local Campaigns, EMILYs List

clean_body: | | | Here's how we fight back: It's been a bad month for abortion rights, Peter. From coast to coast, the GOP is dead-set on restricting our autonomy over our own bodies — despite most Americans (including Republicans) being pro-choice. Though we knew what a post-Roe v. Wade America could look like, it's still shocking to watch the rapid dissolution of our most basic human rights. Two weeks ago, Florida Governor Ron DeSantis signed into law what is effectively atotal abortion ban. This is not only devastating for Floridians, but also for people in states with bans across the South, for whom Florida has offered some abortion access since the overturning of Roe. New data out of South Carolina show that out-of-state patients account for half of the abortions in the state. That proportion will only continue to grow, likely overwhelming clinics, when Florida's six-week ban goes into effect. Things will get even more dire in South Carolina when and if North Carolina's state legislature is successful in passing its own ban. That's right: although the Tar Heel State has a Democratic governor, Republicans in the state legislature now have a big enough majority to override the governor's veto, after a Democratic legislator recently switched parties. As of this week, Republicans are looking to introduce a 12-week abortion ban , severely limiting access for North Carolinians. And on the opposite side of the country, in Idaho , OBGYNs are leaving the state because of its draconian abortion laws. Just last month, a hospital in rural Idaho announced it was forced to close its labor and delivery unit , forcing pregnant patients to travel 46 miles to the next-nearest hospital to give birth. In a statement about the closure, the hospital cited abortion bans that "criminalize physicians for medical care nationally recognized as the standard of care." While the GOP will claim these bans are about protecting women and strengthening families, we know the truth: Republicans want to control what people, especially women, do with our own bodies. So, how do we fight back? We keep electing Democratic pro-choice women who will protect and restore reproductive rights in every corner of the country. Donate now to join the fight: Thank you, Sarah Curmi (she/her/hers) Vice President of State & Local Campaigns, EMILYs List ****** | ---|---|--- EMILYs List is a community of over five million members that helps elect Democratic pro-choice women to office. | Paid for by EMILYs List and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. name: Kamala Harris
subject: We’re running:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
We are counting on your support once more. | | |
---
**It’s time, Peter. Joe Biden and I are officially running for reelection in 2024.** I’m so excited to get back on the campaign trail to make our case to the American people and I know that President Biden is too. Over the past two years we have accomplished so much together. As we kick this campaign into high gear, we need your support. Grassroots supporters like you were the backbone of our campaign to take back the White House in 2020. Your support has helped power all of the incredible progress we’ve made in the last few years. **Now, the president and I are asking for your support once more.** **[Will you make a $25 contribution to our reelection campaign today? Thanks to you and the 81 million Americans who voted for Joe Biden, we’ve helped create over 12 million jobs, lowered health care and prescription drug costs, and taken the largest action to fight climate change in the history of the United States.
But there is so much more to do, Peter.
Extremists are attempting to create division between us and are working to take away our fundamental rights.
**The right to have control over our own bodies and the right to cast a ballot in a free and fair election are all under threat.**
As vice president, I have the privilege and honor to travel across our nation to meet Americans from all walks of life working to make a difference.
And no matter where I am, I meet so many folks who are optimistic about what is possible when we work together. People who agree that we have so much more in common than what separates us.
**As Americans, we believe in freedom, liberty, and justice. And we believe that our democracy is only as strong as our willingness to fight for it. So today, I am asking you to join the president and me in the fight for the soul of this nation. It’s going to take all of us to build on the progress we’ve made and keep moving our country forward.**
**[You can use this link to donate to join our 2024 campaign today >>](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wQKWnG_Y5cKFA2Q0-EPQM0RIc-GdQphbrYjV13FegDtsyAcPERrinPXQAq-9D0C6__SW6guKyzJBi0B9rLmHdi_xeWbhwi4AZzhhlxaHNsuOE6hoF-NABJWeMLy4JjPlJicmTXa0h37BaJtTRSZ99DID8jm7k1sZ4egB7dO4c1H8hSIqXaNEFAuImn-8pTc3HNVlCDmj4hgI8ccqhF2D3yFSWBHGNy98b1LWXtOK0M-n9nif8Yh8IMiN9veEi3mtnsnuNg2mx-CWmWSK-erFNrrsEhuagyp0y_Cb3p5Ao5LmPZy_0e0tf12zG4d797t1a3A32VbTeIjYQwhbMGGaPO/3vo/SvnD9_dgR5qTdDQ1Qmm66Q/h7/gdsXP9M98d9s9Ies_POfWsnd5JJR9FWKQuFTzavcygQ)**
Thank you for all that you do for our country. I can’t wait to see you out there on the trail.
-Kamala

As Speaker of the House, it is my duty to defend our majority, expand our ranks, and deliver for YOU.

Truly, this isn't about me - it's about protecting my incumbents and boosting GOP momentum so we can best serve YOU.

People think that they need to write huge checks to make a difference, but that's simply not the case. House Republicans are powered by the $5, $8, or $25 donations of grassroots patriots like YOU.

Asking for money is my least favorite part of campaigning, but Hakeem Jeffries has racked up some serious cash that could devastate our ranks if we don't respond in kind.

Any contribution can make ALL the difference in setting the tone for this GOP Majority and what we can accomplish, but if everyone sits out, we're DONE.

---

As Speaker of the House, it is my duty to defend our majority, expand our ranks, and deliver for YOU.

Truly, this isn't about me - it's about protecting my incumbents and boosting GOP momentum so we can best serve YOU.

People think that they need to write huge checks to make a difference, but that's simply not the case. House Republicans are powered by the $5, $8, or $25 donations of grassroots patriots like YOU.

Asking for money is my least favorite part of campaigning, but Hakeem Jeffries has racked up some serious cash that could devastate our ranks if we don't respond in kind.

Any contribution can make ALL the difference in setting the tone for this GOP Majority and what we can accomplish, but if everyone sits out, we're DONE.

name: Daniel Cameron
subject: They're Coming After Our Kids!
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Cameron For Kentucky[
body:
| | | [](http://sendpatriot.campstrategic.com/go/1/5bcfc7c5c9bba8f816f79d307c796b93/40933/317a61880cdeba74/f93d21e1468aec85c3d6b838967d376c/40933)
---
| | Friends, They're coming after our kids! We learned during the pandemic the power that engaged parents and great teachers can have on a generation. I was and am humbled by the love and care my wife, Makenze, gives to her students in the classroom, like so many other great Kentucky teachers. And yet others put their extreme agenda first before our children. [_**We must put a stop to the bad actors and the politicians who stand by these repulsive policies!**_](http://sendpatriot.campstrategic.com/go/1/5bcfc7c5c9bba8f816f79d307c796b93/40933/317a61880cdeba74/a60d014bcb3e7552c3d6b838967d376c/40933) A teacher in Louisville is pushing for teachers to push gender fluidity studies and LGBTQ+ lessons into the classroom for students as young as 3 to 8 years old!! And yet Andy Beshear says that they are not sexualizing our youngest students in the schools but, [_**he is WRONG!**_](http://sendpatriot.campstrategic.com/go/1/5bcfc7c5c9bba8f816f79d307c796b93/40933/317a61880cdeba74/8a944f770e13aa2cc3d6b838967d376c/40933) It's happening in Louisville and who knows where else in Kentucky? [_**Read the article from the Louisville teacher preying on your kids here:**_](http://sendpatriot.campstrategic.com/go/1/5bcfc7c5c9bba8f816f79d307c796b93/40933/317a61880cdeba74/c1d0dd4d31074139c3d6b838967d376c/40933)
---
[](http://sendpatriot.campstrategic.com/go/1/5bcfc7c5c9bba8f816f79d307c796b93/40933/317a61880cdeba74/72a36ecd94855a3bc3d6b838967d376c/40933)
---

clean_body: | | | | | Friends, They're coming after our kids! We learned during the pandemic the power that engaged parents and great teachers can have on a generation. I was and am humbled by the love and care my wife, Makenze, gives to her students in the classroom, like so many other great Kentucky teachers. And yet others put their extreme agenda first before our children. A teacher in Louisville is pushing for teachers to push gender fluidity studies and LGBTQ+ lessons into the classroom for students as young as 3 to 8 years old!! And yet Andy Beshear says that they are not sexualizing our youngest students in the schools but, It's happening in Louisville and who knows where else in Kentucky? Andy Beshear is lying to parents, we must fight back! When I'm your Governor this will end. Parents will no longer have a Governor that lies to them about what our kids are being taught come November. We must step up to protect all of our Kentucky kids! We must fight back when bad actors demean an honorable and good profession. Enough is enough. For Kentucky, Daniel Cameron | | | | Paid For By Cameron For Kentucky

name: Josh Gottheimer
subject: A critical fix
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSH GOTTHEIMER FOR CONGRESS
body:
---
| | Hi there,

**Every day, tens of thousands of Americans are the victim of change of address fraud – and it’s increasing by more than double each year.**

But here’s the thing: There’s an easy fix. We should require a government ID to change an address, and add two-factor authentication to the process – the same standard of security required to open a bank account or a credit card.

That’s why I sent a bi-partisan letter to Postmaster General Louis DeJoy calling for more protections. This is a vital service that must be protected – and we know exactly how to do it.

[It’s time that the USPS starts taking change of address fraud seriously. Will you add your name to stand with me and demand action on behalf of the tens of thousands of Americans affected by this every year?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62349027/403151354/-1929506839?refcode2=7a085adf-46e4-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&source=EM_NBI_JG_20230426_PT_USPS_0_3MO_JoshGottheimer_NA_NA_ChangeOfAddressFraud&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDczNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YTA4NWFkZi00NmU0LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lAmnrVGOQ1goblTYX62GFuivvsbuOrkgOI_dFPb4kfc=&emci=76085adf-46e4-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=7a085adf-46e4-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=37438246)

clean_body: | | Hi there, Every day, tens of thousands of Americans are the victim of change of address fraud – and it’s increasing by more than double each year. But here’s the thing: There’s an easy fix. We should require a government ID to change an address, and add two-factor authentication to the process – the same standard of security required to open a bank account or a credit card. That’s why I sent a bi-partisan letter to Postmaster General Louis DeJoy calling for more protections. This is a vital service that must be protected – and we know exactly how to do it. | Jersey Families deserve to trust their post office and be safe from the con artists and scammers who take advantage of the weak points in the system. Thank you, Josh Gottheimer | Josh Gottheimer represents New Jersey’s Fifth Congressional District. Josh is in Congress to fight for lower taxes and Jersey Values. He’s working across the aisle to find real solutions for New Jersey families and is actively fighting against the ideological gridlock in Washington. If you'd like to support his campaign =, if you'd like to unsubscribe Thank you for being on Team Gottheimer. | | = | = | Prefer to donate by mail?** Make checks payable to Josh Gottheimer for Congress PO Box 584 Ridgewood, NJ 07451 PAID FOR BY JOSH GOTTHEIMER FOR CONGRESS Josh Gottheimer for Congress PO Box 584 Ridgewood, NJ 07451 United States

name: Sherrod Brown HQ
subject: Senate control could all come down to Ohio
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
Friend, we have a critical update on the state of our race, so we'll get right to it.
FIRST: Democrats lost our critical majority in the House – making the Senate our last line of defense on everything from reproductive freedom to voting rights.
THEN: Analysts at FiveThirtyEight confirmed that Mitch McConnell and the GOP have "a clear path" to retaking the Senate majority next year.
NOW: That path could run straight through Ohio, and national Republicans have already launched their first attack ad to defeat Sherrod and flip this seat red.
As the last remaining Democrat elected statewide here, Sherrod knows what it takes to win a tough race. But with the GOP coming after him as a TOP target, he simply cannot protect this seat without your immediate grassroots support.
So please, if you care about defending our Democratic Senate majority, will you split $15 or more between Sherrod Brown’s campaign and Serve America now – before our crucial midnight deadline – so we can surge ahead and win in battleground Ohio? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-sherrod]
Thank you,
Sherrod Brown HQ

name: Senator Scott
subject: Keep woke OUT of our military
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida
body:
| | | As a Navy veteran, I know that our military is the backbone of America.

Without the bravery and sacrifices of our troops, we wouldn’t be able to enjoy the freedom that too many take for granted.

But over the past few years, the radical Left has launched an all-out culture war on our armed forces, and we need your help to fight back.

The Left wants to replace military readiness training with critical race theory and woke gender ideology, and they’re already seeping their agenda into our service academies and military training facilities.

We CANNOT afford to let our military fall behind and fail to meet the challenges of rising powers like communist China. It’s time to take action to stand up for our forces, and that starts with you. Our military needs state-of-the-art weapons and cutting-edge technology, not pronoun lessons and revisionist history.

name: Lauren Underwood
subject: This isn’t my favorite thing
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Collective PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee

| | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe [click here.](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnl7NBjmTZL5F5oqdT0MFW4GJFfovgZaqyhL6oVedQTvxqf62j1-674ssdeYZmJRYBzWSHitiKSzbPsrpv-_hwFxmusDClMi_fBQryOBnrEe8YBv3IkS2fIUO5a_cwSAIaPR0HFOZlhcbXVU982T1JvbysHYkUYIiueyzH6mS0EbJMUleHXysX5nux6H8SUJ3CuVfiaAfCn-Ek5--HYN5bRMRZGUMtTU6f0nxfyC6katWRtq_lcAFZ8ZLc4x0IY-PwO83YFrP3NihwUI-xTHpjMGHGsNChW-zbY5E_9U_nwtA-1gkywTd7I-I9Jf94m01P9iw2BpgdRbsKNOJ0B7K2twSU_ZUVZ7roEH7hWopf7Wu9nxVWkOKz89MeKGSgQtUVstBpLP62FbLgzp0xNLx7f9Bbn9EjP8PtmO_oVLLHIFiA/3vo/DUufDM71S06zKG0DQTzynQ/h0/LAV6ibsIdDZG9GmPk0skUWQIAUNN_3R8zT9SXcPGphM) | | [](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953x8Bdi3DJx_tI_BkDTloM8oGXhyfWaSth866EHItgxB5TIL1XdepXEW5ic5GtvZwsHjNgy5WRlnTm_DjmGqPyg2l3BKiW0vaWdywVrtqo0i6R0YbBnTvtPa8xDd90KMioj0QETCmnIAlCyiSV7KvKB5kXsKDZk29D9MLk42erjo9Z02ZCSX2y_eTBgI1ooxi_olfuNXSsCeYUA0LS3tEfSg2Zae15COIZ-seqZlFV2lVgXE31Utu7d_D18NL8Qo_fvoIufnWrfxeYguYfVbfgo39S-M7McyX3zlQ95TCSZ4G5JWJ1qpv5ajpUYD2J35-1ebdZLBh3CkaHQovqxBLwLc0vACCn4ZYlH-0eBC4GhGszO2pRkAA38lmFhwbcnwjdXaN6sw-dnqVW5ssXzXkZ9JqQjuCSaK3AR9Jp5MoxMY9ol58Aff3llVYYUBAfmoisw/3vo/DUufDM71S06zKG0DQTzynQ/h1/lrbNSSUH40A00Ua9HRq5S_imwmMfqsm18VMmyIw1pGc) Hi Peter,

It’s not my favorite thing to ask for campaign donations. But your support powers our work to help, protect and improve our communities for ourselves, our neighbors and our loved ones. So I’m sharing a shortlist of our achievements below.

[If you’re in a hurry and want to support Collective PAC and my work for our communities, you can do that now by clicking here to split a contribution to fuel our efforts.](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953x8Bdi3DJx_tI_BkDTloM8oGXhyfWaSth866EHItgxB5TIL1XdepXEW5ic5GtvZwsHjNgy5WRlnTm_DjmGqPyg2l3BKiW0vaWdywVrtqo0i6R0YbBnTvtPa8xDd90KMioj0QETCmnIAlCyiSV7KvKB5kXsKDZk29D9MLk42erjo9Z02ZCSX2y_eTBgI1ooxi_rt4RDJ2d99o1hdQi2AvXbpBmsmrpoCnWQ_7So2MBGh4Dg4XmARmZDK8gOp3pdP3DQr7VgIOs9bRERndHyR5EJNRr5qgpJ1bI1xRBaiBBKS_4UPHz3SAPO5pu-300gmMxoB4DqrBXblGWCnxNLLTjB2ipL_NuEFoEdmZvNV4ltEUL4Ia9szgjCLiaIUXvKO_4Mj8ZuPD1OSRRrPucSxQSFFM0hI9HGOCSKJHmnLb4cDTOUkt7V_UZCHZSLnNGyf2Ng/3vo/DUufDM71S06zKG0DQTzynQ/h2/hxAVDqs21tQ6_Nyfsba9p84yDgiYeHTAaO2pBfZklnw) **_On health care:_** Our collective activism has dramatically helped strengthen and expand access to health care for all — including passage of our _Health Care Affordability Act_ , which delivered historic advances in affordability, coverage, and equity. The benefits of this bill will expire in 2025. **That's why I reintroduced the _Health Care Affordability Act_ to permanently lower the cost of health care premiums secured by our original bill.**

**_On reproductive care — which is also health care:_** I’ve always voted for legislation that provides women with access to the full spectrum of reproductive health care. Since the devastating Supreme Court ruling overturning _Roe_ last year, folks like you have remained steadfast partners in our work for reproductive freedom, advocating for the health and safety of women everywhere. I’m so proud to stand side-by-side with you in this fight.

**_On Black maternal health:_** We came together to support my _Black Maternal Health Momnibus Act_ , which I brought to Congress to save moms’ lives and end our country’s growing crisis of preventable pregnancy-related deaths among Black women. And we’ll continue our push to ensure we reverse the trend of rising maternal mortality and close racial and ethnic disparities in maternal health outcomes.

**_On voting rights:_** The right to vote is one of the fundamental building blocks of our democracy. At every turn, we’ve worked hard together to defend and expand voting rights despite fierce opposition from extreme anti-democratic lawmakers looking to destroy the foundation of our democracy. And _we won’t be stopped_.

**_On our planet:_** The climate crisis is an emergency that requires urgent and bold action. With your support, my Democratic colleagues and I will do everything we can to continue tackling climate change and investing in protecting and rebuilding our communities.

**_On the safety of our communities:_** We’ve never stopped pushing for Congress to enact life-saving changes to protect our loved ones from our country’s crushing gun-violence epidemic. _The Bipartisan Safer Communities Act_ passed last year was a good start, but **we must do more to address this crisis because everyone deserves to feel safe in their communities.** Peter, thank you for taking the time to read my email. It means a lot to have your support. Your grassroots dedication inspires me every day to continue the critical progress that our communities depend on.

[If you want to support our work and ensure we have the resources to continue making progress, please split a contribution between me and Collective PAC >>> ](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953x8Bdi3DJx_tI_BkDTloM8oGXhyfWaSth866EHItgxB5TIL1XdepXEW5ic5GtvZwsHjNgy5WRlnTm_DjmGqPyg2l3BKiW0vaWdywVrtqo0i6R0YbBnTvtPa8xDd90KMioj0QETCmnIAlCyiSV7KvKB5kXsKDZk29D9MLk42erjo9Z02ZCSX2y_eTBgI1ooxi_o93dNOxMCajRsQzyj5JjEe4vDJ04aXfriXmJJLVw4Z7onhRmZFhhpH4KtfcqWEm7bQfkhaQh9L8pFbafyhdFQyVdN9nek7NRUNT4LSDKWyExMea2NvV8bWV6W3pn6S5cE5BZnjR5w-ZdRJdM7VsgGIoXwRbSWd1iaF6lk0pAJSDxnBSdT8dqWc0e8YAGxZ20FQk2mAAJW0bInCn8PKHLVTL0YBcesGv3MmWSiL6jzn4DlKcO04jwUK_w_FF4dxbxo/3vo/DUufDM71S06zKG0DQTzynQ/h3/EDgT4xI64S-3DaALPkmdM1IQALK7tHnddneS8ojC03Q) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately and split between Lauren Underwood and The Collective PAC.

[](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953w5O3Wwmdygae0W-34efSvb_hfX51xtIkq_nCgr0tl8iRqUTOndcJRC4vm20WcsKLheOjZuC2D-e2udrRi1HINUb6TEDnsQ5j2UCd7_mVa9-WYZNY54QpdybVaJ4I6YjWbpfeymyB1NzgYgzvwc9NFp1khXDo1hg_M8tMvcrvZ-ZfY2AL05kJwo8zZKaDXRyP2Oi33pIIAIADtMBiQCJWffMwN-BMc54U0i_C4qmET9fs-uI8E0pgZzMLDry5mdTocSbFvv_4HEFxMMeBxmaHj-tjXLkSE2zPQeEAlIKobm_sU4LcqnHOdUrXErT0R023ZwN03xDIouLiNKi3FOkZqNHNC3zFTUSUCOBRInYy7VGfEF9jSlqeOTgckIPvKPLZR80F_TDCcG17fBYkF51X45CmK_NxqBH-I4ZGBrQ9VKoA/3vo/DUufDM71S06zKG0DQTzynQ/h10/69K0rWcpUg-QbLElhN_umUDe4ZeYUzOhfEJ8cuXX6F8) The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people.

clean_body: | | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe | | Hi Peter, It’s not my favorite thing to ask for campaign donations. But your support powers our work to help, protect and improve our communities for ourselves, our neighbors and our loved ones. So I’m sharing a shortlist of our achievements below. On health care: Our collective activism has dramatically helped strengthen and expand access to health care for all — including passage of our Health Care Affordability Act , which delivered historic advances in affordability, coverage, and equity. The benefits of this bill will expire in 2025. That's why I reintroduced the Health Care Affordability Act to permanently lower the cost of health care premiums secured by our original bill. On reproductive care — which is also health care: I’ve always voted for legislation that provides women with access to the full spectrum of reproductive health care. Since the devastating Supreme Court ruling overturning Roe last year, folks like you have remained steadfast partners in our work for reproductive freedom, advocating for the health and safety of women everywhere. I’m so proud to stand side-by-side with you in this fight. On Black maternal health: We came together to support my Black Maternal Health Momnibus Act , which I brought to Congress to save moms’ lives and end our country’s growing crisis of preventable pregnancy-related deaths among Black women. And we’ll continue our push to ensure we reverse the trend of rising maternal mortality and close racial and ethnic disparities in maternal health outcomes. On voting rights: The right to vote is one of the fundamental building blocks of our democracy. At every turn, we’ve worked hard together to defend and expand voting rights despite fierce opposition from extreme anti-democratic lawmakers looking to destroy the foundation of our democracy. And we won’t be stopped. On our planet: The climate crisis is an emergency that requires urgent and bold action. With your support, my Democratic colleagues and I will do everything we can to continue tackling climate change and investing in protecting and rebuilding our communities. On the safety of our communities: We’ve never stopped pushing for Congress to enact life-saving changes to protect our loved ones from our country’s crushing gun-violence epidemic. The Bipartisan Safer Communities Act passed last year was a good start, but we must do more to address this crisis because everyone deserves to feel safe in their communities. Peter, thank you for taking the time to read my email. It means a lot to have your support. Your grassroots dedication inspires me every day to continue the critical progress that our communities depend on. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately and split between Lauren Underwood and The Collective PAC. | | | | | | Thanks for everything you do to support our work. Warmly, Lauren The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people. To Donate by Check: PO Box 15320, DC 20003 Paid for by the Collective PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. ** | | Sent via . | Friend
Biden's been focused on passing his Green New Deal for years now, but if he finally manages to push it through, America will see higher prices, higher energy bills, and even more taxes!
Friend you've already seen some of the effects of the GND for yourself. In the past few years, we've seen gas prices and energy bills shoot through the roof due to Biden's policies. He canceled dozens of energy projects, causing gas prices to hit a new national record!
Take a look at some of the effects of Biden's Green New Deal:
❌Kills thousands of good-paying jobs in American oil and gas.
❌Causes gas prices and energy bills to shoot through the roof.
❌Increases American reliance on foreign oil.
❌Lowers America's presence on the world stage.
We have the chance to stop Biden's plan before he can completely roll it out! And while Kat works with all of her colleagues in the House to kill the GND, she's counting on patriots like you to step up and help make it a reality!
---

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62349393/403152813/1120393829?refcode=em-wrapper&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNWY4MzBkYi00N2U0LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TVMOoJ-x-OD1LcdxQvGHOxlHidcjxhO9Ollafs0ie3k=&emci=db181cd5-47e4-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=f5f830db-47e4-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=6830379)
I have some news I wanted to share with you first, Peter.
**Right now, Republicans across the U.S. are trying to loosen child labor laws, putting countless children in danger.**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62349395/403152815/-1342083976?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNWY4MzBkYi00N2U0LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TVMOoJ-x-OD1LcdxQvGHOxlHidcjxhO9Ollafs0ie3k=)

**This week, I introduced the _Child Labor Exploitation Accountability Act_ , a new bill to end child labor by holding companies who illegally use child labor accountable. **Congress must take action on this issue—and I hope you’ll help me push to get it done.
**[Can you chip in $10, $20, or whatever you can to help us advocate to end child labor once and for all? Your support helps our team get the word out about this legislation.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62349397/403152817/-1342083976?refcode2=f5f830db-47e4-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNWY4MzBkYi00N2U0LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TVMOoJ-x-OD1LcdxQvGHOxlHidcjxhO9Ollafs0ie3k=)******

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62349399/403152819/2097596723?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNWY4MzBkYi00N2U0LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TVMOoJ-x-OD1LcdxQvGHOxlHidcjxhO9Ollafs0ie3k=&emci=db181cd5-47e4-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=f5f830db-47e4-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=6830379)
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62349400/403152820/2097596723?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNWY4MzBkYi00N2U0LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TVMOoJ-x-OD1LcdxQvGHOxlHidcjxhO9Ollafs0ie3k=&emci=db181cd5-47e4-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=f5f830db-47e4-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=6830379)
****[Chip In »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62349402/403152822/-1342083976?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNWY4MzBkYi00N2U0LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TVMOoJ-x-OD1LcdxQvGHOxlHidcjxhO9Ollafs0ie3k=)****
---
**Peter, child labor isn’t a 19th century problem or 20th century problem. It’s happening every day to enrich some of our nation’s biggest companies. And it’s unacceptable.**

For too long, some of our nation’s big corporations have profited from children, as young as 13 years old, working in dangerous, overnight jobs—especially in meat packing plants or food processing warehouses.

Our new bill would ensure that no federal dollars go to companies who refuse to follow federal labor laws, like rules on child labor, workplace safety, or the minimum wage. If a company has egregious violations, the federal government could threaten to halt the company’s operations.
Children who have fled poverty and violence to seek asylum in the U.S. have been forced to work in terrible conditions, while the federal government looks the other way.

**At the same time, Republican lawmakers in states across the country have pushed to ~loosen~ child labor laws. In the past two years alone, TEN states have introduced or passed legislation to expand work hours for children, and lift restrictions on hazardous jobs.**
It’s long past time that Congress act to protect children, and ensure they get the education, food, and housing they need. [**Help us end child labor—chip in $10, $20, or whatever you can, to help us hold companies who use child labor accountable.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62349405/403152825/-1342083976?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNWY4MzBkYi00N2U0LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TVMOoJ-x-OD1LcdxQvGHOxlHidcjxhO9Ollafs0ie3k=)

Thank you,
-Greg
****
Greg Casar
Congressman
Texas Congressional District 35

clean_body: I have some news I wanted to share with you first, Peter. Right now, Republicans across the U.S. are trying to loosen child labor laws, putting countless children in danger. = This week, I introduced the Child Labor Exploitation Accountability Act , a new bill to end child labor by holding companies who illegally use child labor accountable. Congress must take action on this issue—and I hope you’ll help me push to get it done. =** = Peter, child labor isn’t a 19th century problem or 20th century problem. It’s happening every day to enrich some of our nation’s biggest companies. And it’s unacceptable. For too long, some of our nation’s big corporations have profited from children, as young as 13 years old, working in dangerous, overnight jobs—especially in meat packing plants or food processing warehouses. Our new bill would ensure that no federal dollars go to companies who refuse to follow federal labor laws, like rules on child labor, workplace safety, or the minimum wage. If a company has egregious violations, the federal government could threaten to halt the company’s operations. Children who have fled poverty and violence to seek asylum in the U.S. have been forced to work in terrible conditions, while the federal government looks the other way. At the same time, Republican lawmakers in states across the country have pushed to ~loosen~ child labor laws. In the past two years alone, TEN states have introduced or passed legislation to expand work hours for children, and lift restrictions on hazardous jobs. It’s long past time that Congress act to protect children, and ensure they get the education, food, and housing they need. = Thank you, -Greg Greg Casar Congressman Texas Congressional District 35 ****=** | ****** ---|---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Brian=20Lenney?=
subject: WINNING
body:
\- - - - > BIGLY |
---
| | **We got a win!**

As you may know, I've been passionately advocating against the mandatory requirement of diversity statements in hiring in Idaho's higher education institutions, all session long, ad nauseam.

And finally, after numerous conversations, emails, and discussions, the State Board of Education has approved a resolution**prohibiting diversity statements in hiring.**

I remember asking the SBOE President about this early on in the legislative session ([VIDEO HERE](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=fa435f514c&e=dea908e0fe "watch me ask the SBOE President about this exact thing")), and I'm thrilled to see that all our hard work and perseverance have paid off.

No longer will candidates applying for employment at Idaho’s 4-year public institutions be required to provide written diversity statements.

__This is a significant win for conservatives.__

And it was the Idaho Freedom Caucus that led the charge and advocated for this change, emailing board members, and bringing it up in committees and on the floor.

Our voices were heard, and the SBOE did the right thing.

It's a significant achievement, and I am thrilled to have been part of it.

The people of Idaho are done with the insidious infiltration of the woke DEI agenda in our schools and universities.

Let this be a warning to all those who seek to impose their radical agendas on our society - **_we will not back down, we will not be silenced, and we will always fight for what is right._**

Cheers,

Brian

\---

Over the past two years in Joe Biden's America, inflation reached the highest level in four decades, gas prices skyrocketed, deadly cartels took over our southern border, and violent crime surged in America's major cities.

| | Team, there’s a lot more to Nevada than just the glittering hustle and bustle of Las Vegas. Did you know that our state is the driest and the most mountainous in the country? You could say we’ve been _left high and dry_. Mountains and deserts are notoriously some of the toughest conditions in which to build a thriving and prosperous society. Just leave it to Nevadans to tackle the challenge! Well, after living here in Nevada for thirty years, I’m certainly no stranger to an uphill climb. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62350829/403158899/-2112663142?refcode=EM_BS_LEE_230426_FR_HighAndDry_A0_NA_U1_X1_M1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiODg5ODUxMy00Y2U0LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CnVgCPny0QM2nGWjIhUTjIjbKQkintKgTSrCWpLQIkw=) Through three close elections in one of the most competitive districts in the country and countless attacks by the GOP political machine, I’ve weathered it all. But I couldn’t have done it without the dedication of my wonderful team and the incredible support you’ve given me over the years. The 2024 election cycle is going to be a taller task than any we’ve faced before. But with some grit, perseverance, and your continued support, I know we can move mountains. But I couldn’t have done it without the dedication of my wonderful team and the incredible support you’ve given me over the years. The 2024 election cycle is going to be a taller task than any we’ve faced before. But with some grit, perseverance, and your continued support, I know we can move mountains. I’ve been named one of the DCCC’s frontline candidates because the stakes are that high. = | | | = | | = | | style=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiODg5ODUxMy00Y2U0LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CnVgCPny0QM2nGWjIhUTjIjbKQkintKgTSrCWpLQIkw= | | = | | = | | = Thanks for joining me, Susie Lee | | = We believe that emails are the best way for our organization to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, . If you'd like to support Susie Lee For Congress, = | | = | | = If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please click | Paid for by Susie Lee for Congress Susie Lee for Congress 5130 S Fort Apache Rd Ste 215-382 Las Vegas, NV 89148

| | | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z7vot0c8lf4cq4i4re6ukv0d96c83u83036sl2to_rp22sh2s8i66o72clj69oj4c3h2bs)

Friend,
Make no mistake, billions and billions of dollars will be spent by the Democrats to try and stop us from winning back the White House in 2024.
**And following Biden’s announcement, we have just DAYS left until the end-of-month deadline when our fundraising numbers will be compared head-to-head for the _FIRST TIME_.**
But while Biden relies on Hollywood, the Soros Money Machine, and special interest donors to line his coffers, our campaign has something he NEVER will...
_...An entire movement of grassroots patriots like YOU with an unwavering resolve to SAVE our country._
No matter how much they spend, no matter how many vicious attacks they throw our way, with YOUR sustained support, we will counter them at every turn.
[**Please make a contribution before the end-of-month deadline to help me OUTRAISE Biden and Kamala, WIN BACK the White House, and MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN – for 1,500% impact.**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zpa1de680tgql3mlh6vhpd9l82nmrq375lhque1o_rp22sh2s8i66o72clj69oj4c3h2bs)

The fact that the Left has to spend billions of dollars to even compete with our MAGA movement should tell you everything you need to know about Joe Biden and today’s Democrat Party.
_**How else would they sell a radical agenda that puts YOU – the American people – DEAD LAST?**_
But even the mountains of cash that they haul in from globalist special interests won’t be enough to stop our incredible movement...
...Because patriots like YOU will help us spread the TRUTH that America's choice in 2024 couldn't be any more obvious.
_Do you want a country that secures OUR borders, or one that secures other nation’s borders?_
_Do you want a country that prioritizes LAW-ABIDING citizens, or one that prioritizes criminals?_
_Do you want a country that seeks TRUE JUSTICE for all, or one that weaponizes its justice system to criminalize dissent and imprison political opposition?_
_Do you want a country that is STRONG, or one that apologizes and bends a knee to the globalist regime?_
_Do you want a country that is PROUD of how far it has come, or one that tries to ERASE its own history?_
**The choice is clear, but to ensure every last voter knows _exactly_ what’s at stake in 2024, we MUST outraise Biden and the Democrats at each and every deadline.**
[**So please, make a contribution before the end-of-month deadline to help me OUTRAISE Biden and Kamala, WIN BACK the White House, and MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN – for 1,500% impact.**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zji8gsini5drb2ouu5tbju6t43mlebl1599rfmdo_rp22sh2s8i66o72clj69oj4c3h2bs)

ICYMI: Montana Senator Steve Daines Endorses President Donald J. Trump
**Mar-a-Lago, FL—** Montana Senator Steve Daines announced his endorsement of President Donald J. Trump.
Senator Daines also serves as the Chairman of the National Republican Senatorial Committee.
"I’m proud to endorse Donald J. Trump for President of the United States," Senator Daines said. "The best four years I've had in the U.S. Senate is when President Trump was serving in the Oval Office. We passed the greatest tax cut in American history, we transformed the courts — the Supreme Court and the Circuit Courts, we passed the greatest conservation win in 50 years, we had a country that was respected and strong!"

name: Lena Moffitt, Evergreen Action
subject: Republicans' latest form of climate denial
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
body:
Help us defend clean energy
| | [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/letter/tell-congress-stop-ira-repeal/?utm_source=ema_2023-04-26_debt_ceiling&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ira&t=2&akid=13313%2E53494%2EzZmTU3)
---
Friend,
Right now, House Speaker Kevin McCarthy is pushing forward the Default on America Act, a reckless and extreme bill that threatens the biggest piece of climate legislation in U.S. history—the Inflation Reduction Act (IRA).
**I won’t mince words: This bill is an attack on American people—our economy, our jobs, our health, and our climate.** It would cut our hard-won climate provisions like EV tax credits and electrification rebates, drive up inflation, jeopardize our health, and eliminate clean energy jobs spurred by the IRA. It would drive up costs for American households, hitting low-income and marginalized communities especially hard.
**We cannot let Speaker McCarthy and House Republicans torpedo the historic climate action we worked so hard to pass, and we must urgently call on Democrats to defend it.[Send a letter to your members of Congress now and tell them to protect the IRA.](https://act.evergreenaction.com/letter/tell-congress-stop-ira-repeal/?utm_source=ema_2023-04-26_debt_ceiling&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ira&t=3&akid=13313%2E53494%2EzZmTU3)

**
[TELL CONGRESS: DEFEND THE IRA](https://act.evergreenaction.com/letter/tell-congress-stop-ira-repeal/?utm_source=ema_2023-04-26_debt_ceiling&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ira&t=4&akid=13313%2E53494%2EzZmTU3)
---

Republicans are forcing the country towards a choice between two equally disastrous futures: forgoing the real economic benefits that can come with addressing the climate crisis or tanking the U.S. economy by not raising the debt ceiling. **We must reject both and let the IRA keep doing what it was designed to do—create millions of good-paying jobs and deliver clean energy and bold climate action.

**
[TELL CONGRESS: DEFEND THE IRA](https://act.evergreenaction.com/letter/tell-congress-stop-ira-repeal/?utm_source=ema_2023-04-26_debt_ceiling&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ira&t=5&akid=13313%2E53494%2EzZmTU3)
---
**
[Sending a pre-drafted letter to your representative will only take a few minutes out of your day and will defend the bold legislation we worked on for months to get passed](https://act.evergreenaction.com/letter/tell-congress-stop-ira-repeal/?utm_source=ema_2023-04-26_debt_ceiling&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ira&t=6&akid=13313%2E53494%2EzZmTU3)**. Thank you for using your voice to advocate for our just, clean energy future.
Onward,
Lena Moffitt
Executive Director
Evergreen Action
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](https://act.evergreenaction.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=7&akid=13313%2E53494%2EzZmTU3). Contributions or gifts to EVERGREEN ACTION are not tax deductible. | PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
---

name: Joe Budd, Palm Beach State Committeeman
subject: You Would Be Surprised
body:
What Will Happen Now
---
| | | | | |
---
| |
---
| | |
---
| THEY RUINED MY NAME!
---
| I've been this Budd's for you since 1963. Budweiser didn't start using it until 1979. I should sue. They've caused irreparable harm. How will I ever be able to use that slogan again. All kidding aside, they've run some great ads in the past but nothing like mine... (watch ad below)
---
| | |
---
| WATCH JOE'S FIRST POLITICAL AD
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001rtLS2lN-TurNPikNHyqLhDHQsc2AZt0L6Eocuic1Hxpvm_mcQlHk2Xk1cDEc4g0dWIwymXVmWf0AhgLHKFrS5y_wC4yLKAKLcntml0DgaaU4WF_mJkXJSg0-dHZrUakNuKQG4tiSOLatzmWONfiPng==&c=x5JmfuFC7Bpmprqt9r-2PDrX7N6V80YttiNqREv80DLkdVBXV2eQ4Q==&ch=qhb5FuOfd-J1g-DvXmZ-jhfde0de0Qvz3pBjie8n2M4wBp7oGxvLuQ==)
---
| | |
---
| "Just writing to say hello, update you on my current political activities, and comment on what's shaping up to be a very interesting 2024 election season."- Joe
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| First, as some of you already know, I resigned from Club 45 which subsequently changed their name to Club 47. This was a club I founded and am very proud of its accomplished history and wish it continued success. I continue to serve as Palm Beach County's Republican State Committeeman and on the board of the Republican Party of Florida.
---
| |
---
|
---
| | |
---
| Secondly, we can all agree that the 2024 elections can't come soon enough! The Brandon Administration has shown extreme incompetence all the way around. Failed energy policy, failed economic policy, failed social policy, and failed foreign policy. Truth and integrity are hard to come by. Speaking of...
---
| | |
---|---
|
Jared Moskowitz on his very first vote as my representative, after Kevin McCarthy won the speakership, fully backed funding the 87,000 IRS agents Biden set out to hire. Funny thing was when Jared was asked at a candidate forum, "What was the worst thing the Biden Administration has done", Jared said, "Hiring 87,000 IRS agents".

His very FIRST vote on legislation was a Failure to stand by his word. That speaks for itself. He's also been accused of insider trading with his new found insider knowledge which if you checked out his past financial disclosures, this would be a departure from his usual conservative investments.

Don't have high expectations. Let's face it, in a district he was supposed to win easily he only received 51.59% of the vote.
| | |
---
| JOE'S THOUGHTS ON 2024
---
| | |
---
| | |
---|---
|
The 2024 Republican Presidential Primary will be full of fireworks as it is highly anticipated Governor Ron DeSantis will enter the race and challenge President Trump for the nomination. Personally, I think they both have some great accomplishments. Both have changed the face of their respective courts and both have pushed back on woke ideology.

Let's all know and expect this nomination process to be a battle of heavyweights but let's also keep in mind the real opponents are the Democrats! I believe both Trump and DeSantis are America First candidates, and I will strongly support whomever becomes the nominee. I could tell you "uniparty" stories about both of them so in that respect, they're no different from each other. But either one is infinitely better than our current memory challenged commander in chief.

One major victory sure to come out of this battle royale will be a significant turnout on the same day in March 2024 when the municipal elections will be held. Republicans will gain many seats locally that day as the turnout advantage will be, to quote President Trump...
|
---
| |
---
| | |
---
| JOE'S BUCKET LIST
---
| | |
---
| Coming up, a bucket list item. I've wanted to attend the Iowa Sate fair during a Republican primary season. My wife and I will be there in August and I'll report back to you!
Until then, this Budd's still for you. But drink something else.
---
| | |
---
| A little humor
---
|
---
| | |
---
| |
---
[ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001rtLS2lN-TurNPikNHyqLhDHQsc2AZt0L6Eocuic1Hxpvm_mcQlHk2Vk_s4Jhj-4V_ATgzlPZ8jx5DlwGSmh4Z-zQbaDspDiC_4i2EWjltOpyF0zSDHbvIDxVya5YaBVDrFTZRTPvxsgOiHduV9ZjfDWiO49IRGNVIUnP8LlGpWQ=&c=x5JmfuFC7Bpmprqt9r-2PDrX7N6V80YttiNqREv80DLkdVBXV2eQ4Q==&ch=qhb5FuOfd-J1g-DvXmZ-jhfde0de0Qvz3pBjie8n2M4wBp7oGxvLuQ==) [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001rtLS2lN-TurNPikNHyqLhDHQsc2AZt0L6Eocuic1Hxpvm_mcQlHk2Vk_s4Jhj-4VjznwzF52Yfg78SMrOp1LqhyiH7Y7bpdLoGGmazrvHnt6LBTu286s6y5czBusEiCRdD5pOP2oBdVKqhNwYHxusWyN7dxpBZK-&c=x5JmfuFC7Bpmprqt9r-2PDrX7N6V80YttiNqREv80DLkdVBXV2eQ4Q==&ch=qhb5FuOfd-J1g-DvXmZ-jhfde0de0Qvz3pBjie8n2M4wBp7oGxvLuQ==) [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001rtLS2lN-TurNPikNHyqLhDHQsc2AZt0L6Eocuic1Hxpvm_mcQlHk2Vk_s4Jhj-4V-s7mh61k5IK-UfM6E60QuL2cKQLix-IdGCvp68ZPb_8CWht1zsCK74Z4qIuTJc8MnUMsJCA80SslkXYTmJNYFaTKUGLIZcZZRTebJQb9vqg=&c=x5JmfuFC7Bpmprqt9r-2PDrX7N6V80YttiNqREv80DLkdVBXV2eQ4Q==&ch=qhb5FuOfd-J1g-DvXmZ-jhfde0de0Qvz3pBjie8n2M4wBp7oGxvLuQ==) [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001rtLS2lN-TurNPikNHyqLhDHQsc2AZt0L6Eocuic1Hxpvm_mcQlHk2Vk_s4Jhj-4Vakx6PnU9AcRypGsf9eItoCMWB4FGuIAC6TOsPNb8JwGs2TB1YraBYjsbdw5BQkp_OhuQksmjZqWCmk4Vo-GXaXl2HWoOO1f6SfnAApMjxJ2szFdJNUfFouqw-bceYScf&c=x5JmfuFC7Bpmprqt9r-2PDrX7N6V80YttiNqREv80DLkdVBXV2eQ4Q==&ch=qhb5FuOfd-J1g-DvXmZ-jhfde0de0Qvz3pBjie8n2M4wBp7oGxvLuQ==)

I continue to serve as Palm Beach County's Republican State Committeeman and on the board of the Republican Party of Florida. | | | | | | | Secondly, we can all agree that the 2024 elections can't come soon enough! The Brandon Administration has shown extreme incompetence all the way around. Failed energy policy, failed economic policy, failed social policy, and failed foreign policy. Truth and integrity are hard to come by. Speaking of... | | | ---|--- | Jared Moskowitz on his very first vote as my representative, after Kevin McCarthy won the speakership, fully backed funding the 87,000 IRS agents Biden set out to hire. Funny thing was when Jared was asked at a candidate forum, "What was the worst thing the Biden Administration has done", Jared said, "Hiring 87,000 IRS agents". His very FIRST vote on legislation was a Failure to stand by his word. That speaks for itself. He's also been accused of insider trading with his new found insider knowledge which if you checked out his past financial disclosures, this would be a departure from his usual conservative investments. Don't have high expectations. Let's face it, in a district he was supposed to win easily he only received 51.59% of the vote. | | | | JOE'S THOUGHTS ON 2024 | | | | | | ---|--- | The 2024 Republican Presidential Primary will be full of fireworks as it is highly anticipated Governor Ron DeSantis will enter the race and challenge President Trump for the nomination. Personally, I think they both have some great accomplishments. Both have changed the face of their respective courts and both have pushed back on woke ideology. Let's all know and expect this nomination process to be a battle of heavyweights but let's also keep in mind the real opponents are the Democrats! I believe both Trump and DeSantis are America First candidates, and I will strongly support whomever becomes the nominee. I could tell you "uniparty" stories about both of them so in that respect, they're no different from each other. But either one is infinitely better than our current memory challenged commander in chief. One major victory sure to come out of this battle royale will be a significant turnout on the same day in March 2024 when the municipal elections will be held. Republicans will gain many seats locally that day as the turnout advantage will be, to quote President Trump... | | | | | | | JOE'S BUCKET LIST | | | | Coming up, a bucket list item. I've wanted to attend the Iowa Sate fair during a Republican primary season. My wife and I will be there in August and I'll report back to you! Until then, this Budd's still for you. But drink something else. | | | | A little humor | | | | | | == == == == | To unsubscribe from Joe Budd's email list, simply reply stating "mailto:votejoebudd@gmail.com". | | | | | | Joe Budd, Palm Beach State Committeeman | 23123 State Rd 7, Suite 236B, Boca Raton, FL 33428 | Sent by mailto:votejoebudd@gmail.com powered by

subject: 🚨 END Biden's war on American energy independence!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JR FOR OHIO](https://jrforohio
body:
The recent measures against nuclear power and natural gas have caused a negative impact on our economy and the lives of working-class Americans who... | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/jrforohio/jr-majewski-officially-announces-campaign-to-represent-ohios-9th-district-in-congress-8123977?e=0426928d91)
---
[](https://jrforohio.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f8b050a6338dbb74901cdea58&id=9156548adf&e=0426928d91)
Peter,
I am writing to express my concern about the impact of Biden's war on American energy independence.

**As someone who has spent 18 years in the nuclear industry, I understand the importance of nuclear power.** The recent measures against nuclear power and natural gas have caused a negative impact on our economy and the lives of working-class Americans who are experiencing financial hardship.
[](https://jrforohio.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f8b050a6338dbb74901cdea58&id=bb0b578aa4&e=0426928d91)
| [CLICK HERE TO SIGN THE OFFICIAL PETITION TODAY >>>](https://jrforohio.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f8b050a6338dbb74901cdea58&id=9e09b6a8aa&e=0426928d91)
---
As you may know, Biden's Green New Deal promises to eliminate all nuclear power and natural gas energy sources over a period of ten years. This is nothing more than a scam to increase government spending while simultaneously destroying thousands of jobs and driving up energy prices.

By forcing us to rely on unreliable sources like wind and solar, we risk having rolling blackouts and an unreliable power grid.
**We must stand up for the nuclear and gas industries** to preserve our energy independence, protect jobs, and ensure that we have reliable, affordable sources of energy.

Join Team Majewski by signing the official petition today — together, we can defeat Biden's war on American energy independence!

[**Can I count on your support, Peter?**](https://jrforohio.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f8b050a6338dbb74901cdea58&id=1274460c8b&e=0426928d91)
[](https://jrforohio.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f8b050a6338dbb74901cdea58&id=84c2b9b3c8&e=0426928d91)
JR Majewski
Candidate for Congress
Ohio CD-09

* Fight back against Republican misinformation and attacks

subject: quick note from the road
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nikki Haley for President
body: ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ To unsubscribe from Nikki Haley for President, click here Peter, Hey, it's Grayson. I’m on the road with Nikki Haley and wanted to give you a quick update. Nikki is back in New Hampshire today with a jam-packed schedule filled with back-to-back town halls and meet and greets. (14 events to be exact). https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=7ad6caeaf3820b61e08c2b41be45efb8c779bf3446967d87ceb7834fb82fd6092e709e2ec1d8af12b4b94284ddb972ea6d821543494e9fe7ef142694abea2088 Whether you realize it or not, generosity from grassroots supporters like you is the reason Nikki is able to fuel her campaign and travel to key states like New Hampshire. Speaking from firsthand experience, these events are so impactful for Nikki to meet and speak directly with voters. Not only does it give her an opportunity to share her vision for America, but it gives voters the opportunity to get to know Nikki for the amazing person she truly is. https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=7ad6caeaf3820b612aeea5376a70c00e4eec33b38ece6fd3d118b537c0c41442df21629e4072b82746062377714d96e1bd7134fc348cf70c855cdf726221ddb0 SUPPORT NIKKI HALEY Now, I have to tell you, hosting these events and reaching voters across the country isn’t cheap. As critical as it is for Nikki to continue these efforts, it is only possible with the proper resources to fund her campaign. https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=7ad6caeaf3820b612aeea5376a70c00e4eec33b38ece6fd3d118b537c0c41442df21629e4072b82746062377714d96e1bd7134fc348cf70c855cdf726221ddb0 That’s why I wanted to ask an important question. name: VoteVets
subject: SIGNATURE NEEDED: Fight back against $30 BILLION in cuts to the VA
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
If you send our troops to war, you damn well better care for them when they come back.
#
Derek —
$30 BILLION.
That’s the amount McCarthy and his MAGA allies want to cut the VA by. It’s a cut of 22%. Here’s what it means:
81,000 jobs lost. Longer wait times. Longer backlogs. Millions of Veterans delayed or unable to access the care that they earned in service to our nation.
This isn’t just a broken promise. It’s a stab in the back.
And here’s the plain truth: If you send our Troops to war you damn well better take care of them when they come home.
It’s time to raise hell about these cuts. VoteVets and our allies in Congress are gathering on the Hill for a press conference today to fight back. This is the first part of a much larger conversation, and we need your help to get the word out.
**[Add your voice: Tell McCarthy and his MAGA allies that we won’t stand for these cuts to the VA. Join thousands of others and make sure the entire country knows about this betrayal from the GOP.](https://act.votevets.org/signup/230426_vv_budget_petition/?source=em230426-1-15&refcode2=8356.3013755.FnLTXk&t=1&akid=8356%2E3013755%2EFnLTXk)**
| [ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.votevets.org/signup/230426_vv_budget_petition/?source=em230426-1-15&refcode2=8356.3013755.FnLTXk&t=2&akid=8356%2E3013755%2EFnLTXk)
---
Thank you for your support, and as always, we’re proud to be with you in this fight.
The team at VoteVets

PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS.ORG, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE’S COMMITTEE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here ](https://act.votevets.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=8356%2E3013755%2EFnLTXk).

name: Senator Ted Cruz
subject: Can I trust you with something?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Take the 2024 Republican Platform Survey >>

[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=685b10885c6c4927a7d76eb41f655498&_e=MDGty0BHNOmMfEQn79zoQ8nDjq4wrcXPn5DJFb6OPMYIJAGFQjeDGBtrc3r6T0f97glZMEHI3yLxDHyoSD9eJRD20kCb_eO9LXqvXRLUO7yl7DFZo1-rd5JzD1TnijN8tlt7j9v7B9veNf2KC0IxsogMTg50FrxmvzgCUZolBpDqV5EYjdE04Po-72oU708niwmDoWIPvrncameet4Tlf8TyBAea8D-7P-JnDNsDRXH26HyRNsdCaB766LyUFrRcTWMoQ1X7LqREV6YLN-Z0h6a8g2wjlu_aso-muNCTTaluWZ4ZvLmY2P6hMY94oplkHbrGl8blS4jOsZSyAarYCDkgR2mqm-1Guoo5zU8oxHYc8uTPWbFhEtmrAguOWK42bms_dC98nqRQtR6hHhKnNapNHs1H0GqQCqnZepFdg28mOo7AQ_MGPEtoj93t_CoRlUs4yJv_IHTwDribTARXCIOeJhcOWBef0WS1uYmJGbM%3D)

I need patriots I can trust, Friend.

My Senate Republican colleagues and I just left a BIG 2024 Election meeting, but we ran into a problem - we needed more up-to-date information to make better strategic decisions.

I'm entrusting YOU with completing the **[Official 2024 Republican Platform Survey](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=685b10885c6c4927a7d76eb41f655498&_e=MDGty0BHNOmMfEQn79zoQ8nDjq4wrcXPn5DJFb6OPMYIJAGFQjeDGBtrc3r6T0f97glZMEHI3yLxDHyoSD9eJRD20kCb_eO9LXqvXRLUO7yl7DFZo1-rd5JzD1TnijN8tlt7j9v7B9veNf2KC0IxsogMTg50FrxmvzgCUZolBpDqV5EYjdE04Po-72oU708niwmDoWIPvrncameet4Tlf8TyBAea8D-7P-JnDNsDRXH26HyRNsdCaB766LyUFrRcTWMoQ1X7LqREV6YLN-Z0h6a8g2wjlu_aso-muNCTTaluWZ4ZvLmY2P6hMY94oplkHbrGl8blS4jOsZSyAarYCJiemj8UL365ZlV5BcLflSnrzGe4Hce0xw2vIG9hlguQYzLcwL8j1pVrTKf-vfVH-gSQQrdHLbx9Wv1BZthd89wEV3jn5rUFdYlHM9TLPdGBNTY_KcX1NfHevPWFetemKl8C7XuXlsGeID8j80LRsqo%3D)** because of your excellent track record of providing valuable input for the Conservative movement.

[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=685b10885c6c4927a7d76eb41f655498&_e=MDGty0BHNOmMfEQn79zoQ8nDjq4wrcXPn5DJFb6OPMYIJAGFQjeDGBtrc3r6T0f97glZMEHI3yLxDHyoSD9eJRD20kCb_eO9LXqvXRLUO7yl7DFZo1-rd5JzD1TnijN8tlt7j9v7B9veNf2KC0IxsogMTg50FrxmvzgCUZolBpDqV5EYjdE04Po-72oU708niwmDoWIPvrncameet4Tlf8TyBAea8D-7P-JnDNsDRXH26HyRNsdCaB766LyUFrRcTWMoQ1X7LqREV6YLN-Z0h6a8g2wjlu_aso-muNCTTaluWZ4ZvLmY2P6hMY94oplkHbrGl8blS4jOsZSyAarYCMJ1zBvO7LmXFBzRtNNUUr_hY3i-1Pu1AxenqfNbNOykAubx0ZTzy5YCLf4kmXd-13B2deXbQ70rHWVHdCtqKkRTbQxBb7ptSoG5-Zr__0zQ_s16nH17k_kMSoR1M92STvNr7UZ91ABD3MbMLDzsbMM%3D)

name: Shift WA
subject: Democrats flop at legislative finish
body:
Due to Democrats' incompetence, drug possession in our state - including hard drugs like heroin and fentanyl - will now be fully legal by July. | | [](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61742279:sQfprWDN1:m:1:2610672541:C9E8A22C351EB6593C020472AF6A0219:r "Shift Washington")
---
|
Friends, The 2023 legislative session has mercifully come to an end. After months of legislative Democrats making decisions in secret, shutting out their Republican colleagues and the public in general, we now have more insight into what was happening behind those closed doors. The answer? A whole lot of far-left shenanigans - and downright incompetence. Democrats managed to blow through a whopping $1 billion-plus from the state's new income tax and cap-and-tax scheme which didn't exist when the session began, handed out another billion dollars in pay raises to state union employees, and again passed legislation preventing police from pursuing car thieves.** But - beyond even these unfortunate liberal priorities - Democrats created a rather large drug problem, even though as even the Seattle Times noted, "[WA Democrats, you had one job](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61742278:sQfprWDN1:m:1:2610672541:C9E8A22C351EB6593C020472AF6A0219:r)."** Legislative Democrats failed to pass a fix to the state's drug possession law, which they initially rushed through in 2021 after the so-called Blake decision by the State Supreme Court negated the state's drug possession laws. **Due to Democrats ' incompetence, drug possession in our state - including hard drugs like heroin and fentanyl - will now be fully legal by July.** Even Democrat State Representative Monica Stonier noted her party's failure when she admitted it meant "defecation on the streets, needles in our parks, all of the things that we have heard about that we fear, will be worse." **Democrats control both the State Senate and House. **Only Democrats could have passed a meaningful remedy to the Blake decision. They did not. But the facts did not stop Gov. Jay Inslee from blaming Republicans for the failure. Sunday night, Inslee and House Speaker Laurie Jinkins pointed the finger at Republicans for the Democrats' own drug deal going bad. And mainstream media outlets let them get away with it. Let's be clear - **Democrats have a drug problem**. They do not take problems which their policies have created - like increasing public drug use and overdoses -- seriously. They do not take issues that directly correlate with drug use - like mental health and homelessness - seriously. **Something has got to change.** We here at Shift WA are dedicated to ushering in that change by ensuring voters know what's really going on in Olympia and local communities. We are the only online outlet that highlighted the Legislature's need to take action on fixing the Blake decision at the very beginning of session - while warning of the Democrats' probable inaction because of their party's preference for legalization of hard drugs. But we need your help to continue our work. We depend entirely on the support of concerned residents of our state like you. **_[Will you help by contributing just $25 today?](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61742277:sQfprWDN1:m:1:2610672541:C9E8A22C351EB6593C020472AF6A0219:r)_** Mainstream media outlets will continue to cover for Democrats - they will not hold Democrats accountable for their absurd lies. **Our state needs Shift WA.** **_[Will you help our mission of shifting the political debate in Washington by shining a light on Olympia by contributing today?](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61742277:sQfprWDN1:m:1:2610672541:C9E8A22C351EB6593C020472AF6A0219:r)_** Thank you,
The Shift WA Team | [ DONATE ](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61742276:sQfprWDN1:m:1:2610672541:C9E8A22C351EB6593C020472AF6A0219:r)
---
|
This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com) and sent from Shift Washington. If you would like to send this message to some of your friends, you can [click here](http://click.shiftwa.org/forwardthis/ft.php?mID=14188291&em=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&ch=49000b887de404a22f48ed48dd2d4356&schema=echo3) to do so.

You can also stay up to date on our efforts to shift the debate in Washington State by following us on [Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/shiftwa/) & [Twitter](https://twitter.com/ShiftWA). If you believe you received this message in error or no longer wish to receive emails from Shift Washington, [click to unsubscribe](http://click.shiftwa.org/p/osQfprWDN1).
---

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: A very personal note
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
Peter,

I can trace my drive for success to the first night I slept on the floor
in the apartment my mother got for us after my father left.

Lying there, I could honestly say that my life sucked and I was not going
to stand for that.

Growing up poor, I took advantage of the things Democrats championed and
the people of our country provided: Pell Grants and school lunch programs
to name just two.

Those helping hands gave me (and people like me) a debt of gratitude I
worked to pay back through service — first in the Marines, and now in
Congress.

The things I want today are not exotic. I am not looking to own a yacht,
the Hope Diamond, or to have billionaires throw money at me. I want loving
relationships with family, I want to help my constituents, and I want an
America that lives up to its ideals.

As I think about the challenge ahead in this Senate race, what I learned
growing up and in the Marines is that I can’t do this alone.

I’m going to need your help, because unless we’re in this together we’re
going to get swallowed up fast by Senator Sinema’s big money. So please:

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18942?t=1001&akid=3184%2E346206%2EbKwUr4 ]Can you please split a $25 contribution between Charles Booker and my
United States Senate campaign today? I would not ask if this was not so
important.

CHIP IN →

The fourteen-year-old kid with tears in his eyes because he had no bed to
sleep in wouldn’t believe these last forty-eight hours. I’m not sure I do
yet, either.

Thank you, and adiós,

Ruben

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20230426-3184-footer&t=1002&refcode2=3184_346206_bKwUr4&akid=3184%2E346206%2EbKwUr4

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=3184%2E346206%2EbKwUr4

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
