name: COURIER
subject: You’ve been chosen to sponsor a newsroom
body:
Picking favorites? More like sharing the love.
# [](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/83?t=1&akid=904%2E120351%2ENIha6L)
Peter —
**Right now, our local newsrooms in eight battleground states are fighting the spread of misinformation with factual journalism and meaningful stories in the communities and online spaces where misinformation spreads.**
We make our news freely available to anyone who wants it but, in order to keep it that way, we have to fundraise to support the work of our journalists and ensure they have the tools they need to produce and deliver this information.
**In that spirit, we’re excited to announce our Sponsor a Newsroom Project.**
You’ve been selected to sponsor the COURIER newsroom in your home state of Pennsylvania! We’ve set a goal to raise $12,500 and reach voters across Pennsylvania. **Can your local COURIER newsroom count on your help to reach their goal and share good information with Pennsylvania voters?** [**⇢ Yes, I’ll sponsor my local COURIER newsroom with a contribution of $5 to reach 50 voters.**](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/3667?refcode=em-20230426&t=2&akid=904%2E120351%2ENIha6L) ****
---
**Our Sponsor a Newsroom Project will be game-changing for our newsrooms and the communities they serve** — but this plan only works if we can raise enough money to help outfit our newsrooms with the staff, technology, and resources they need!**[Can you help us hit our $12,500 fundraising goal for each of Courier’s eight local newsrooms?](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/3667?refcode=em-20230426&t=9&akid=904%2E120351%2ENIha6L)**
**[Chip in $5 »](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/3667?refcode=em-20230426&t=10&akid=904%2E120351%2ENIha6L)**
Thank you, for considering a donation to support a COURIER newsroom — THIS is what real, accessible information looks like. And by reaching out to everyone we can, we know we’re sending voters to the polls with the knowledge they need to vote on the most important issues.
— COURIER

**[DONATE »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=11&refcode2=904_120351_NIha6L&akid=904%2E120351%2ENIha6L)**
Email us: [**info@couriernewsroom.com**](mailto:info@couriernewsroom.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/signup/update-your-information)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=12&akid=904%2E120351%2ENIha6L)

To give by check:
Courier Newsroom
Box 509
New York, NY 10032
clean_body: Picking favorites? More like sharing the love. Peter — Right now, our local newsrooms in eight battleground states are fighting the spread of misinformation with factual journalism and meaningful stories in the communities and online spaces where misinformation spreads. We make our news freely available to anyone who wants it but, in order to keep it that way, we have to fundraise to support the work of our journalists and ensure they have the tools they need to produce and deliver this information. In that spirit, we’re excited to announce our Sponsor a Newsroom Project. You’ve been selected to sponsor the COURIER newsroom in your home state of Pennsylvania! We’ve set a goal to raise $12,500 and reach voters across Pennsylvania. Can your local COURIER newsroom count on your help to reach their goal and share good information with Pennsylvania voters? ** Our Sponsor a Newsroom Project will be game-changing for our newsrooms and the communities they serve — but this plan only works if we can raise enough money to help outfit our newsrooms with the staff, technology, and resources they need! Thank you, for considering a donation to support a COURIER newsroom — THIS is what real, accessible information looks like. And by reaching out to everyone we can, we know we’re sending voters to the polls with the knowledge they need to vote on the most important issues. — COURIER Email us: mailto:info@couriernewsroom.com

name: Petition Signatures Needed | Left Action
subject: Sign: Tell Congress to throw McCarthy’s budget in the trash where it belongs
body:
| | | | |
---
| | | [Sign your name: Tell Congress to reject McCarthy's cruel and unserious budget proposal >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb4b8b1b1-a6e6-443c-a39d-fa1e903f2784/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

---
| | | Kevin McCarthy and House Republicans are threatening America with default unless Republican budget demands are met – and those demands include serious cuts to critical programs across the government. McCarthy’s budget proposal calls for cuts to the Veterans Administration, ending Pell Grants and Biden’s student loan cancellation plan, cuts to the IRS, and more. This “proposal” is garbage – and that’s exactly where it belongs. [Tell Congress to reject McCarthy’s cruel and unserious budget proposal >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T160aee1b-6481-4efb-ac91-8a5aefa8ab85/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) To make matters worse, all McCarthy is offering in return is a one-year debt ceiling extension – so this fight can continue all over again during an election year! President Biden has already firmly spoken out against McCarthy’s plan, and Congress needs to follow suit. This plan would be disastrous for the American people. [Add your name: Tell Congress to reject McCarthy’s cruel and unserious budget proposal >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc8d70edd-5398-4202-b6fd-da419b928651/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

body:
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=97%2E791427%2EBUc7UA)
**It's the people and the issues that make our movement so special.**
That's why hearing _directly_ from our supporters about what's on your mind is one of the most important parts of Ilhan's work in Congress — and it's why we're emailing you this morning to ask:
[**Can we get 2 minutes of your time to answer our April Issues Survey? The more responses we receive, the better Ilhan is able to continue fighting for our progressive values in Congress.](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/io-em230426-issue-survey/?source=em230426-1-t2&refcode2=97.791427.BUc7UA&akid=97%2E791427%2EBUc7UA)**
**[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/io-em230426-issue-survey/?source=em230426-1-t2&refcode2=97.791427.BUc7UA&akid=97%2E791427%2EBUc7UA)**
We truly mean it when we say that your input is critical to our campaign's success.
Believe it or not, the responses to these surveys change all the time, and it's your feedback that allows us to get a better read on where our movement's priorities lie at any given moment.
We'll be capping the responses to our April survey soon, so please, use the link below and make your voice heard today. It shouldn't take more than 2 minutes of your time:
[**https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/April-Issues-Survey](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=.uBfKAj&refcode=em230426-1-t2&t=2&akid=97%2E791427%2EBUc7UA)**
Thanks in advance for weighing in. It means a lot.
\- Team Ilhan
**[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/io-em230426-issue-survey/?source=em230426-1-t2&refcode2=97.791427.BUc7UA&akid=97%2E791427%2EBUc7UA)**

Submit this form to [**update your contact information**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/update-contact-info/source=em-footer?t=5&akid=97%2E791427%2EBUc7UA)
Ilhan is counting on our people-powered grassroots movement to fund this campaign. If you can, stand with us by **[making a contribution today](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/io-em-footer/?refcode=em-footer&t=6&refcode2=97_791427_BUc7UA&akid=97%2E791427%2EBUc7UA)**.

# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62352999/403167914/-2095412496?refcode=AU_HTP_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230426_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTkyZDY1OTYtNTNlNC1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=mggt8_BwQHivLazSa4CfNZU7fzpFIf6V6EZOOYLg1wM=)
---
Zooey Zephyr, Montana’s only transgender lawmaker, has not been allowed to speak on the House floor, a place where she was duly elected, for over a week. Her fellow legislators have blocked her from addressing the chamber after she called them out for their transphobic and incredibly dangerous proposals to ban transition care for minors. **Today, they are expected to hold a vote on a censure or discipline for her actions. ** Conservative state legislators have made it clear that they’re not interested in political debate anymore. If you aren’t a white man, or if you say something the white men in charge disagree with, you’ll be silenced, or stripped of your power entirely. [_**It’s anti-democratic and it’s just plain wrong. We stand with Zooey Zephyr. We want her to know her voice and her advocacy are critical. name: Team Baldwin
subject: Cheddar
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
|
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=220%2E35263%2EOww3qi)
Hey Peter — Forgive the pun, but it takes a lot of _cheddar_ to win Wisconsin. And we don’t mean our state’s delicious cheese (though it is one of our team’s favorite snacks!). **But seriously, the past few elections have proven that it takes a lot of money and resources to win in Wisconsin**. Last year, Republicans spent _$77 million_ on the Senate race, only to win by one point. And earlier this year, special-interest groups spent over $15 million on Dan Kelly’s campaign for the Wisconsin Supreme Court. That race ended up breaking national records for spending in a state court race. With so much riding on Wisconsin next year, Republicans are going to spend millions to try and flip Tammy’s Senate seat. The Wisconsin GOP has dark-money donors on speed dial ready to fund attacks on Tammy’s record. We’re relying on this grassroots team to support Tammy’s campaign. That’s why we’re asking: [**Can you pitch a bit of cheddar to make sure Tammy can keep fighting for the hard-working families of Wisconsin? We have a big end-of-month deadline coming up, and your support means a lot.**](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-launch23.BP3f3F&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20230426_AM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=220%2E35263%2EOww3qi) | [DONATE 🧀](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-launch23.BP3f3F&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20230426_AM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=220%2E35263%2EOww3qi)
---
This might sound cheesy, but we mean it when we say we’re incredibly grateful for this team. Together, we’re going to send Tammy back to the Senate.
Thanks for your support!
— Team Baldwin
P.O. BOX 696 MADISON, WI 53701
**[www.tammybaldwin.com](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=2&akid=220%2E35263%2EOww3qi) | [INFO@TAMMYBALDWIN.COM](mailto:INFO@TAMMYBALDWIN.COM) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/68?t=3&akid=220%2E35263%2EOww3qi)**
PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
---

name: America First War Room
subject: CHUCK NORRIS: Is Your Money Safe?
body:
| | | **Protect Your Money Before
It's Too Late**
---
**Protect Your Money Before It's Too Late**
---
|
---
Chuck Norris here... I've spent my entire life as a proud American. America has been a great place to live, work, and raise a family. But right now, I'm deeply troubled at what I see happening to our nation--and what the future may hold for our children and grandchildren.
---
| | **Just take a look around...**
---
* We’re **$31 Trillion** in debt
* Inflation is running **over 8%**
* A recession is on our doorstep
* And the people in charge keep spending our money.

---
| | In my humble opinion... enough is enough! It’s time for all of us to think carefully about the dollars we hold. I’m not just talking about the money in your checking or savings account - I’m talking about your nest egg and retirement accounts. As governor, I’ve seen just how effective their grassroots campaigns are. ➡️ Their **_ESG Hurts_****campaign** warned millions of Americans about the dangers of “woke” ESG policies across the country, **including Florida, which is now officially _“where woke goes to die.”_**** ** ➡️ Their **_Save the Schools initiative_** highlighted the dangers of critical race theory, the necessity of parental rights, and school choice. **Florida has since passed historic legislation on parental rights and school choice.** ➡️ Their **_Save our Elections campaign_** alerted us to the vulnerabilities in our elections. **Now, Florida has the most secure and fair elections in the country.**

clean_body: They are one of the conservative organizations I trust most because of their track record of conservative wins for the American people. | | | | | Peter, I'm honored to be reaching out on behalf of Heritage Action. They are one of the conservative organizations I trust the most because of their track record of conservative wins for the American people. Where other groups make promises, Heritage Action delivers on them. As a member of Congress, Heritage Action helped me and my colleagues achieve a handful of conservative legislative victories and thwart radical left-wing legislation on numerous occasions. As governor, I’ve seen just how effective their grassroots campaigns are. ➡️ Their ESG Hurtscampaign warned millions of Americans about the dangers of “woke” ESG policies across the country, including Florida, which is now officially “where woke goes to die.” ➡️ Their Save the Schools initiative highlighted the dangers of critical race theory, the necessity of parental rights, and school choice. Florida has since passed historic legislation on parental rights and school choice. ➡️ Their Save our Elections campaign alerted us to the vulnerabilities in our elections. Now, Florida has the most secure and fair elections in the country. Heritage Action is working diligently behind the scenes to deliver win after win for the American people, and that’s exactly why YOU should support them.** ** Thank you, Ron DeSantis | | | | Heritage Action for America is a 501(c)4 non-profit organization. body:
I took the debate straight to Don Lemon, and now he's FIRED.

| **[Don Lemon FIRED from CNN.](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=84ecbbc2367c45a98248299fe1b24782&_e=TmYGDOmUeZvpj2iISS9IeIRWyBoFbYRgARZcR_XphWimkHwmmdSS6dOo5vDQslqlu38-mTsrjtURLHMJzvipepQvq1pr6YZKxu6zgbYlFnMEE7O6lkcqYvEUfckDWaBzKEE1oYBqiEJtxOaM1Y22FLsqrTJPh6-xUBg7a3qLlwH2ZG8HrVy8BBfBPn-QjLTusZ6wQRD-XV1DrOMta4WflI7iFZ6kEWCLRTBknKZRVLVfy3czS_2YKt8HzmYVpD-b1Lq3zg_VyAiXtU0MXMiWQOsrK2SmpR3sm1RAJ7LjQBXd6TIWVXspjUtRWD1hTLv5MAI7wzi4FPGeH3jMub4J5s6xgjRAsP8akDFq-NfOmd9uTJj_uF2P-66QLsogonED4AbkFrPMAb8zd57oRHwMyi78m87oQYmsAWnthvTudps%3D)**

> _**FIRST:**_ I had to teach Don Lemon a history lesson when it comes to the Second Amendment and the rights of black citizens.
>
> _**THEN:**_ Don Lemon told me I couldn't speak the truth because I am not a black American. _**I reject that.**_
>
> _**NOW:**_ Don Lemon is OUT at CNN.
Fellow American, I am not afraid to bring the debate to anyone who is willing to talk about the important issues, but I won't back down.

I am committed to bringing fresh, radical ideas to the table that will help put America back on track. But I can't do it without your support.

**[In the next 30 minutes, will you chip in $1 or more to make sure we can continue to take the debate to the Left?](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=84ecbbc2367c45a98248299fe1b24782&_e=TmYGDOmUeZvpj2iISS9IeIRWyBoFbYRgARZcR_XphWimkHwmmdSS6dOo5vDQslqlu38-mTsrjtURLHMJzvipepQvq1pr6YZKxu6zgbYlFnMEE7O6lkcqYvEUfckDWaBzKEE1oYBqiEJtxOaM1Y22FLsqrTJPh6-xUBg7a3qLlwH2ZG8HrVy8BBfBPn-QjLTusZ6wQRD-XV1DrOMta4WflI7iFZ6kEWCLRTBknKZRVLVfy3czS_2YKt8HzmYVpD-birGtbKZssvYQEF4tJU9Vl2lFBqIpKyGBqN846-YBpTJd0plv1sDfp7r2_OujrO9V1rZT8vkeEp56xPpZ_M2kgYsjnzNnOZ3f-wuQ2vb7FvSO6HsINRVFLUxn133I1DvNDCDEp0fQvvorTgstmz7CZREvNTJalgf1Z6AbrblkIVU%3D)**

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

name: Adrastos, Campaign Manager for Team Cori
subject: Your $22.49 is powerful
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress
body:
We're proud of this number.
#
Hi Peter — it’s Adrastos, Cori’s Campaign Manager.
Not every campaign would share this: Our average donation for April is just **$22.49**.
[](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230426.SOGFP_&refcode=em20230426-2584&t=1&akid=2584%2E1082990%2EeqJUmp)
**We're proud of this number, Peter.** It's what makes our campaign different. We don’t accept a single cent from corporate PACs — and unlike many of her colleagues in Congress, Cori doesn't rely on billionaires to fund her work.
Instead, we’re funded by folks like you chipping in $5, $15, and $25 donations. This month, our campaign received donations from a nurse, a retired teacher, a social worker, and a college student — the very folks that Cori is fighting for every day.
**What do you say? Can you make your first donation of $22.49 — or whatever you can afford — to support Cori today?**
**[Yes, I’ll chip in!](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230426.SOGFP_&refcode=em20230426-2584&t=2&akid=2584%2E1082990%2EeqJUmp)**
**$22.49** might not seem like a lot, but **there’s _a lot_ of power in that number.**
Your **$22.49** donations are why Cori is able to push for policies that center everyday people (not wealthy donors) in Congress.
Your **$22.49** donations are why Cori is able to focus on organizing and legislating for bold solutions like a Green New Deal and Medicare for All.
Your **$22.49** donations are why we’re making historic progress pushing the needle on issues including racial justice, workers' rights, health care, and so much more. **That’s powerful, Peter.**
If we keep working like this, putting our **$22.49** donations together — we can transform our politics and bring transformative change to our communities.
**So I'm asking:** [**If you can afford it, will you chip in $22.49 or anything you can to support Cori and help power our movement today?**](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230426.SOGFP_&refcode=em20230426-2584&t=3&akid=2584%2E1082990%2EeqJUmp)
**[Donate $22.49 »](https://act.coribush.org/go/2541?c0=cori-em-20230426.LuSScl&refcode=em20230426-2584&t=4&akid=2584%2E1082990%2EeqJUmp)**
**[Donate another amount »](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230426.SOGFP_&refcode=em20230426-2584&t=5&akid=2584%2E1082990%2EeqJUmp)**
Thank you for all of your support.
—Adrastos

**[Contribute ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cori-em-20230426?refcode=em20230426-2584-footer&t=6&refcode2=2584_1082990_eqJUmp&akid=2584%2E1082990%2EeqJUmp) **

name: =?utf-8?Q?Brady=20Batt=2C=20Executive=20Director?=
subject: One Week Left to Become a 2023 Sustaining Member!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Washington State Republican Party
body:
Join the WSRP and become a 2023 Sustaining Member ASAP

http://wsrp.org
Ballots Are Out, Vote By November 2nd!

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=WeGlgXqOx-Y

With ballots out, now is the perfect time to get out there and volunteer on a conservative campaign. Every door you knock on in these local races matter a lot and the results of this election year will be used as a bellwether for the 2022 midterms.

We are also hosting another WSRP Statewide Day Of Action on Saturday, October 30th! Bring a friend or neighbor to volunteer for a few hours to help local conservatives win in November! Sign up here to join our Statewide Day Of Action! (https://form.jotform.com/212737084845058)
State Sen. Gildon On Vaccine Mandates
https://soundcloud.com/user-450836972/wagop-report-state-sen-chris-gildon-on-vaccine-mandates-and-democrat-anti-policing-laws
State Senator Chris Gildon (R - Puyallup) joins the podcast this week to discuss vaccine mandates, anti-policing laws, the Long-Term Care Tax, and how he got his start in politics. WAGOP is now on Apple Podcasts and Spotify, follow us and never miss an episode! Listen here. (https://soundcloud.com/user-450836972/wagop-report-state-sen-chris-gildon-on-vaccine-mandates-and-democrat-anti-policing-laws)
Republican Leaders Fight Inslee's Mandate
Thanks to our Republican leaders in the State House and Senate for fighting back and offering a strong rebuke of Inslee's harmful vaccine mandate. Below is an excerpt of their most recent statement to the press:

“We are already experiencing higher prices and empty shelves partially as a result of COVID's shutdowns and workforce shortages. Today's deadline, with its unnecessarily hardline consequences, will only make that worse when hundreds, if not thousands, lose their jobs and are denied unemployment benefits. It also threatens public safety by reducing our police forces at a time when crime is already rising. People feel unsafe. They are afraid of what criminals will do when there are even fewer law enforcement officers to respond. And they are worried about people's chances of survival if there aren't enough first responders to help in an emergency. The governor underestimates the potential impact of his actions.

“Coercion, intimidation, threats and public shaming are not tactics a leader should be using against the people. The governor's obvious disdain for those who are choosing to lose their jobs rather than compromise their right to make their own medical decisions is unhelpful. He is dividing the public – segregating us and turning people against each other. Yesterday, even unvaccinated health-care workers were heroes. Today, they become villains in the governor's narrative."

Read the full statement. (https://jtwilcox.houserepublicans.wa.gov/2021/10/18/republican-leaders-todays-vaccine-deadline-threatens-critical-services-public-safety/?fbclid=IwAR3WxI9H29hbbmfbZhdkDS9QjqdVd2TIRCdjNjUkUlLdeThtbUjK_WBWJuw)
Smiley Campaign Shows Grassroots Support In Latest Fundraising Quarter
Tiffany Smiley is fighting hard to retire Patty Murray and her latest fundraising numbers show not only has Tiffany raised more than $1.6 million but she also has unequivocal grassroots support, with over 10,000 donors from Washington State. Flipping a U.S. Senate seat is hard work but Tiffany has shown in the only 5 months since starting her campaign, that she is a force to be reckoned with. Learn more about how Tiffany stands on the issues here (https://www.smileyforwashington.com/issues) .
Contact:
Steve Johnson
Communications Director
Washington State Republican Party
(425) 460-0570
steve@wsrp.org (mailto:steve@wsrp.org)

============================================================

name: Bryce Reeves
subject: Will you support the fight against Communist China?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF BRYCE REEVES
body:
Peter, Can we Count on YOU to Support the only Candidate in the Race that has Fought Against Communist China?ENDORSE BRYCEFriend, It is hard to believe we are less than 2 weeks away from the Republican Firehouse Primary on Saturday, May 6th.
| | |
---
| | [](https://j0l1y7h.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fbrycereeves.com/1/01000187bea0dc76-80d05e72-cafb-4c2e-82b0-448f7b5cf8a9-000000/vGhMAoKwn3-yQ39LLHuEPa0OsIk=319)
---
| |
---
| | |
---
| **Peter, Can we Count on YOU to Support the only Candidate in the Race that has Fought Against Communist China?**
---
| | [ENDORSE BRYCE](https://j0l1y7h.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Ffriends-of-bryce-reeves%2Fendorse/1/01000187bea0dc76-80d05e72-cafb-4c2e-82b0-448f7b5cf8a9-000000/6ikGo0du8vODaNqo_QqSSKN8B3o=319)
---
| Friend, It is hard to believe we are less than 2 weeks away from the Republican Firehouse Primary on Saturday, May 6th. I want to take a second to thank all of you for your continuous support and prayers. Our campaign would not have been able to accomplish all that we have without your generosity. It is often too easy for us to forget that it is because of **YOU** that we are able to accomplish so much. Now, I would like to take a second to talk to you about the state of our race: WE ARE WINNING. But the race is far from over. If you are unaware, my opponent, a self proclaimed “Republican” has resulted to smear tactics to try to weaken my support base. Just yesterday, then again this afternoon he sent out mass texts spreading lies and misinformation to try to manipulate **YOU** into voting for **him**. What my opponent failed to realize, however, is that **_Virginia Republicans are too smart to fall for this divisive rhetoric._ **Now more than ever we need to come together as a party and work to pass strong republican legislation. Legislation that protects the unborn, strengthens our economy, and makes Virginians' lives SAFER, BETTER, and EASIER. On May 6th you will have the opportunity to do just that. From now until election day we have **ONE GOAL.... TO GET OUT THE VOTE**. With only 3 polling locations and 6 hours to vote it is more important than ever that we inform voters of where and when to get out and support our cause. However, we can't do that without your help. Spread the word. Forward this email to your friends, family, and colleagues and inform them on just how important this election is. Finally, if you are financially able, please consider donating to our campaign. Getting out the Vote isn't easy and to do so is going to require a lot of financial commitment. Whether it is $28, $280, or $2,800, whatever you are able to contribute will allow us to reach another voter and ensure they are they are informed. I look forward to celebrating our success with you on the evening of May 6th. Your Humble Servant,
---
| | |
---
| Bryce E. ReevesSenator17th Senatorial District of VA(540) 645-8440
---
| | [DONATE $28](https://j0l1y7h.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Ffriends-of-bryce-reeves%2Fdeadline/1/01000187bea0dc76-80d05e72-cafb-4c2e-82b0-448f7b5cf8a9-000000/r_tRAtKxGx4NVTwlG3Qiwa92evA=319)
---
| | [DONATE $280](https://j0l1y7h.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Ffriends-of-bryce-reeves%2Fdeadline/2/01000187bea0dc76-80d05e72-cafb-4c2e-82b0-448f7b5cf8a9-000000/Zq0dUNjKtjHa6tmBzrZfH6xCxmY=319)
---

clean_body: Peter, Can we Count on YOU to Support the only Candidate in the Race that has Fought Against Communist China?ENDORSE BRYCEFriend, It is hard to believe we are less than 2 weeks away from the Republican Firehouse Primary on Saturday, May 6th. | | | | | | | | | | | Peter, Can we Count on YOU to Support the only Candidate in the Race that has Fought Against Communist China? | | | Friend, It is hard to believe we are less than 2 weeks away from the Republican Firehouse Primary on Saturday, May 6th. I want to take a second to thank all of you for your continuous support and prayers. Our campaign would not have been able to accomplish all that we have without your generosity. It is often too easy for us to forget that it is because of YOU that we are able to accomplish so much. Now, I would like to take a second to talk to you about the state of our race: WE ARE WINNING. But the race is far from over. If you are unaware, my opponent, a self proclaimed “Republican” has resulted to smear tactics to try to weaken my support base. Just yesterday, then again this afternoon he sent out mass texts spreading lies and misinformation to try to manipulate YOU into voting for him. What my opponent failed to realize, however, is that Virginia Republicans are too smart to fall for this divisive rhetoric. Now more than ever we need to come together as a party and work to pass strong republican legislation. Legislation that protects the unborn, strengthens our economy, and makes Virginians' lives SAFER, BETTER, and EASIER. On May 6th you will have the opportunity to do just that. From now until election day we have ONE GOAL.... TO GET OUT THE VOTE. With only 3 polling locations and 6 hours to vote it is more important than ever that we inform voters of where and when to get out and support our cause. However, we can't do that without your help. Spread the word. Forward this email to your friends, family, and colleagues and inform them on just how important this election is. Finally, if you are financially able, please consider donating to our campaign. Getting out the Vote isn't easy and to do so is going to require a lot of financial commitment. Whether it is $28, $280, or $2,800, whatever you are able to contribute will allow us to reach another voter and ensure they are they are informed. I look forward to celebrating our success with you on the evening of May 6th. Your Humble Servant, | | | | Bryce E. ReevesSenator17th Senatorial District of VA(540) 645-8440 | | | | | | | | | | | | | | P.O. Box 7021 Fredericksburg, VA 22404, United States | | PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF BRYCE REEVES | | or

name: Al Franken via Blue Amp Action
subject: Here’s 5 reasons why 2022 was a hard year to win in New York as a Democrat, and why my friend and former Senate counsel Josh Riley can win in 2024.
body:
We can flip this House district
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[ unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td088156a-936a-46a8-a999-e9aa1906ef34/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | _Hi! Cliff here, and we have a special guest who'd like to speak with you! A_ _s they say in the business Al used to be in, Senator Franken, take it away!......._ [__](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf4bf7433-078a-476a-92c7-4cc1741a5f27/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Dear Person Who Opens My Email, My friend and former Senate counsel Josh Riley just made a BIG announcement. Josh is running for Congress in New York’s 19th District — a key district to taking back the House in 2024. He ran for the seat last cycle in his first political race, nearly defeating a 30-year career politician and Republican Marcus Molinaro – losing 50.8% to 49.2% in a district where some Democrats at the top of the ticket lost by more than 6 points. Josh will win this time! And I will give you five reasons why 2024 promises to be better than 2022. **[But first, let’s help Josh’s 2024 campaign get off to a great start. Will you join me right now by splitting a contribution of $10 or more between Josh Riley and Blue Amp Action right now? He’s not taking corporate PAC money and he’s counting on individual supporters like you and me, Peter.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T304c7bde-b022-4659-b0e8-7da94dde087d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T54591e4c-40e3-48ed-bfdb-520fa426d055/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| Here are five reasons why 2022 was a seriously hard year to win in New York as a Democrat, and why it’s so impressive Josh came as close to winning as he did:
1. **Redistricting**. Last cycle, the New York State Legislature drew a congressional map that the New York State Courts deemed too partisan — so they threw it out and redrew it themselves. Unfortunately, for five months Josh had been running in the wrong damn district! The only good part is that the working-class town Josh grew up in remained in the newly formed 19th District. But Josh had a whole bunch of new territory in which to make himself known.
2. **Primaries**. Josh had to win an expensive primary challenge in late August against a strong opponent. Still, Josh won the primary by a nearly two-to-one margin. By working his butt off, not that he had much of a butt to start with—have you seen this guy? Beanpole!
3. **Marc Molinaro**. Josh’s Republican opponent in the general election had already been a State Assembly Member, County Executive and GOP candidate for governor in 2018, losing to then-Governor Cuomo. Molinaro gained wide name recognition and had no challengers in his 2022 primary. But now he has a record to run on–and it’s not a good one. He’s voting 95% of the time with Marjorie Taylor-Greene!
4. **Crazy GOP Attack Ads**. Republicans had momentum statewide, and they ran tons of deeply dishonest dark money ads that said crap like, “Josh Riley’s allies want to defund the police.” I don’t know who Josh’s “allies” are but Josh and I funded the police—getting crisis intervention training and bullet proof vests for local police departments across the country. It was completely false, and it was sickening.
5. **Midterm vs. Presidential Years**. 2024 will not be a midterm! Ultimately, too many New York Democrats didn’t show up in a number of races this past cycle. But this time, not only is the presidency on the line – so is the Supreme Court. You can bet Democrats will turn out!

So now that you know how tough 2022 was — and how CLOSE Josh came to pulling it off — are you ready to join me in supporting Josh for 2024? **[Split a contribution to support Blue Amp Action and Josh’s campaign — he’s going to win one of the most important races in America for 2024 and I want you to be a part of it.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T98543780-292d-4baf-8539-f87c92dde356/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** Thanks, Al [**P.S. I like the P.S. because it’s one more opportunity to ask for a donation. So donate now!**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb19cfb9d-8508-4102-a46c-ec35fd305e88/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T923b5bdd-c6e5-4aa1-96d1-f08813a98ecd/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country.
---
|
---
| | Follow Us | [](https://twitter.com/intent/follow?screen_name=cliffschecter)| [](https://linkedin.com/in/cliffschecter-0873a448/)
---|---

1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212
513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com

name: Team IDCCA
subject: DeSantis thinks he can bring his extremism to Illinois
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Illinois Democratic County Chairs' Association
body:
Let's make it backfire...

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/hotNLLjwlQJM9SYTZyY58GCfmYDzuzZ6KRvqPK85dB4=/CbB6EArrx_0seDhfSdVDzYUFkykNqfBNbW3UXD699X4=?refcode=EM_FR_230426DesantisPeoria1_TEAM_90DO_6_NG_B_Logo)
Fellow Democrats,

Governor Ron DeSantis is waging war on his own state with a radical, hateful agenda which he clearly hopes will rally the GOP's base to him in 2024.

Now just months after he jetted in to speak to the Illinois Fraternal Order of Police, he's planning to come back to our state to garner support from the IL GOP ahead of the Presidential election cycle. He will be sure to highlight all the extreme measures he supports taking away freedoms.

Just this month, he passed a six-week abortion ban that will almost completely eliminate this reproductive health care in Florida. Soon, he plans to sign a bill prohibiting investment strategies in Florida that he has deemed as "woke."

The reasonable people of Illinois will stand up to hate.

**[Fellow Democrats, we're going to make this visit backfire on both him and the IL GOP by raising at least $3,000 before his speech at the May 12th Peoria & Tazewell Counties Republican "Lincoln Day" Dinner, allowing us to provide resources to our County Parties ahead of 2024. Can you pitch in $10 or more today to help us hit this goal and show his hate is not welcome here?](https://act.myngp.com/el/hotNLLjwlQJM9SYTZyY58GCfmYDzuzZ6KRvqPK85dB4=/CbB6EArrx_0seDhfSdVDzYUFkykNqfBNbW3UXD699X4=?refcode=EM_FR_230426DesantisPeoria1_TEAM_90DO_6_NG_B_L1&amount=10)**
[**DONATE NOW**](https://act.myngp.com/el/hotNLLjwlQJM9SYTZyY58GCfmYDzuzZ6KRvqPK85dB4=/CbB6EArrx_0seDhfSdVDzYUFkykNqfBNbW3UXD699X4=?refcode=EM_FR_230426DesantisPeoria1_TEAM_90DO_6_NG_B_B1&amount=10)
But that's not all DeSantis is doing, he seems to be anti-business and vengeful as well. When he hasn't been busy campaigning out-of-state or stripping his state's residents of their rights in the middle of the night, DeSantis is waging a public war against family-friendly Disney, Central Florida's biggest employer and taxpayer, just for denouncing his hateful "Don't Say Gay" bill.

With his approval plummeting among the pro-Trumpian GOP base he worked so hard to impress, coupled with his donors abandoning ship, he took his petty vendetta to a new level against the company by threatening to **build a state prison on its border.**

**[While DeSantis spends his time abusing his power and courting extremists, Florida suffers. Now he wants to bring the politics of fear and loathing to Illinois, and Republican county parties are welcoming him with open arms trying to raise money off his visit to bolster their at home effort to elect like-minded extremists! clean_body: Let's make it backfire... Fellow Democrats, Governor Ron DeSantis is waging war on his own state with a radical, hateful agenda which he clearly hopes will rally the GOP's base to him in 2024. Now just months after he jetted in to speak to the Illinois Fraternal Order of Police, he's planning to come back to our state to garner support from the IL GOP ahead of the Presidential election cycle. He will be sure to highlight all the extreme measures he supports taking away freedoms. Just this month, he passed a six-week abortion ban that will almost completely eliminate this reproductive health care in Florida. Soon, he plans to sign a bill prohibiting investment strategies in Florida that he has deemed as "woke." The reasonable people of Illinois will stand up to hate. But that's not all DeSantis is doing, he seems to be anti-business and vengeful as well. When he hasn't been busy campaigning out-of-state or stripping his state's residents of their rights in the middle of the night, DeSantis is waging a public war against family-friendly Disney, Central Florida's biggest employer and taxpayer, just for denouncing his hateful "Don't Say Gay" bill. With his approval plummeting among the pro-Trumpian GOP base he worked so hard to impress, coupled with his donors abandoning ship, he took his petty vendetta to a new level against the company by threatening to build a state prison on its border. name: Replace Sinema
subject: Who we are
body:
We’re the only national PAC dedicated entirely to holding Kyrsten Sinema accountable and replacing her with a real Democrat | | | Peter – Based on multiple polls (and general vibes), it’s clear we’re not the only ones who are ready to oust Kyrsten Sinema in 2024. But **we are the only national PAC dedicated****entirely****to holding Sinema accountable for her obstruction and replacing her with a real Democrat.** **And we have a great Democratic candidate in Ruben Gallego, so we’re doing everything we can to make sure he succeeds.[_Help us win._](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wbtoFN1u-QDazYBJJ_azE2btfiwdUU_mnSDDdEB1HupVQTh7Y9ZM1lpTYDrho4m5l2FzvbkgPuGrX6acOo9plVFcPzBETu1o3hkd84lwi6KTPremBFpDg5RET2BIHRvZlJr6Ffge6kd1IFukzGnDTFBhl5ax01Ibf6aHfS7wOSDGLlcIn_gQgNnIptHh-0TDRzqMcbbAzNl-nLSc0Ne4H7QStDrEtIStnyyVUDd0HdZnahVRbyjfkp5_AXTfF0CZk/3vo/_UOE-hAWSz2SQVfiDmkgQA/h0/WvYkxpzrRkRiuBkHMUnAvhr7knV4GlsRXGKqrTNguNA)** Since we launched in 2021, we’ve put in the work to build a top-notch research and communications operation that has made media outlets in Arizona and across the country take notice. Just last week, **a TV reporter in Phoenix asked Sinema about research we uncovered related to her campaign spending** on high-end restaurants, hotels, and European vacations. Of course, she dodged the question. Through our work, we’ve educated Arizonans about Sinema’s ties to Wall Street, her private equity donors, and even her abusive treatment of staff, which has led to an ethics complaint. [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wbtoFN1u-QDazYBJJ_azE2WeazZMuWYQlnPH9us_AnedzzfhOC6C6xpz70TXaxlq797qXHC99RmdNx0zXHZTXPSD2poWsoHPNuoFjKKtXqgEBRZH1GfYvnsn9cK-6akqGShJoBkO3xwumwt6fFeYoxYId_rE6rG6WR4vzP9aIERTx1NLfi_vK_TCeakt53MY0G57Yas7JkBoGB-qU0qw4gn3SfXJG7ukuygh1QRSqCm2fvKX4MyvhnIg86Qhoz5BA/3vo/_UOE-hAWSz2SQVfiDmkgQA/h1/ZvVvLpsD_t6rF3-RA6A77AK_DsJT5X7hEXdCdaZSenE)In addition, we’ve worked with grassroots partners on the ground across Arizona to hold Sinema accountable, and we formed an advisory council of leaders from respected groups like LUCHA, Progress Arizona, Our Voice Our Vote, Rural Arizona Action, and others. First, we were called the Primary Sinema PAC, and we did the work to make sure Sinema couldn’t win a Democratic primary. So, when Sinema quit the party (because she knew she couldn’t win), we changed our name to Replace Sinema because now we have to defeat her in a three-way race. **This work hasn’t always been easy, and it takes a lot of people power plus resources.** We couldn’t do it without thousands of supporters like you. We’re proud that over 17,000 people have donated to us, and our average grassroots donation is just $17. **_[Help us make sure Arizonans know Kyrsten Sinema’s real record >>>](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wbtoFN1u-QDazYBJJ_azE2lxKHSqmdLcDa5J3a_8XvV4cWBCQFeLVSdzOZcox5Xds594ES3NtcVgV_MAdfsR5D770LJ_G2zpK-Z9ea2iHKg5FRm_JYo5smMzeMJ7H9Ey710LnwSSFqUVnWUzrNCKl4cV3mamY2BhKeF6CvW0-62XbMAB6Hlf0DCrquxwbqFqBMQ1JvJO7fiT8Y0gtxKeGQZxzuANbJkJFDdIWa5POjFvnzX1YqkUCmTgYYFOJ4O4A/3vo/_UOE-hAWSz2SQVfiDmkgQA/h2/aNZR4M3Nks60Cm40m7eLAzAzt4kmJwaJUv14q2uXIP0)_** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Chip in $10 now](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wbtoFN1u-QDazYBJJ_azE2jvU3gI5UWCUY0jQYTwoxEPqAtCyrPCmh3hqZCxc2xRpIheYsI2jVV0kpBUqMRZ9bOtfVRVBsrM0JLjp6onH60AMcWKcU0z3AIvxFRAg1ouP9YM519VZW_8FXEVUQj00fAUX8t_oTjx3c_XIdRnmYmfeQGb24Pfq6dEoFnQAx6T2j_oZSmOAuCA_cM8K7TmjUkpF9961KukpPJj3zZFqgIfN8_iriIBnnflaoZhGH15ruDp-vcYnS1N3Ho7IypHtFPl1hSAh2R9RenDtl7wR4ww/3vo/_UOE-hAWSz2SQVfiDmkgQA/h3/vaexOwAWvkqD16yxHWWyKL3Vy6jTbBj_RHzZRmDvUVc)

| [other amount](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wbtoFN1u-QDazYBJJ_azE2Ots81RawIVQuUnq0Hw2TcteWrvOcX2bRLpZJv0Mu24Exe5W7RyF_TNEoq0RUqk7GMAlNlCe1Jei7Moec9OrWc7wYw2Zp1y_mRjOuqLAl-c_xnhzVeTr6iBKnTZ_xzoqYlhc_aPveZ8LFuYS7xMJyJzjMzkLP3lIeCoy-LT8Nqmkkzmpnt2YxN4UYtVm7Rr3uzxqIZU8OjFSbcrElKpVwwNaUMURJtsDr9J8__IwSkcQy0xjXTR5cbZskpdRPfHtx/3vo/_UOE-hAWSz2SQVfiDmkgQA/h8/Eh-05lnvVMS64rKSjMrhKZFtFGsPhI8hJf0TeIIVGgE)

**We're in this because the stakes are SO high.** First of all, Arizona deserves a Senator who will answer to constituents, not Wall Street and corporate donors. Arizona deserves a Senator who holds more town hall meetings than “donor retreats” and who is more concerned about Arizona families than planning their next donor-funded European vacation or booking their weekly massage.

And of course, winning this seat is critical not only for Arizona but for Democrats across the country.**We absolutely must win this seat if we’re going to save the Senate Majority for Democrats.** But Sinema is forcing a three-way race that could jeopardize Democrats’ chances and hand the seat to the Republicans.

**In a three-way race between Ruben Gallego, Kyrsten Sinema, and Kari Lake or Mark Lamb – we need to make sure that Ruben wins!**
That’s why we’re continuing to work hard every day to weaken Sinema’s standing in the polls, and why we’ve **intentionally chosen to work with and invest in grassroots groups in Arizona** who are already experts at organizing and voter outreach. Together, we’re building the infrastructure we need in order to win.
**_[Give today to defeat Kyrsten Sinema.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wbtoFN1u-QDazYBJJ_azE2zXTFB34ZsaLT30nNd1_gojOQOn2R_bEGwMWolipXoQ7KDUNLCsORsqo64UUyBa5CAnWSt4LD1y8l6HM3zBa_REZdEURNFOHpNvzQGYaDmjwvPkipbmy109DG_6jP-09d6I80YqzbWm9sO0YkdgbjsjK8LLnBMQs1a36FrXT6YbkNOdW3ba8IiadSZXAOqEZUegCdlkJniaoa2PgFjjFORs_8LS9otE_DK3QZeVyPqLM/3vo/_UOE-hAWSz2SQVfiDmkgQA/h9/RI_5bE10xXGA1i5QEJonhpZGARwNHjHz8F_dp8Hrpc0)_**
Thank you for everything you’ve done to help. We’re looking forward to replacing Sinema with the Senator that Arizona deserves.
-Replace Sinema & Change for Arizona 2024 PAC

name: Doug Emhoff
subject: You're an essential part of this team, Peter, which is whyI’m asking you directly:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
In my role as the first-ever Second Gentleman of the United States, I get a front-row seat to see just how hard Joe and Kamala are working together to lead this country and deliver results for working families. | | |
---
Hey Peter, it’s Doug. In my role as the first-ever Second Gentleman of the United States, I get a front-row seat to see just how hard Joe and Kamala are working together to lead this country and deliver results for working families. I’ve had the honor and privilege of hitting the road across the country these last two years to meet with people and hear directly from them about the issues that are affecting them -- and the positive impacts they’re already feeling thanks to Joe and Kamala’s leadership. **We’ve accomplished so much together -- but we can’t slow down now, not with so much on the line. That’s why I’m reaching out today to ask you to support Joe and Kamala’s reelection campaign:** **[We’re counting on grassroots donors to power this campaign. Peter,

The 2024 elections are still 18 months away. But the fight for America’s future is on.

Key races across the country are already heating up – and with so much on the line and a tremendous opportunity in front of us every single day matters!

Here at Team Tuberville, we’re out front in the battle to **SAVE THE SENATE**.

Our April end-of-month fundraising deadline is coming up fast this Sunday, and we’re looking for an additional 35 supporters to step up and pitch in toward our goal today.
[**Will you make a secure donation to fuel our fight?**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/db0dfc5ab75af330/af00a39a2f4ed4dac3d6b838967d376c/33013)

name: Bob Casey
subject: I hope you’ll let me explain
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
Defending this seat is going to take all of us. [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62356132/403179231/-744169294?refcode=Header&ms=Header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YWY3NmNmZC01YmU0LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7SJITFUz2AEtAMQfidbBwXavok2eJ4wNe4_NdWw0KXU=&emci=0aab2dc4-aee3-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=5af76cfd-5be4-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=8943725) Peter, we’re less than a week away from the first end-of-month deadline of our re-election campaign. I hope you will let me explain why it’s so important. I’m not done fighting for Pennsylvania. We still have more work to do to cut through the gridlock, take on the powerful special interests, and deliver real results for Pennsylvanians. **But defending this seat — and our Senate majority — is going to take all of us.** No matter who my Republican opponent is, this is sure to be one of the most competitive and expensive Senate elections in the country. I need serious grassroots support from every corner to pull through. **[Our goal is simple: $20,000 raised online before the clock strikes midnight on April 30. Will you please donate any amount now to ensure we hit our goal?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62356133/403179232/-590323622?refcode=em20230426-1-ngp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YWY3NmNmZC01YmU0LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7SJITFUz2AEtAMQfidbBwXavok2eJ4wNe4_NdWw0KXU=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, we'll process your donation to Bob Casey immediately:_ | | [**$5**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62356134/403179233/-590323622?refcode=em20230426-1-ngp&express_lane=true&amount=5&amounts=5,10,25,50,100&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YWY3NmNmZC01YmU0LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7SJITFUz2AEtAMQfidbBwXavok2eJ4wNe4_NdWw0KXU=)

[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..tkNTfuGmps2yKjVK5Wv6u1GFszX8qkHtHjLvsifVxfU?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=114600482)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/0aa6ed19-3873-4a47-b090-e70fc681af94?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
There is an insurance crisis in the state of Florida. Residents who can no longer afford rising home insurance rates are rushing to get covered through Citizens Insurance - a state insurer established by the Florida Legislature in August 2002 - and now the largest insurer in the state of Florida.
Headquartered in Tallahassee, Florida, Citizens Insurance is a not for profit, tax-exempt insurer of last resort for home owners who are unable to obtain home insurance coverage elsewhere. As a government entity, Citizens Insurance is [overseen](https://substack.com/redirect/697bbdab-141f-42d9-b9ad-9d5fbede45ef?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) by the Governor of Florida, and the Governor's cabinet oversees and appoints the Board of Governors for Citizens Insurance.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/f20d6d52-d411-4bbe-8781-a0f460a235fe?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
[According to their website,](https://substack.com/redirect/697bbdab-141f-42d9-b9ad-9d5fbede45ef?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
> "Citizens operates according to statutory requirements established by the Florida Legislature and is governed by a Board of Governors. The board administers a [Plan of Operation](https://substack.com/redirect/af15bd27-50eb-41e9-ba02-e4b675e5c8a7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) approved by the Florida Financial Services Commission, an oversight panel made up of the Governor, Chief Financial Officer, Attorney General and Commissioner of Agriculture."
In September 2022, Citizens announced it was practically insolvent. At a Board of Governors meeting, the CEO of Citizens Insurance, Barry Gilway, said the organization had reached 1.055 million policies -- more than double the number of two years prior -- as private insurers continue dropping clients in an effort to curb financial losses. Gilway also said that private property insurers were projected to have $1 billion in losses in 2022. As more insurance companies are declared insolvent, Floridians are flocking to Citizens.
This presents a major problem for Florida, especially post Hurricane Ian. Policy holders are paying into Citizens, while Citizens itself is near insolvency. Ultimately, this means that over one million Floridians are paying for insurance coverage that isn't guaranteed to them, because Citizens doesn't have enough money in reserves to cover every consumer's claim in the aftermath of a catastrophic event like Hurricane Ian.
Following [Ian](https://substack.com/redirect/83d28145-6bd8-4763-af7f-486f41c77c2a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in October 2022, Citizen's policy count exceeded 1.1 million. The company, post Ian, is projected to insure 15 percent of the insurance market in Florida by the end of 2023.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/2a2f426e-07d2-4106-b354-cd577274ac6c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
This crisis is becoming so severe that it prompted Governor DeSantis [to call for an emergency legislative session on April 26, 2022](https://substack.com/redirect/bb3aa122-70dc-47c3-af85-ce1482aa447a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to address concerns "related to property insurance, reinsurance, changes to the Florida Building Code to improve the affordability of property insurance, the Office of Insurance Regulation, civil remedies, and appropriations." The special legislative session was scheduled to commence at 9:00 a.m., Monday, May 23rd, 2022, and end no later than 11:59 p.m., Friday, May 27th, 2022.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/6d26349c-6085-4f6b-a160-50cf256d7c09?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
At this time, Barry Gillway was still the CEO of Citizen's Insurance.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/c07056f2-f794-43c3-bab1-0ace80d61127?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Outrage flowed during the special legislative session. Florida homeowners viewed the event as a means to aide insurance companies, as opposed to lowering rates for homeowners in Florida who are paying for insurance that cannot cover their claims. In other words, Citizens was and is still selling policies to homeowners, knowing they don't have enough reserves to cover policy holders, and also knowing that Citizens is not financially solvent.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..tkNTfuGmps2yKjVK5Wv6u1GFszX8qkHtHjLvsifVxfU?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=114600482)
In any business transaction, customers have the right to sue if they are not given a product as advertised that they paid for. In March 2023 while speaking at a press conference, [Governor DeSantis casually mentioned for the first time that Citizens Insurance is not solvent](https://substack.com/redirect/7afab216-7962-4959-9b99-f1c8c8b68a67?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Meanwhile, Citizens continues to sell insurance policies. This could be grounds for Floridians who have Citizens policies to sue over fraudulent, bait and switch business practices. Citizens surely understands this, which is why, in conjunction with Governor DeSantis, Gilway alongside the Governor, lobbied for legislation that provides legal immunity to Citizens Insurance over claims of fraud and willful tort.
**LOBBYING THEMSELVES, FOR THEMSELVES?**
Making matters worse, Governor DeSantis, his cabinet, and Barry Gilway have known since at least 2019 that Citizens was on the verge of being insolvent, and have done nothing to address it. In fact, pertinent information has been hidden away from Florida's voting public. Not only has the state failed to address the issue of insolvency, but state leaders have declined to perform Reserve Audits upon request from insurance claims professionals.
DeSantis and his cabinet - which includes Florida Attorney General Ashley Moody and Florida's Chief Financial Officer (CFO) JImmy Patronis- committed potential ethics violations by allowing for Gilway to serve as CEO of Citizens while he was also a registered lobbyist. Gilway does not appear to have ever disclosed his lobbying publicly during the years he served as CEO if Citizens, between 2012-2022. Research for this article has confirmed Gilway was a registered lobbyist for Citizens the entire time he was CEO. This fact was never disclosed anywhere on the Citizens website, nor in the press. As a registered lobbyist while serving as CEO, Gilway was lobbying in support of Governor Ron DeSantis's legislative efforts, including a recent bailout for insurance companies.
In March 2023, Governor DeSantis signed House Bill 837, internally known as the Civil Remedies Bill, which passed in the Senate by a 23-15 vote. This legislation enacted significant changes to civil litigation practice in Florida, and helps protect insurance companies and businesses from lawsuits. Under this new, heavily-lobbied-for legislation, negligence alone does not demonstrate bad faith, according to [a press release from the Governor's office.](https://substack.com/redirect/71a24e2a-bf75-4e15-92db-0b927e078932?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
As per the Citizens Enabling Statute, Citizens policy holders can only sue for malicious prosecution, willful tort, and fraud.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/28c14984-af5d-4d7e-8ace-a4a192d0694c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The bailout is so absurd, that it even promoted public condemnation from President Donald Trump who said, "RINO Ron DeSanctimonious is delivering the biggest insurance company BAILOUT to Globalist Insurance Companies, IN HISTORY. He's also crushed Florida homeowners whose houses were destroyed in the Hurricane-- They're getting pennies on the dollar. His insurance Commissioner does NOTHING, while Florida's lives are ruined. This is the worst Insurance Scam in the entire Country!"
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..tkNTfuGmps2yKjVK5Wv6u1GFszX8qkHtHjLvsifVxfU?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=114600482)
The Governor signed the measure (HB 837) in Tallahassee without the usual public ceremony that Governor DeSantis has become known for. The measure reduces from four years to two years a statute of limitations for filing negligence lawsuits, and largely eliminates "one-way attorney" fees that insurers can have to pay to cover the costs of plaintiffs' lawyers. The result is not dissimilar to the 2008 banking crisis, where bad faith actors in the financial world received bailouts and protections from prosecution.
Nor does the law signed by DeSantis lower insurance premiums. It simply hurts Floridians seeking compensation from businesses that have harmed them.
"After four years in Tallahassee, and two special sessions, Ron DeSantis continues to ignore the worsening property insurance crisis in Florida. Now, he's signing legislation that makes it easier for insurance companies to rip off their policyholders and get away with it," said Florida Democratic Party spokesperson Devon Cruz. "Once again, DeSantis sides with insurance companies and corporations over Floridians."
And of course, Citizens Property Insurance doesn't care, because they lobbied for legal protections while knowing they are not solvent enough to fulfill claims filed by their growing list of policy holders.
A whistleblower by the name of Scott David Thomas reached out to me to discuss the matter. Thomas is a licensed claims professional who harbors concerns over this attack on consumer rights by Ron DeSantis, Jimmy Patronis, and Barry Gilway of Citizens Property insurance.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/b23bbc4b-e98c-4176-bd50-9bde5b45e361?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Thomas has brought forward dozens of emails he has transmitted to The Department of Financial Services (DFS), The Office of Insurance Regulation (OIR), Florida's Chief Financial Officer (CFO) Jimmy Patronis, and Governor Ron DeSantis since the Governor took office. The communications paint a grim picture of back door deals and intentional acts of political deception that call into question [the Citizens Enabling Statute 627.351.](https://substack.com/redirect/164999f4-430e-4f45-95a2-f79e97c05a7c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
One of the most concerning issues Thomas raises involves potential ethical violations at the State of Florida's Citizens Property Insurance, directly linking former Citizens CEO Barry Gilway with the promotion of the Governor's political agenda since he took office in 2019, as a political lobbyist from 2012 to 2023. Below are confirmations via the Florida Lobbyist website that Gilway was a lobbyist the entire time he served as CEO of Citizens Insurance:

---|---|---
In addition to the serious questions raised about Citizens Property insurance claims practices, revelations of Thomas's previous whistleblower warnings from 2019 reinforce concerns about leadership and decision making at Citizens Property Insurance.
In April 2020, Thomas received a response from the Director of Property and Casualty at the OIR. Having made his request to conduct reserve audits on claim files for his clients regarding insurance carriers, he felt Citizens, and several other insurance carriers that have since gone out of business were teetering on the brink of insolvency. As a former National Technical manager for a well-respected international adjustment firm and 10 years of professional experience at Nationwide Insurance,Thomas is extremely familiar with reserve audits.

Many of these same companies are now in "liquidation", and one can only wonder why Florida's Chief Financial Officer (CFO) Jimmy Patronis, Governor Ron DeSantis, the OIR, and Barry Gilway of Citizens Property Insurance would not want to disclose this sort of information. Had Thomas been able to follow through with these reserve audits, he could have brought this information to the attention of the CFO and kept Florida's insurance Property Market solvent.
Below are several of the insurance companies that are currently in liquidation.
### Companies in Liquidation

14. [WINDHAVEN INSURANCE COMPANY](https://substack.com/redirect/ce5b84ec-13c4-4e2d-9935-f052f9f48bff?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

Thomas, publicly revealed on December 15th 2022 that Citizens Property insurance CEO Barry Gilway had been a registered lobbyist as far back as 2012, without declaring the matter.
In April of 2022, Gilway was interviewed by Channel 10 News about Governor DeSantis's special session regarding insurance. During the interview, Gilway said the "_vast majority of roof claims are fraud_ " and that it is just a _" money grab for attorneys and public adjusters"._
If a "vast majority" of roofing claims filed in Florida are fraudulent, then Barry Gilway is claiming that the vast majority of Citizens Property Insurance policy holders filed fraudulent claims. This is a very big accusation and claim to make with no data to back it up as evidence. If hundreds of thousands of Citizen policy holders were filing fraudulent roof claims, there would certainly be data and a statutory requirement for them to prove it, as confirmed in Citizens own best claims practices. However, Gilway never provided any data, because his claims were false, and were clearly stated as a way to advance and provide cover for Governor DeSantis's special legislative session that was convened for the sake of crafting legal immunity for Citizens Insurance.
Gilway's comments came just days before DeSantis signed a [proclamation](https://substack.com/redirect/aee22faf-3dda-4743-bc50-34e197ce5fde?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) calling for the special session. Coincidentally, that very same week in December 2022 - and directly following Mr. Thomas's revelations - Mr. Gilway unexpectedly retired from Citizens Property insurance. In [the same meeting ](https://substack.com/redirect/3ab00667-ec3e-479b-a429-59b6391f9b39?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)where Mr. Gilway announced his departure to Governor DeSantis's board, the organization swiftly decided to pay Gilway up to $650,000 over the next few years to keep him engaged as an "advisor" to the state-backed insurer. This, despite their insolvency. For context, Governor Ron DeSantis's own salary is just $135,000.00 per year.
Unfortunately, for the consumer, none of the changes Mr. Gilway lobbied for have made any difference with regard to lowering the costs of insurance, as premiums continue to skyrocket. It is worth noting that Florida has the highest homeowners property insurance rates in the entire country, and rates for Florida homeowners have drastically increased under Governor DeSantis.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/6bb8fd11-4456-42fa-ad88-5ad98ea3b6ac?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Gilway's hidden lobby efforts reveals a long history of public corruption seemingly tolerated **and indeed fostered** by the Governor of Florida and his cabinet. Lobbying had become such an issue with regards to Florida's plagued insurance market that in May of 2018, Florida CFO Jimmy Patronis sent a formal letter to Mr. Gilway stating:
> _**" Transparency is one of the best ways we can ensure accountability. It should be crystal clear who is interested in influencing Citizens policy changes or securing contracts with the Corporation. The Citizens internal Code of Ethics should address lobbying activities. Considering the lack of a statutory requirement, I am requesting Citizens attend the next meeting of the Governor and Cabinet to discuss the Corporation's plan of action and timeline to correct this shortcoming."**_
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/17272520-287b-4093-a352-009d966d96f8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
It is clear that in 2018, Mr. Patronis wrote this email to Mr. Gilway as a way to provide political cover if at some point down the road Mr. Gilway's lobbying efforts for the Governor's agenda were ever discovered. In the 2022 quote from Barry Gilway, he identifies himself as only "Citizens President/ CEO & Executive Director," once again leaving out the fact that he is also a lobbyist.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/f6f74e40-80eb-477e-91a5-6b8f9ac25506?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Following Patronis's letter to Gilway, Citizens Property Insurance updated their company policy manual to include changes regarding lobbying. Gilway, however, continued to lobby while serving as CEO of Citizens, and never publicly disclosed it on Citizens' website, nor to the media.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/dfdac18b-13e2-4d37-8023-56f390411cd7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/c48a16bb-247e-4b9b-b473-14ad49526443?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Citizens own "Corporate Policy" and Code of Ethics defines a lobbyist as:
_**Lobbyist means a person who is employed and receives payment, or who contracts for economic consideration for the purpose of lobbying, or a person who is principally employed for governmental affairs by another person or entity to lobby on behalf of that person or entity. "Lobbyist" does not include a person who is:**_
_**1\. An attorney, agent, adjuster, or any person in active representation of a client with respect to an insurance claim or a judicial proceeding who contacts Citizens with regard to that insurance claim or judicial proceeding.**_
_**2\. An employee of an agency or legislative or judicial branch acting in the normal course of his or her duties.**_
_**3\. A confidential informant who is providing or wishes to provide, confidential information to be used for law enforcement purposes.**_
_**4\. A person who lobbies to procure a contract pursuant to Chapter 287 which contract is less than the threshold for CATEGORY ONE as provided in F.S. s. 287.017. ($20,000)**_
The Citizens Corporate Policy and Code of Ethics clearly states that a "lobbyist" does not include a person who is an employee of an agency or legislative or judicial branch acting in the normal course of his or her duties. Given this statement in the Citizens Code of Ethics, it's even more alarming that Gilway, who was paid to be CEO of Citizens, was also simultaneously acting as a lobbyist without publicly identifying himself as a lobbyist.
Mr. Thomas contacted Mike Maitland, the records custodian at Citizens Property insurance to establish which media entities, newspapers, television, and radio stations interviewed Barry Gilway between 2012-2022. Maitland replied: "Citizens' media relations and external affairs departments report that they do not maintain a list of all media entities which interviewed Barry Gilway in 2022 in the normal and ordinary course of business." This is of great importance. Mr. Gilway, as a lobbyist, is required to keep records of his activities.
One can currently only speculate on what matters Gilway has kept from the public while doing Governor DeSantis's political bidding at the expense of Florida homeowners.
When Thomas came forward in December 2021 and contacted Governor DeSantis, Citizens Insurance, the Florida Department of Financial Services, CFO Jimmy Patronis, and Florida Attorney General Ashley Moody regarding his concerns that the ability of consumers to file a civil remedies notice against Citizens Property Insurance had been removed, less than 90 days later, the Florida Department of Financial Services charged Thomas in an act of retaliation with ten counts of violating Florida Insurance Statutes. Their retaliation against Thomas was nothing more than use of government force to silence, intimidate, and discredit an insurance industry whistleblower.
Thomas has exclusively provided me with hundreds of documents and dozens of internal communications between himself, the office of Governor Ron DeSantis, the Department of Financial Services, CFO Jimmy Patronis, Attorney General Ashley Moody, former Agriculture Commissioner Nikki Fried, and former Citizens Property Insurance CEO Barry Gilway. These documents paint a very concerning picture regarding what Florida Government officials knew about the looming insurance crisis and insolvency of the State's insurer of last resort, when they knew it, and why they failed to act or disclose the truth to Floridians and Citizens policy holders. It also reveals a coordinated attempt by Citizens Insurance, Jimmy Patronis, Ashley Moody and Governor DeSantis to intentionally conceal this damning information from the public in an effort to aid Governor DeSantis re-election as Governor of Florida, and his 2024 Presidential campaign.
As we get closer to Hurricane season, millions of Floridians whose homes are likely to be flooded or destroyed will soon discover that they have been paying the state of Florida for home owner insurance policies that are not financially solvent to cover claims in the aftermath of another Hurricane or natural disaster. Sadly, this is the current reality of tens of thousands of Florida homeowners whose property was destroyed in Hurricane Ian, and the reality of hundreds of thousands of other homeowners in Florida who are frantically searching for insurance ahead of Hurricane season. This will undeniably create a homelessness crisis in the state of Florida, all thanks to Governor DeSantis's corruption, back door lobby deals, and failed oversight of Citizens Insurance and CFO Jimmy Patronis. It is without a doubt the largest homeowner insurance scam in our country at the moment, and it can be found in Tallahassee under Governor DeSantis's roof!
This is a developing story... and I will be releasing these whistleblower documents in a series of investigative reports. Stay tuned.
