name: Kirsten Gillibrand
subject: I need to know if you're on board
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
| | |
---
Friend, I'm thrilled that President Biden has officially announced his 2024 campaign! And I'm excited to stand by him, proudly promoting our visionary Democratic agenda and all of the incredible victories that we've celebrated.
President Biden and Senate Democrats have spent these past three years hard at work. We've been relentless in our efforts to defend Social Security and Medicare, restore reproductive rights, keep our communities safe from gun violence, and get our economy working for American families. **I'm proud to say that we've made real, tangible progress – and we're just getting started.**
**But while Democrats have been moving forward, Republicans are stuck in reverse. **They've spent the past three years tearing apart reproductive rights, threatening Social Security and Medicare, pushing the gun lobby's dangerous agenda, and undermining efforts to help working families get by.
America faces a clear choice in 2024. But the battle for control of Washington is going to be extremely close – **so I need to hear from supporters like you immediately.**
**Do you approve of President Biden's agenda?**

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62370876/403232948/1575385346?code=jtk4107-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNDBjZDgyNi04ZmU0LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mZJLgqfZqzt4gEJJMN17K0jaCey379Tr3AcTih6ponQ=) A note from Kirsten: Friend, I can’t thank you enough for standing by my side in the critical fights ahead of us. As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 – and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, Nate Silver’s FiveThirtyEight is saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. [**So please, chip in to help defend our narrow Democratic Senate majority.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62370877/403232949/1575385346?code=jtk4107-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNDBjZDgyNi04ZmU0LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mZJLgqfZqzt4gEJJMN17K0jaCey379Tr3AcTih6ponQ=) And if you’d like to become a core member of my team and receive exclusive texts from my campaign, [**text JOIN to 60708.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62370878/403232950/1575385346?code=jtk4107-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNDBjZDgyNi04ZmU0LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mZJLgqfZqzt4gEJJMN17K0jaCey379Tr3AcTih6ponQ=) Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

clean_body: | | | Friend, I'm thrilled that President Biden has officially announced his 2024 campaign! And I'm excited to stand by him, proudly promoting our visionary Democratic agenda and all of the incredible victories that we've celebrated. President Biden and Senate Democrats have spent these past three years hard at work. We've been relentless in our efforts to defend Social Security and Medicare, restore reproductive rights, keep our communities safe from gun violence, and get our economy working for American families. I'm proud to say that we've made real, tangible progress – and we're just getting started. But while Democrats have been moving forward, Republicans are stuck in reverse. They've spent the past three years tearing apart reproductive rights, threatening Social Security and Medicare, pushing the gun lobby's dangerous agenda, and undermining efforts to help working families get by. America faces a clear choice in 2024. But the battle for control of Washington is going to be extremely close – so I need to hear from supporters like you immediately. Do you approve of President Biden's agenda? | | | | Thank you for sharing your feedback here. – Kirsten | * | = A note from Kirsten: Friend, I can’t thank you enough for standing by my side in the critical fights ahead of us. As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 – and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, Nate Silver’s FiveThirtyEight is saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. = And if you’d like to become a core member of my team and receive exclusive texts from my campaign, = Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

We don't play dirty, Peter | | | Hi Peter, I started United Rural Democrats in college. My family is from rural America – a town that was often forgotten about by both Republicans and Democrats. Whether you want to call them "flyover states" or a "one-horse towns," the truth is that rural America is the heart of this country, and its communities deserve to be prioritized in Washington, not visited on a campaign stop once every election cycle. **Republicans have always played dirty in rural America. Now, they aired their dirty laundry to the whole country.** [_The Washington Post_](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDDUV27dB1SLFWpo-Uwox6EM4x8Z-u268AVIePN0X_HlYB5aaSq6-gLmVRLvDZDmDc_JK4jBBDJavHr-PLqzhHFcDitO_6Uq1iEEk8VJXgfOATO8xKosCAGkSV7iTwia_iU8leMi5PAC1Lyi8TLyn3s2vov6bbKLeXS8W-02tBcsnX5uXFB4MwJtQjL-88wZU7dSvgZDnQhNs-tvQak7hhNxbsYjRVvGQacVX1CV-_OoJU8v5AMegw_y6qCHnoSB-Xt8IQ6za6TitbnOj6GFDwZrH9TyT4NAlwd7s5XUxZTQZyxIocpTSvaSLdqKDnF_C0Lqg-aRRqWg8oz-XALvvqkE5rJK0Ybo2E4l1itkPm6n2/3vo/iJ46Kd_bSFuAqFyuvFxivA/h0/N_5V6CDLIXY3ikXEyhAk5_at6iGcKPhaE0MPrl04GvE) recently reported that a top Republican strategist told donors and politicians that in order to win elections, they need to make it harder for people to vote. # KLAYMAN: JEAN CARROLL SHOULD BE PROSECUTED FOR BEARING FALSE WITNESS MANY DECADES LATER!
NPR
_**E. Jean Carroll Testifies in her lawsuit trial that Trump Raped Her**_ NEW YORK — A [writer suing Donald Trump](https://freedomwatchusa.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=72bc9b8de1fa17e6901eb23e7&id=9b0f59771b&e=8edd2b8f7d) took the stand Wednesday to tell jurors that the future president raped her after she accompanied him into a department store fitting room in 1996.
"I'm here because Donald Trump raped me, and when I wrote about it, he said it didn't happen. He lied and shattered my reputation, and I'm here to try and get my life back," she testified.[Continue Reading...](https://freedomwatchusa.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=72bc9b8de1fa17e6901eb23e7&id=7947ba3dd5&e=8edd2b8f7d)[**CLICK HERE TO DONATE!**](https://freedomwatchusa.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=72bc9b8de1fa17e6901eb23e7&id=efa3080f95&e=8edd2b8f7d)

Hoosier Republican,

Last week, the latest state unemployment report was
released, showing that the Indiana Way continues to work, litearlly.
In March, Indiana added more jobs and held its unemployment rate at
3.1%. That’s the 33rd consecutive month that Indiana’s rate has been
lower than the national rate, a streak longer than state’s like Florida
and Texas.

This success is no accident.

It’s the direct result of
the continued efforts of Governor Holcomb and our Republican-led
legislature to make Indiana the best place to live, work, and build a
future.

Unlike big government states like our neighbor to the west,
Illinois, Indiana is building an economic environment where
entreprenerus and businesses small and large can thrive!

Please
pitch in today to help Hoosier Republicans keep up the good work and
ensure Indiana remains one of the best states in the country to do
business.

| | Did you see the news, Derek? **President Biden is officially running for re-election.** And I want to let him know: Virginia is standing behind him. _**[We set a goal to raise $5,000 to help kickstart President Biden’s re-election campaign. name: Josh Shapiro
subject: this Special Election could determine the future of abortion rights in Pennsylvania
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHAPIRO FOR PENNSYLVANIA
body:
I'll explain why:

Hi Derek, this is important:

**In less than one month, there is a Special Election that will determine which party has the majority in Pennsylvania’s House of Representatives.**

If Democrat Heather Boyd wins, Democrats will keep our slim majority and can continue to protect fundamental freedoms like your freedom to choose here in Pennsylvania.

**But if we lose, it will give Republicans the chance to pass an abortion ban.** Because here’s the thing:

As Governor, I can and will veto any _legislation_ that makes abortion illegal. But I’m not able to veto _amendments_ to the Pennsylvania State Constitution. Heather’s opponent is against abortion rights, so if Republicans win this race and take over the State House, they could pass a constitutional amendment to ban abortion – and I won’t be able to veto it.

**[So I’m not exaggerating when I say this is one of the most important races in the country right now. We can’t afford to lose, so I’m humbly asking you: will you donate $5 or whatever you can directly to Heather’s campaign today to help us keep abortion legal in Pennsylvania?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62362665/403205621/-1059842178?refcode=email_042623_shapiro-boyd&amounts=5,15,25,50,100&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTY5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOWZhNTBmYS03MGU0LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Hk83FyfP4fC_ZZKePW6xmdgvXE062Logzr2TkPCdvW0=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Heather Boyd will go through immediately:_ | | | | [Donate $5 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62362666/403205622/-1059842178?refcode=email_042623_shapiro-boyd&amount=5&amounts=5,15,25,50,100&express_lane=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTY5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOWZhNTBmYS03MGU0LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Hk83FyfP4fC_ZZKePW6xmdgvXE062Logzr2TkPCdvW0=)

body:
A peek at Biden's record

|
---
| | | |
---
| With all of Joe Biden's failures, you'd think he would just go back to Delaware at the end of his term and slowly fade away into irrelevance, wouldn't you Friend?

But no, Joe Biden's handlers had other plans.

**Biden just announced that he will be running for President AGAIN in 2024.**

No, this is not a joke. But what will Biden run on? His record isn't exactly the picture of success.
**BIDEN 'S ACCOMPLISHMENTS**
* **Opened our border to COUNTLESS illegal immigrants**
* **Oversaw a MASSIVE crime spike**
* **DESTROYED American energy independence **
* **RECORD High levels of inflation**
* **DISASTROUS Afghanistan withdrawal **
* **DEMANDED men play in girls ' sports**
* ****WEAPONIZED the justice system against political opponents!****

clean_body: | | | | | | | Joe Biden just announced he’s OFFICIALLY running for reelection!! President Biden just announced he is running for reelection, and we are determined to help him turn Arizona blue. Arizona is a battleground state – and we know Republicans will pull out all the stops to try and swing this state for them. They have spent years trying to overturn the results of the 2020 election, so we know they already have their eyes on 2024. We HAVE to make sure that we get every vote we can to ensure President Biden wins this state and the ENTIRE election. The Arizona Democratic Party is working hard to turn this state blue in 2024, but we need your help. Hi friends, The end of April is almost here, so Wes and Aruna wanted us to check in with you. **Earlier this month, the Maryland legislative session came to an end, and it was a productive one! Wes has been busy signing dozens of bills into law, including all 10 that he authored.** From raising the minimum wage, to giving tax breaks to families and veterans, to reducing gun violence, to creating a clean energy economy, to legalizing recreational cannabis sales, the Moore-Miller Administration is making great strides on the key issues facing Marylanders across the state. **GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

body:
Incarcerated females are being assaulted in Washington prisons | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/ba2ecee9c8a6/im-announcing-my-run-for-us-congress-in-the-8th-congressional-district-13547555?e=0e51d1e991)
---
| | [ ](https://mcshanellc.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ac7c5348d309f6a3d3cffd39b&id=04f4c73019&e=0e51d1e991)
---
| | Peter,
---
| I was raised to believe the following: _“Women working together – linked, informed, and educated – can bring peace and prosperity to this forsaken planet.”_
It wasn’t just a hashtag, a pink hat, or a bumper sticker – it was relationships, education, and the encouragement to achieve the American Dream.

**I have volunteered in Washington prisons for over a decade, and what we are doing to incarcerated females _goes against everything we have achieved_ concerning a humane respect for women.**

I discussed this in an interview with Monica Paige on _One America News_ , which can be watched [here](https://mcshanellc.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ac7c5348d309f6a3d3cffd39b&id=aaad422ee7&e=0e51d1e991)[:](https://mcshanellc.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ac7c5348d309f6a3d3cffd39b&id=4ea3208b28&e=0e51d1e991)
---
| [ ](https://mcshanellc.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ac7c5348d309f6a3d3cffd39b&id=56a1598a11&e=0e51d1e991)
---
| Female inmates are telling us **they are being assaulted** when transgender males are integrated into their living quarters.

A majority of incarcerated females have been sexually assaulted in the past, and this compounds their trauma.

If we expect women to leave prison and have a better outcome in society, then **_we cannot expose them to this cruel and unusual punishment_.**

Prisons have traditionally separated various populations, and it’s just good common sense that a unit be dedicated to transgender inmates.

**Peter, the existence of a transgender community should never jeopardize our progress on women’s rights.** Incarcerated females should be protected from _any_ protocol that would make them vulnerable to the unnecessary risk of being sexually abused.

I look forward to defending the safety and well-being of all women, including our incarcerated females, **as your next Congresswoman.**

**[Please join me in holding our ground to protect all the progress we have made concerning women’s rights by supporting my campaign with a donation of any amount today](https://mcshanellc.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ac7c5348d309f6a3d3cffd39b&id=794030182c&e=0e51d1e991) :**
---
| [STAND FOR WOMEN’S RIGHTS »](https://mcshanellc.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ac7c5348d309f6a3d3cffd39b&id=e40d280aec&e=0e51d1e991 "STAND FOR WOMEN’S RIGHTS »")
---

clean_body: Incarcerated females are being assaulted in Washington prisons | | | | | | | Peter, | I was raised to believe the following: “Women working together – linked, informed, and educated – can bring peace and prosperity to this forsaken planet.” It wasn’t just a hashtag, a pink hat, or a bumper sticker – it was relationships, education, and the encouragement to achieve the American Dream. I have volunteered in Washington prisons for over a decade, and what we are doing to incarcerated females goes against everything we have achieved concerning a humane respect for women. I discussed this in an interview with Monica Paige on One America News , which can be watched | | Female inmates are telling us they are being assaulted when transgender males are integrated into their living quarters. A majority of incarcerated females have been sexually assaulted in the past, and this compounds their trauma. If we expect women to leave prison and have a better outcome in society, then we cannot expose them to this cruel and unusual punishment. Prisons have traditionally separated various populations, and it’s just good common sense that a unit be dedicated to transgender inmates. Peter, the existence of a transgender community should never jeopardize our progress on women’s rights. Incarcerated females should be protected from any protocol that would make them vulnerable to the unnecessary risk of being sexually abused. I look forward to defending the safety and well-being of all women, including our incarcerated females, as your next Congresswoman. : | "STAND FOR WOMEN’S RIGHTS »" | "STOP THE UNNECESSARY RISKS »" | "EMPOWER FEMALE RESILIENCE »" | For Washington, | | Carmen Goers Candidate for U.S. Congress, WA-8 | | | | | | | | | | | | "Paid for by Carmen for Congress" | | Copyright © 2023 Carmen for Congress, All rights reserved.

| Peter,

From book bans to defunding public schools, it’s clear the Republican party does not have the best interests of working families.

As a lifelong public servant and former schools board member, Valerie knows firsthand how valuable an accessible public education is for North Carolina families.

Three years after the start of the pandemic, public schools and public school teachers are still struggling to receive adequate resources. The Republican party’s platform to divert funds to private schools will only further disenfranchise working families here in North Carolina and across the country.

**Peter, we need to make it clear to the Republican party that public schools need more funding, not less.**

Valerie is working every day to make sure working families are prioritized. But she can’t do it without you. [_**We need [25] grassroots contributions to show Republicans our strength. body:
DeSantis’s views on reproductive freedom, voting rights, LGBTQ+ equality, and more are all incredibly restrictive, harmful, and not representative of what we know our country to be.

| Peter,

We wanted to make sure you didn’t miss Abigail’s important message in light of Ron DeSantis’s visit to Virginia.

DeSantis’s views on reproductive freedom, voting rights, LGBTQ+ equality, and more are all incredibly restrictive, harmful, and not representative of what we know our country to be.

His visit to Virginia is a harrowing reminder of what’s at stake as we look ahead to the 2024 election and beyond.

[_**We need your support to ensure Abigail can remain a strong advocate for reproductive rights in Congress. Peter,

You read that right.

Recently, Florida Republican Governor Ron DeSantis signed a 6-week abortion ban – _**an incredibly restrictive, dangerous law.**_

Now, **DeSantis is visiting Virginia** , where our own Republican governor has said he wants to roll back essential reproductive rights. That’s why I was just on Morning Joe to talk about what a sobering reminder this is of what’s at stake in our country and why it’s so important we regain our Democratic House majority in 2024 and codify a woman’s right to privacy and abortion access at the federal level.

Without it, _**Republicans across the country – and in Congress – will continue to introduce dangerous bills just like the one DeSantis signed into law.**_

I will continue to be a strong advocate for reproductive rights here in Virginia and nationwide. clean_body: DeSantis’s views on reproductive freedom, voting rights, LGBTQ+ equality, and more are all incredibly restrictive, harmful, and not representative of what we know our country to be. | Peter, We wanted to make sure you didn’t miss Abigail’s important message in light of Ron DeSantis’s visit to Virginia. DeSantis’s views on reproductive freedom, voting rights, LGBTQ+ equality, and more are all incredibly restrictive, harmful, and not representative of what we know our country to be. His visit to Virginia is a harrowing reminder of what’s at stake as we look ahead to the 2024 election and beyond. = | = Read more from Abigail here: = Peter, You read that right. Recently, Florida Republican Governor Ron DeSantis signed a 6-week abortion ban – an incredibly restrictive, dangerous law. Now, DeSantis is visiting Virginia , where our own Republican governor has said he wants to roll back essential reproductive rights. That’s why I was just on Morning Joe to talk about what a sobering reminder this is of what’s at stake in our country and why it’s so important we regain our Democratic House majority in 2024 and codify a woman’s right to privacy and abortion access at the federal level. Without it, Republicans across the country – and in Congress – will continue to introduce dangerous bills just like the one DeSantis signed into law. I will continue to be a strong advocate for reproductive rights here in Virginia and nationwide. = | | | = | = | = | = | = We must do all we can to stop Republicans from restricting abortion access any further, and I’m counting on your support to make sure I can continue that mission. = | = With sincere appreciation, Abigail | | = Paid for by Spanberger for Congress Spanberger for Congress P.O. name: Roy Cooper
subject: The violence must stop.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
America has a gun violence problem.
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62363671/403208924/823540626?refcode=ea.df8ea0bf-74e4-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ms=ea.df8ea0bf-74e4-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZjhlYTBiZi03NGU0LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AnFmIwoxF11A6QaFgOvYywUhZrsb56wS6mZYpyImPxY=&emci=fe02b528-5de4-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=df8ea0bf-74e4-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=1049176)
**Associated Press:**
_“The U.S. is setting a record pace for mass killings in 2023, replaying the horror on a loop roughly once a week so far this year.”_ Peter, America has a gun violence problem. Week after week, kids are murdered in their schools or at birthday parties or because they knocked on the wrong door. There have been more mass shootings in the United States in 2023 than there have been days this year. _It has to stop._ **As governor, I’ve called repeatedly for commonsense measures to reduce gun violence in North Carolina. I also join President Biden in support of a new national ban on assault weapons.** **[If you agree that we need to ban these weapons of war, add your name to my petition here>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62363672/403208926/529334032?refcode=ea.df8ea0bf-74e4-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ms=ea.df8ea0bf-74e4-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZjhlYTBiZi03NGU0LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AnFmIwoxF11A6QaFgOvYywUhZrsb56wS6mZYpyImPxY=&emci=fe02b528-5de4-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=df8ea0bf-74e4-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=1049176)** All too often, mass shootings involve AR-15-style weapons or other assault weapons that have no place on our streets. And we already know how to keep them from harming our people. The evidence is clear: **When the 1994 assault weapons ban was in effect, deaths from mass shootings fell. When it expired, they rose sharply.** **[Americans are being murdered in their homes, in houses of worship, in shopping malls, and in schools. We have to end the violence. Sign on here to join my call for a new assault weapons ban>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62363673/403208927/529334032?refcode=ea.df8ea0bf-74e4-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ms=ea.df8ea0bf-74e4-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZjhlYTBiZi03NGU0LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AnFmIwoxF11A6QaFgOvYywUhZrsb56wS6mZYpyImPxY=&emci=fe02b528-5de4-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=df8ea0bf-74e4-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=1049176)** | [SIGN ON »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62363675/403208928/529334032?refcode=ea.df8ea0bf-74e4-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ms=ea.df8ea0bf-74e4-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZjhlYTBiZi03NGU0LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AnFmIwoxF11A6QaFgOvYywUhZrsb56wS6mZYpyImPxY=&emci=fe02b528-5de4-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=df8ea0bf-74e4-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=1049176)

name: Team Bennet
subject: We’re going to unseat Lauren Boebert
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Colorado

| Hey there, friend — Michael asked us to reach out because a recent poll shows Lauren Boebert and Adam Frisch are TIED and with your help, we can defeat Lauren Boebert and elect Adam Frisch in 2024. [**Can you take a moment to split $10 between Adam Frisch’s campaign and Michael's so we can help him defeat Lauren Boebert?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62363698/403209000/-1392034954?refcode=X_042623_Frisch_act&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZmU3ZjJlMy03NGU0LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HZJfBRgLs7F5nGhqsZAN7H61kfMkIRLcT6CXRWiDqRA=) Very few people believed Adam could defeat Lauren Boebert last year. All of the national pundits said it was a “Safe Republican” seat. So when the results started coming in on Election Night, the talking heads on cable news couldn’t believe their eyes. The race went to a recount, and ultimately, after all the ballots were counted, Adam came just 546 votes short of defeating Boebert. It was the closest race in the entire country. [**This new poll shows that Adam can defeat Boebert, especially with our help now. Our early investment today can really power Adam’s campaign over Boebert and you can make the difference here, friend.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62363699/403209001/-1392034954?refcode=X_042623_Frisch_act&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZmU3ZjJlMy03NGU0LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HZJfBRgLs7F5nGhqsZAN7H61kfMkIRLcT6CXRWiDqRA=)**** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Adam Frisch & Michael Bennet will go through immediately:_ | | | ******[Donate $10 now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62363700/403209002/-631220794?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=X_042623_Frisch_act&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZmU3ZjJlMy03NGU0LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HZJfBRgLs7F5nGhqsZAN7H61kfMkIRLcT6CXRWiDqRA=)******

name: Josh Stein
subject: My opponent in the race for Governor of North Carolina:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Party of Georgia
body:
|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62363709/403209040/227139380?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMWI4NWEwOC03NWU0LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2Fn2snHsRrcFfWa0k2vjOiZxS1sXjmRth6FrMyTwcgI=&emci=c7f53b9d-bde2-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=31b85a08-75e4-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=43566853)

| | **It’s official: Extremist Lt. Gov. Mark Robinson (R) has entered the race for Governor of North Carolina.**

I won’t stand for an extremist who will drag North Carolina backward to become our Governor. Peter, I’m ready to fight back with everything I’ve got — but I need you with me.

[**_Rush an immediate contribution to defeat Mark Robinson >>> _**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62363710/403209041/1536759036?refcode=20230426.2_JS_4AZ&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMWI4NWEwOC03NWU0LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2Fn2snHsRrcFfWa0k2vjOiZxS1sXjmRth6FrMyTwcgI=) | [FIGHT BACK](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62363711/403209042/1536759036?refcode=20230426.2_JS_4AZ&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMWI4NWEwOC03NWU0LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2Fn2snHsRrcFfWa0k2vjOiZxS1sXjmRth6FrMyTwcgI=)
---
Peter, you and I believe that building a brighter future is possible for North Carolina – one that is rooted in our shared values of freedom, justice, and opportunity for all.

_My opponent would do the exact opposite._

Peter, extremists like Mark Robinson want to tell people who they can marry, when women must be pregnant, and which people we should hate. He and his radical accomplices are the greatest threat to the brighter future we seek. Frankly, Robinson is wrong for North Carolina.

Our race for Governor of North Carolina will be one of the most important and most expensive in the country in 2024, and right now, it’s way too close for comfort. [**_I’m asking committed Democrats _everywhere_ to step up and help defeat Mark Robinson and the North Carolina GOP. Click here to split a donation of any amount you can between the Democratic Party of Georgia and my campaign to power our fight >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62363712/403209043/1536759036?refcode=20230426.2_JS_4AZ&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMWI4NWEwOC03NWU0LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2Fn2snHsRrcFfWa0k2vjOiZxS1sXjmRth6FrMyTwcgI=)

The most important thing we can do for the future of democracy everywhere is to prevent extremist, anti-democracy radicals from gaining power — but Robinson and his GOP allies have spent _years_ preparing for this campaign. We cannot allow him to become Governor.

I know you share my priorities, Peter. If we are going to protect our fundamental rights, secure our democracy, and ensure the dignity of ALL people, we need to stand together and win this CRITICAL race.

[**_Please, click here to donate and power our campaign for a brighter future >>>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62363713/403209044/1536759036?refcode=20230426.2_JS_4AZ&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMWI4NWEwOC03NWU0LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2Fn2snHsRrcFfWa0k2vjOiZxS1sXjmRth6FrMyTwcgI=)

My opponent would do the exact opposite. Peter, extremists like Mark Robinson want to tell people who they can marry, when women must be pregnant, and which people we should hate. He and his radical accomplices are the greatest threat to the brighter future we seek. Frankly, Robinson is wrong for North Carolina. Our race for Governor of North Carolina will be one of the most important and most expensive in the country in 2024, and right now, it’s way too close for comfort. = The most important thing we can do for the future of democracy everywhere is to prevent extremist, anti-democracy radicals from gaining power — but Robinson and his GOP allies have spent years preparing for this campaign. We cannot allow him to become Governor. I know you share my priorities, Peter. If we are going to protect our fundamental rights, secure our democracy, and ensure the dignity of ALL people, we need to stand together and win this CRITICAL race. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = Together, Josh | | Paid for by the Democratic Party of Georgia. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.georgiademocrat.org | Democratic Party of Georgia P.O. BOX 89202 Atlanta, GA 30312 United States

subject: They gave Lia Thomas the trophy all for a photo-op...

My name is Riley Gaines. I'm a 12 time All-American swimmer with 5 SEC titles under my belt after my time at the University of Kentucky.

After college, my dream was to become a dentist. Unfortunately, my life completely changed when I was forced to share a locker room with and compete against biological male Lia Thomas at the 2022 NCAA Women's Swimming Championship.

**It gets worse:** When I tied with Lia Thomas - down the _hundredth_ of a second - I was told that the NCAA hadn't planned for a tie and that Thomas had to have the trophy for photo purposes...

My story is not unique. Unfortunately, countless young girls and women like myself are being sidelined as biological males infiltrate and dominate our competition.

**That 's why I'm taking a stand against Democrats' attacks against women's sports.**

_The "Party of Science" doesn't believe in biological differences.
The "Party of Women" doesn't support women.
Democrats are erasing our dreams in the name of wokeness._

Fortunately, Republicans in the House have introduced a bill that would codify the protections that women have been able to count on for generations, ensuring that biological girls will have an equal playing field. Together, we're making it clear we will not stand for discrimination against girls and women in sports. But Joe Biden is threatening to do just the opposite - to cement into law the destruction of women's sports...

So, I'm humbly asking on behalf of millions of female athletes dreaming big - **[will you stand with me?](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=5c27e575ca2943f49b6a7449f9add874&_e=QkSiS78raZlc8Lt_oZ4QE5gO176ld7CgtkKwrGugZgZInHk0fmQiqiFW2YmoGXXD2ruwI8bbcf4m7j6WeBMFFb05_PmrtsBU4ZlKKOGJbpswtZY8-Hp4ABJwpmz6xpsjrl1Mr4SpvLLhtWFmhJFUpVLZsxSw4BiZDcDWpQCuhGs-ivnmvD_IuObxmnm_2zLAC0Cg-sz0rDh3GukdLeL_ZRo8Hxm8SbTK5C6Syu_HSAHyuc3yEJac2bjXb7N6p6LildW-uH7CC75HaaenTe_t7RLauiEG30ko8hfL04LjGJL92Tg7XR9B-R-oKI1_F8GmIo64f3BmescIGAWAVGo_aFKvz9wputcZIjntQvQ4KmIs9bVzQoxR6X9yc8-iKPtB3wveeeHy9BFRvg6GNtR2wQ%3D%3D "will you stand with me?")** If we fail, I fear this could be the end of female athletic competition as we know it...

---

clean_body: | | | | Hey Peter, it's Analicia here, Campaign Manager for Val! We're putting together a Team Hoyle retreat on Monday, May 1st, to get all our staff and organizers together to put our plan of action for the next year and a half down on paper. Once again, the GOP is officially targeting Val to flip her district red. And when a national group like the NRCC targets us, that means we'll face a wave of millions of dollars from them and their dark money allies. So, we're combing through the data and working out how many doors we need to knock, how many phone calls we need to make, how many volunteers we need to recruit and train – and the kind of budget we'll need to win. = Donate Now If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = ---|--- = | = = We don't yet know who we're up against, but we do know that whoever runs against Val, they'll be backed by big money donors and shady special interests who'll fight as dirty as they can to turn the 4th district red. The good news is that we already know organizing power wins. We just need to put the organizers and volunteers on the ground to make it a reality.= We can't wait to update you on the game plan soon! Analicia = | | Paid for and authorized by Val Hoyle for Congress. | This email was sent by Val Hoyle for Congress PO Box 657 Springfield, OR 97477 United States Email is an important way for Val Hoyle to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. Too much email? or . Questions or concerns? . |

clean_body: Linda has spent her entire career fighting for the working class and underrepresented communities across the country. | = | Peter, We are FOUR days away from our FEC quarter deadline. As the Republican party has ramped up its dangerous rhetoric in state legislatures nationwide, this FEC quarter deadline represents an opportunity to fight back. = | = | = Linda has spent her entire career fighting for the working class and underrepresented communities across the country. And as the newly elected chair of the campaign arm of the Congressional Hispanic Caucus, BOLD PAC, she isn’t stopping any time soon. But she needs your help to get a Congress that represents ALL of us. = | | | = | = | = | = | = Thanks for teaming up with us, Linda Sánchez Campaign * | | = Paid for by Stand with Sanchez Stand with Sánchez P.O. name: WFP Digital Team
subject: Biden’s running for re-election — what do you think?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working Families Party National PAC (77 Sands St
body:
Your participation in surveys like this one is essential to helping us identify our priorities and guiding our organizing work. | | | Peter — Yesterday, President Joe Biden officially announced that he and Vice President Kamala Harris will be running for re-election in 2024. We want to hear _your_ thoughts on the performance of President Biden and Democrats in Congress, the issues you want to see addressed, the candidates you’re already most excited about in 2023 and 2024, and more. **Can you spare three minutes to complete our first Official WFP National Supporter Survey of 2023? You can start by answering the first question right here:** _1\. On a scale of 1 (strongly disapprove) to 5 (strongly approve), how would you rate the performance of President Joe Biden?_ **[1 (strongly The Working Families Party is _your_ party, and it’s important to us that we hear from as many of you as possible about what you think of our current political moment.
**Your participation in surveys like this one is essential to helping us identify our priorities for this electoral cycle and guiding our organizing work, Peter.** What would you most like to hear from President Biden and Vice President Harris now that they have announced their campaign for re-election? Are there any candidates you think WFP should endorse in upcoming local, state, and federal elections? Are Democratic Party leaders in Congress doing enough to help us weather through the compounding crises unfolding all around us? And how are you thinking of getting involved?
When you fill out this survey, we’ll read every one of your answers — **yes, every single one.** Your input is critical to us as we map out our agenda heading into another critical election cycle. [**Please take a few moments to complete our April WFP National Supporter Survey to help us get a sense of where you’re at, and how we should move clean_body: Your participation in surveys like this one is essential to helping us identify our priorities and guiding our organizing work. | | | Peter — Yesterday, President Joe Biden officially announced that he and Vice President Kamala Harris will be running for re-election in 2024. We want to hear your thoughts on the performance of President Biden and Democrats in Congress, the issues you want to see addressed, the candidates you’re already most excited about in 2023 and 2024, and more. Can you spare three minutes to complete our first Official WFP National Supporter Survey of 2023? You can start by answering the first question right here: 1\. On a scale of 1 (strongly disapprove) to 5 (strongly approve), how would you rate the performance of President Joe Biden? The Working Families Party is your party, and it’s important to us that we hear from as many of you as possible about what you think of our current political moment. Your participation in surveys like this one is essential to helping us identify our priorities for this electoral cycle and guiding our organizing work, Peter. What would you most like to hear from President Biden and Vice President Harris now that they have announced their campaign for re-election? Are there any candidates you think WFP should endorse in upcoming local, state, and federal elections? Are Democratic Party leaders in Congress doing enough to help us weather through the compounding crises unfolding all around us? And how are you thinking of getting involved? When you fill out this survey, we’ll read every one of your answers — yes, every single one. Your input is critical to us as we map out our agenda heading into another critical election cycle. In solidarity, WFP Digital Team Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. Wanna learn more? And if you need to update your contact information, Other political groups have corporate donors. But we can pool our resources too. Paid for by Working Families Party National PAC (77 Sands St. #6, Brooklyn, NY, 11201). | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Working Families, please .

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62365172/403214324/-845752524?source=EM_NBI_SD_20230426_PT_1.1_0_3MO_website_NA_NA_climate&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMjMzMzg4MC03OWU0LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=w-urtlW_0p9xRpX5ULF-2G0GpdoL5nOzL5u16DN0NaA=&emci=8502b998-41e4-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=32333880-79e4-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=22117458) This report should raise alarm bells, especially as we learn of House Republicans introducing a proposal that would cut major elements of our landmark climate law, the Inflation Reduction Act.

Sharice knows that for communities like ours, weather is only going to get more and more extreme and dangerous if we don’t take action now. Undercutting existing climate laws would be going in the wrong direction.

**[April is Earth Month, a time to recommit to our climate initiatives. Will you add your name today to stand up for climate action? We need 5,000 activists to sign on by midnight→](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62365175/403214355/-845752524?source=EM_NBI_SD_20230426_PT_1.1_0_3MO_website_NA_NA_climate&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMjMzMzg4MC03OWU0LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=w-urtlW_0p9xRpX5ULF-2G0GpdoL5nOzL5u16DN0NaA=&emci=8502b998-41e4-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=32333880-79e4-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=22117458)** | | [Sign On](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62365177/403214357/-845752524?source=EM_NBI_SD_20230426_PT_1.1_0_3MO_website_NA_NA_climate&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMjMzMzg4MC03OWU0LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=w-urtlW_0p9xRpX5ULF-2G0GpdoL5nOzL5u16DN0NaA=&emci=8502b998-41e4-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=32333880-79e4-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=22117458)

Sharice knows that immediate climate action is critical to lessening the effects of dangerous climate change. That’s why she is proud to have helped pass the largest-ever climate bill into law, creating millions of clean energy jobs. But time is running out and House Republicans are trying to squash that law, so we need to do more.

There are things we can get done right now, even with a split Congress: Actions including conservation programs, sustainable forestry, and research may be included in upcoming legislation.

Sharice has been on the road, talking to local folks about the issues most important to them. She will always fight for Kansas families, working with anyone to achieve results. Now, she needs your support to help create a world in which our grandkids can thrive.

— Team Sharice

name: FP Team
subject: 1 million Florida residents could lose Medicaid coverage
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Fairness Project The Fairness Project
body:
Add your name if you agree ALL Americans deserve access to expanded Medicaid coverage | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62365425/403215120/765663662?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Yzc3MTI1My03YWU0LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YvSx3I-P4z2F9anRdlSquXkFkwPOjrfGW-QkhDApUGc=&emci=a0358f82-65e4-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=9c771253-7ae4-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=561582) | Team** ** — At the end of March, the expanded Medicaid coverage offered as part of the COVID-19 pandemic response came to an end. **Now, Americans in 10 states stand to lose access to expanded health care because their elected officials refuse to roll out expanded Medicaid coverage to their residents. ** [_**If you think ALL Americans should have access to expanded Medicaid, will you add your name to our petition ASAP, friend, and let the extremist officials who refuse to roll out Medicaid expansion know _exactly where we stand?_**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62365426/403215121/-1492670994?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Yzc3MTI1My03YWU0LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YvSx3I-P4z2F9anRdlSquXkFkwPOjrfGW-QkhDApUGc=&emci=a0358f82-65e4-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=9c771253-7ae4-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=561582) We knew that with the end of this expanded pandemic coverage, _millions of Americans would lose access to health care._ Now, we’re seeing in real-time the dangerous effects of these anti-Medicaid extremists' inaction: [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62365427/403215122/-1492670994?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Yzc3MTI1My03YWU0LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YvSx3I-P4z2F9anRdlSquXkFkwPOjrfGW-QkhDApUGc=&emci=a0358f82-65e4-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=9c771253-7ae4-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=561582) Since 2016, we’ve worked in 7 different states alongside voters to pass Medicaid expansion and grant them the health care they badly need. clean_body: Add your name if you agree ALL Americans deserve access to expanded Medicaid coverage | | Team — At the end of March, the expanded Medicaid coverage offered as part of the COVID-19 pandemic response came to an end. Now, Americans in 10 states stand to lose access to expanded health care because their elected officials refuse to roll out expanded Medicaid coverage to their residents. We knew that with the end of this expanded pandemic coverage, millions of Americans would lose access to health care. Now, we’re seeing in real-time the dangerous effects of these anti-Medicaid extremists' inaction: Since 2016, we’ve worked in 7 different states alongside voters to pass Medicaid expansion and grant them the health care they badly need. And in part thanks to our work, now 40 states and D.C. have expanded Medicaid coverage. 10 states remain where extremist officials are holding out on their state's residents, and we’re doing everything we can to give voters the chance to secure the expanded health care access they badly need. clean_body: Our country can not endure four more years of Biden’s FAILED leadership | Peter, In just two years, Joe Biden’s presidency has produced the following hardships for Americans like YOU : Highest inflation rates in over 40 years Loss of U.S. energy independence Proxy war with Russia in Ukraine Far-Left indoctrination of children in public schools Rise of China as a global competitor to the U.S. Disastrous Afghanistan withdrawal that killed 13 Marines and paved the way for the Taliban’s revival Despite his laundry list of failures and all of the damage his administration has done to our country, Biden just announced that he will run for re-election in 2024. It’s safe to say that our country has been in a downward spiral since Biden took office in 2021. Yet the President still believes the American people want to endure four more years of his feckless leadership – how out of touch could he possibly be? Thank you, Scott Fitzgerald Congressman (WI-05) Paid for by Scott Fitzgerald for Congress Po Box 5048 Elm Grove, WI 53122

name: Katie Porter
subject: I make my kids clean up their messes
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
Polluters should too.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=21905%2E3422442%2EbJ_ue4)
Derek,
It's National Park Week, and while I may be biased, I think California has some of the best. As a Member of the Natural Resources Committee, I'm committed to protecting our National Parks, public lands, and all of the natural resources our state has to offer.
**My bill to raise rates on polluters who drill on our public lands finally took effect this year.** But there's so much more to do:
* We need greater investments in clean energy to fight climate change.
* We should hold ultra-profitable polluters accountable for literally cleaning up their own mess.
* We should create an independent board to improve planning for natural disasters like wildfires.

**[Can you pitch in today to help power my work to hold polluters accountable and protect our planet?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230426-1?refcode=EMAG26_1_NTP_20230426_V1_F&refcode2=21905_3422442_bJ_ue4&akid=21905%2E3422442%2EbJ_ue4)** Fighting climate change will be one of my top priorities in the Senate.
**[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230426-1?amount=5&refcode=EMAG26_1_NTP_20230426_V1_F&refcode2=21905_3422442_bJ_ue4&akid=21905%2E3422442%2EbJ_ue4)**
Onward,
Katie

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAG26_1_NTP_20230426_V1_F&t=2&refcode2=21905_3422442_bJ_ue4&akid=21905%2E3422442%2EbJ_ue4)**

* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4s-emails/?t=3&akid=21905%2E3422442%2EbJ_ue4)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s-em-update-info-footer)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4s-unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=21905%2E3422442%2EbJ_ue4)

Katie Porter for Senate

name: CaucusRoom
subject: You'll have no privacy and own no money!
body:
What You Need To Know Today! No images? [Click here](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-e-qudtlhd-trhiujldw-jl/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qudtlhd-trhiujldw-r/)
## **Happy Wednesday! **
## CaucusRoom's parent company, Ouray Digital Inc., is about to launch an online space for faith-based groups to meet, share, and learn. **[Help us name our Faith-based App!](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qudtlhd-trhiujldw-y/)**
[](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qudtlhd-trhiujldw-j/) **Grow your organization and keep the momentum going with our powerful platform.** [Schedule a CaucusRoom Live demo today!](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qudtlhd-trhiujldw-t/) **The****Coronation**** of Joe Biden** The DNC has announced it has**[_no plans to host any Democratic Party primary debates_](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qudtlhd-trhiujldw-i/) **in the upcoming election cycle, so Biden can't flub anything up. **They Want to Finish the Job** Biden has announced his reelection campaign with a **[3 minute video](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qudtlhd-trhiujldw-d/)** instead of a live announcement, and **[GOP hopefuls are weighing in.](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qudtlhd-trhiujldw-h/) **Half of Democrats think [**he's too old to run again.**](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qudtlhd-trhiujldw-k/) **Shock and Anger** There have been many strong reactions to Fox News parting with Tucker Carlson. **[From viewers to the stock market, his absence is being felt.](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qudtlhd-trhiujldw-u/)** **No Privacy and No Money** The Federal Reserve has started to lay the groundwork for a programmable, trackable**,[easily manipulated digital currency designed to promote left-wing social goals.](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qudtlhd-trhiujldw-o/)**

**Ray Epps Interview** Did you catch the **[60 Minutes interview with Ray Epps](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qudtlhd-trhiujldw-x/)?** **So Much for American ****Sovereignty** A non-governmental organization founded by former Presidents Clinton, Bush, and Obama and backed by a litany of multinational corporations **[is teaming up with American Express Global Business Travel to fly migrants](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qudtlhd-trhiujldw-m/) **into the United States. **Bad Actors** **[Liberal media will stop at nothing to push their anti-gun agenda](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qudtlhd-trhiujldw-c/),** including hiring actors to portray Moms. **Let****'s [have a good laugh](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qudtlhd-trhiujldw-q/)!**
* It's a **[mystery.](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qudtlhd-trhiujldw-a/)**
* They know[ ](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qudtlhd-trhiujldw-f/)**[the difference](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qudtlhd-trhiujldw-z/).**
* The **[race is on](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qudtlhd-trhiujldw-v/).**
* Sad[ ](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qudtlhd-trhiujldw-e/)**[but](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qudtlhd-trhiujldw-s/)** true.

**[We are looking for your feedback](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-qudtlhd-trhiujldw-g/)** to understand your first impression of our messaging. name: =?utf-8?Q?Illinois=20Review?=
subject: EXCLUSIVE: An Evening at Mar-a-Lago
body:
What do Oprah Winfrey, President Nixon, now-King Charles, John F. Kennedy, Jr. and Princess Diana have in common - they all wrote to Donald Trump.

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/c2d55dd8eabe/exclusive-an-evening-at-mar-a-lago?e=1cb5fdae9e)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=9a7a5f228e-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_26_04_33&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-9a7a5f228e-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

An Evening at Mar-a-Lago Exclusive: President Trump Private Book Launch Party for Letters to Trump (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/04/an-evening-at-mar-a-lago-exclusive-president-trump-private-book-launch-party-for-letters-to-trump.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=9a7a5f228e-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_26_04_33&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-9a7a5f228e-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
President Trump speaks at the book launch party for his latest book, Letters To Trump at his Mar-a-Lago estate on April 24, 2023.

Former President Donald Trump hosted a small gathering of about 60 attendees, all handpicked by the former president, to attend a private launch party for his latest book, Letters To Trump (https://45books.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=9a7a5f228e-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_26_04_33&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-9a7a5f228e-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) , in the White and Gold Room of his Palm Beach estate, Mar-a-Lago, on Monday evening.

The mega-exclusive event was held on a day when Mar-a-Lago is closed – but the luxurious estate remained open for the former president and his special guests.

Former Democratic Illinois Gov. Rod Blagojevich, whose prison sentence was commuted by President Trump on February 18, 2020, made a surprise appearance after the former president extended an invitation to his former Celebrity Apprentice contestant.
Former Illinois Gov. Rod Blagojevich, D, left and Mark Vargas, right, who worked with President Trump’s team on the Blagojevich presidential commutation, pose with President Trump at Mar-a-Lago just prior to the Letters To Trump book launch party on April 24, 2023.

Letters To Trump is a 319-page book, and captures the private correspondence between President Trump and some of the biggest names in history over the last 40 years.

The book includes letters from Oprah Winfrey, President Richard Nixon, now-King Charles, John F. Kennedy, Jr., Sen. Ted Kennedy, and Princess Diana.

The book also includes a letter that President Trump sent to Blagojevich shortly after he fired him from Celebrity Apprentice in 2010.

“I truly enjoyed having you on Celebrity Apprentice, and I believe the audience was impressed with your courage in being a part of it. I know you are – and have been – facing enormous challenges, and I appreciate and admire the focus and enthusiasm you gave the show.”

Trump then concluded his letter with, “Thank you for your great work – you were terrific – and good luck with the trial!”

During the private event, Trump singled out Blagojevich in his remarks and thanked him for being there, saying it was an “honor” to commute his prison sentence, and that it was the “right thing to do” by sending him back home to be with his wife and two daughters after watching Blagojevich’s wife on television, advocating for her husband’s release.

After the event, Trump gave an interview to Greg Kelly on Newsmax from the grand ballroom of his estate where the former president continued to talk about the Blagojevich case and the weaponization of law enforcement “at a level that nobody’s ever seen before,” and concluding that “it’s very dangerous for the country.”
https://youtu.be/nixiuVPsh0I?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=9a7a5f228e-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_26_04_33&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-9a7a5f228e-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
Former President Donald Trump on Newsmax talking about the release of his new book, Letters To Trump, and the Blagojevich case.

Special guests of the former president included former Arizona governor candidate Kari Lake, US Rep. Ronny Jackson, R-TX, US Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene, R-GA, Ambassador Richard Grenell, and former New York City Mayor Rudy Giuliani.

An hour before the event, several of the guests gave media interviews, including Blagojevich, in designated areas in the main residence at Mar-a-Lago, as the former President chatted with several guests, including with Publisher Scott Kaspar and Editor-in-Chief Mark Vargas, in the living room of his lavish estate.
Former Illinois Gov. Rod Blagojevich, D, gives a media interview at Mar-a-Lago prior to the start of the Letters To Trump book launch party on April 24, 2023.

Illinois’ Politico Playbook highlighted (https://www.politico.com/newsletters/illinoisplaybook?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=9a7a5f228e-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_26_04_33&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-9a7a5f228e-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) the private book launch in Wednesday’s newsletter, writing,

“Donald Trump is out with a new book featuring correspondence over the years from admirers, of sorts. Along with a personal letter from now-King Charles, there’s one from Rod Blagojevich. The former governor and Illinois Review owner Mark Vargas visited Mar-a-Lago earlier this week for a book event. Price of “Letters to Trump”: $99. Pic! (https://www.politico.com/f/?id=00000187-bc04-dfb1-a5df-fc0dbe0d0000&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=9a7a5f228e-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_26_04_33&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-9a7a5f228e-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) ”
IR publisher and Trump family friend Scott Kaspar, center, and Gov. Blagojevich, right, browsing through an advance copy of Letters To Trump at Mar-a-Lago on April 24, 2023.

The book was released on April 25th, and it remains an Amazon #1 (https://www.amazon.com/Letters-Trump-Donald-J/dp/1735503754/ref=sr_1_1?crid=1TT483LPWZ1G9&keywords=letters+to+trump&qid=1682523244&sprefix=letters+to+trump%2Caps%2C107&sr=8-1&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=9a7a5f228e-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_26_04_33&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-9a7a5f228e-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) bestseller.

The President’s new book can be purchased at 45books.com (https://45books.com/products/letters-to-trump?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=9a7a5f228e-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_26_04_33&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-9a7a5f228e-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) .
https://www.goldentreewealth.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=9a7a5f228e-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_26_04_33&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-9a7a5f228e-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

| Hi, it’s Jane Fonda. I’m reaching out to say _**thank you**_ for your ongoing support.

**With your support, we surpassed our $5,000 Earth Day fundraising goal!** I’m overwhelmed by your support and proud to see that like me, you care deeply about protecting our planet.

As the climate crisis grows, it’s up to us to demand climate action and elect climate champions at every level of government who are unafraid to take bold action against the fossil fuel industry. _**But we can’t succeed without your support.**_

I hope you continue to support the Jane Fonda Climate PAC as we gear up to back even more climate champions.

Thank you, team!

Grateful,

Jane Fonda [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/62366654/403219176/931978131?refcode=BLU-JANE-20230426-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImI5NGQ1MjhhLTdlZTQtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=7Y0vflsfToqtHFKLfeEpf_0OEsCeWGNxak4OZ-NER0Q=)

clean_body: I’m overwhelmed by your support and proud to see that like me, you care deeply about protecting our planet. | = | Hi, it’s Jane Fonda. I’m reaching out to say thank you for your ongoing support. With your support, we surpassed our $5,000 Earth Day fundraising goal! I’m overwhelmed by your support and proud to see that like me, you care deeply about protecting our planet. As the climate crisis grows, it’s up to us to demand climate action and elect climate champions at every level of government who are unafraid to take bold action against the fossil fuel industry. But we can’t succeed without your support. I hope you continue to support the Jane Fonda Climate PAC as we gear up to back even more climate champions. Thank you, team! Grateful, Jane Fonda = P.S. **Marjorie Taylor Greene is the worst of the worst, friend.** If you don't believe me, let's take a look:
* Supporting antisemitic QAnon conspiracy theories
* Spreading lies that the Parkland shooting was faked (she even HARASSED a survivor of the Parkland shooting)
* Attacking LGBTQ+ rights and calling pride flags "Hate America Flags"
* Calling investigations into Jan. 6 a "political witch hunt"
* _And that's not even all of it!_

**We just can't have people who hold these beliefs representing us in Congress, friend.** **She's a dangerous extremist. That's why we need to send her packing in 2024.**
At American Bridge, we're working hard to hold Republicans like Greene accountable and defeat them at the ballot box. **2024 may seem a long way away, but trust me, in my years as a political analyst, I've learned that we have to lay the groundwork for defeating a GOP nutjob like Greene EARLY.**

subject: 8 million. $80 million. $26.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF SHERROD BROWN
body:
There are three numbers you need to know right now:
| | |
---
Friend – Ohio's battleground race could decide Senate control, so there are three numbers you need to know right now:
**8 million.**
That's how many registered voters are in Ohio. We need to reach as many of them as possible to drive record turnout and protect Sherrod's seat.
**$80 million.**
That's how much GOP special interest groups spent in last year's Ohio Senate race. _NBC News_ reports that our race could be even more expensive.
**$26.
That's our average donation – and what we're asking _you_ to chip in today to help reach our critical midnight fundraising goal.**
That's how we compete with the GOP's massive war chest and win this race. It might not seem like much, but if everyone reading this email donated $26, we'd reach our goal in no time at all. **But not everyone will, which is why we're counting on you, friend.**
**[Please, friend, will you chip in $26 now – or as much as you can spare – to help us win in Ohio and defend our Democratic Senate majority? Every grassroots donation makes a huge difference in our ability to reelect Sherrod to the Senate.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62367161/403220773/691330013?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk96-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZWVhYmI3Yi04MGU0LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6dqElYxvz-lGcNXSnfxANebjqTkKYFJupTUqzlJoymE=)**

clean_body: There are three numbers you need to know right now: | | | Friend – Ohio's battleground race could decide Senate control, so there are three numbers you need to know right now: 8 million. That's how many registered voters are in Ohio. We need to reach as many of them as possible to drive record turnout and protect Sherrod's seat. $80 million. That's how much GOP special interest groups spent in last year's Ohio Senate race. NBC News reports that our race could be even more expensive. $26. That's our average donation – and what we're asking you to chip in today to help reach our critical midnight fundraising goal. That's how we compete with the GOP's massive war chest and win this race. It might not seem like much, but if everyone reading this email donated $26, we'd reach our goal in no time at all. name: Team Lateefah
subject: [NEWS] We have an opponent in our race
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LATEEFAH FOR CONGRESS
body:
Last week, another candidate entered the race to represent California’s 12th District in Congress.
# [](https://act.lateefahsimon.com/go/39?t=1&akid=17%2E1163%2EdSzWD_)
Well, it's official: **We have an opponent in our race for Congress.**
A centrist candidate entered the race to represent California's 12th District in Congress. But here's the thing: We know that we can out-raise, out-knock, and out-work anyone in order to keep this seat in progressive hands -- **_and we also know that we can't do that without your help._**
Even though Election Day still feels far away, it's important that we build up our resources early on in the cycle. It's time for us to start working out our budget, hiring staff and planning our strategy — especially considering what we're likely to be up against over the next year.
**[Can you rush a donation of $5 or whatever you can right now to help us elect Lateefah? We need to match our opponent's resources or our fight could get a whole lot harder.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ls-em20230426-1&refcode=em20230426-1?refcode2=17_1163_dSzWD_&akid=17%2E1163%2EdSzWD_)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ls-em20230426-1?amount=5&refcode=em20230426-1&refcode2=17_1163_dSzWD_&akid=17%2E1163%2EdSzWD_)**
It's important that we let Lateefah know that we've got her back. She's fought for decades to serve the hardworking families of the East Bay, not special interests — and it's critical that we send a strong message that this grassroots team will always step up when it's most important.
If we come together, we will win. **[So if you can, please rush a contribution right now to ensure we power our campaign to victory »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ls-em20230426-1&refcode=em20230426-1?refcode2=17_1163_dSzWD_&akid=17%2E1163%2EdSzWD_)**
We appreciate all you do!
-- Team Lateefah
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ls-em-wrapper&refcode=em20230426-1?t=2&refcode2=17_1163_dSzWD_&akid=17%2E1163%2EdSzWD_)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.lateefahsimon.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=17%2E1163%2EdSzWD_)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.lateefahsimon.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.lateefahsimon.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=17%2E1163%2EdSzWD_)

To give by check:
Lateefah for Congress
1714 Franklin St #100 - 438,
Oakland, CA, 94612
Email us: [info@lateefahsimon.com](mailto:info@lateefahsimon.com)
PAID FOR BY LATEEFAH FOR CONGRESS

We’ll be hosting a Campaign Strategy Call tomorrow, April 27, at 6:45 PM ET to hear from President Biden, Vice President Kamala Harris, Dr. Jill Biden, Doug Emhoff, and DNC leadership on the strategy for the weeks and months ahead. Our organizing program is going to be powered by people like you talking to your friends, family, and communities. You are our best validator. name: Andy Beshear
subject: Soon enough, I'll know my opponent for the general election.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ANDY BESHEAR FOR GOVERNOR
body:
The May 16 primary is coming up, and I need to be prepared to face whoever comes out on top. Peter — We've been preparing for months for this moment. The GOP primary is right around the corner, and we need to be ready to face whoever comes out on top.

Once the Republican primary is decided, the GOP and their outside groups will rally behind the winner and ramp up their attacks to defeat me. That means millions of dollars flowing into Kentucky, ads flooding the airwaves, and the full power of the Republican party trying to stop the progress we've made.

This is where the rubber meets the road, and I'm calling on this team to make a final push before our final pre-primary reporting deadline. [**Peter, if you can, please chip in any amount and help me prepare for the next stage of this election. We already know what to expect from my opponent. They will try to ignore the historic accomplishments of the last few years and distract voters from the issues that impact us each day.

But I know Kentuckians want to keep making progress. We will continue creating good-paying jobs, strengthening our workforce, and making worthwhile community investments, but I can't do it alone.

**This election will be the most competitive race in the country this year, and all eyes will be on Kentucky. Let's show the nation what we can do when we put politics aside and come together as Kentuckians.

The GOP primary is right around the corner, and we need to be ready to face whoever comes out on top. Once the Republican primary is decided, the GOP and their outside groups will rally behind the winner and ramp up their attacks to defeat me. That means millions of dollars flowing into Kentucky, ads flooding the airwaves, and the full power of the Republican party trying to stop the progress we've made. This is where the rubber meets the road, and I'm calling on this team to make a final push before our final pre-primary reporting deadline. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = = | = | = We already know what to expect from my opponent. They will try to ignore the historic accomplishments of the last few years and distract voters from the issues that impact us each day. But I know Kentuckians want to keep making progress. We will continue creating good-paying jobs, strengthening our workforce, and making worthwhile community investments, but I can't do it alone. This election will be the most competitive race in the country this year, and all eyes will be on Kentucky. Let's show the nation what we can do when we put politics aside and come together as Kentuckians. = = Thanks, Andy | Andy is fighting to make the Bluegrass State the best place it can be for generations to come, and he needs you on board. Will you chip in today to Andy's re-election campaign? = PAID FOR BY ANDY BESHEAR FOR GOVERNOR Andy Beshear for Governor PO Box 4278 Louisville, KY 40204 United States

body:
The GOP has already launched early attacks against me so this is the worst time to fall behind.

I hate to bother you, but this is really important.

My finance team just called to update me on where things stand with our critical goal coming up.

**Here’s the bad news: they told me we’re still about $25,000 short. Early deadlines like this can make or break a campaign, so it’s critical we report the strongest numbers possible.**

Wisconsin is a quintessential swing state, with four of the last six presidential elections decided by _less than one percent_ of the popular vote. Since first winning her seat in 2012, Sen. **Tammy Baldwin** has been fending off Republican attacks — and this cycle will be no different. One of the Senate GOP's largest fundraising groups has _already_ announced her race as a top target.

In Nevada, Sen.**Jacky Rosen's** 2018 victory was the _only_ successful campaign to unseat a Republican Senate incumbent during that election cycle. This time around, Republicans are laser-focused on regaining this seat following their success in flipping the governor's seat in 2022. Tammy and Jacky's races _will_ define our success in maintaining our Democratic majority, and we need their pro-choice voices and votes in office now more than ever.

name: Team AOC
subject: Your support
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
Alexandria’s work can only happen with your help.
#
The work Alexandria and our team are doing to build a government that works for all — not just a wealthy few — is only possible because of the grassroots support of everyday, working people like you.
Monthly contributions, no matter the size, allow us to do a rare thing in politics: organize, rather than just fundraise. These contributions help Alexandria and our team fight against the onslaught of misinformation from the far-right, build a strategy to fend off challengers in Alexandria’s next election, and keep our team of organizers working in the community to uplift the disenfranchised voices that Alexandria swore to represent in Congress.
[That time spent in community – building coalitions, bringing new voices to the table – is at the heart of Alexandria’s work to prove that a better world is possible. Can you support our work by becoming a monthly donor today? Even $5 each month goes a long way in keeping Alexandria in Congress.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/18144?c0=aoc-email-20230426.2Nsve3&refcode=em20230426-4228-P_FND_EGR_GFM&t=1&akid=4228%2E2526796%2E1XZFBO)
After you set your monthly gift, you’ll receive fewer fundraising emails – but we’ll continue to share breakdowns of the news of the day, explainers, and legislative updates.
Your continued support is a lifeline for our efforts. We remain grateful to all of you who make a new kind of governance possible.
[](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/18144?c0=aoc-email-20230426.2Nsve3&refcode=em20230426-4228-P_FND_EGR_GFM&t=2&akid=4228%2E2526796%2E1XZFBO)
**[Become a monthly donor today →](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/18144?c0=aoc-email-20230426.2Nsve3&refcode=em20230426-4228-P_FND_EGR_GFM&t=3&akid=4228%2E2526796%2E1XZFBO)**
In solidarity,
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20230426?refcode=em20230426-4228-P_FND_EGR_GFM&t=4&refcode2=4228_2526796_1XZFBO&akid=4228%2E2526796%2E1XZFBO)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20230426-4228-P_FND_EGR_GFM&t=5&akid=4228%2E2526796%2E1XZFBO)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=6&akid=4228%2E2526796%2E1XZFBO) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=7&akid=4228%2E2526796%2E1XZFBO) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=8&akid=4228%2E2526796%2E1XZFBO)
---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)

* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=10&akid=4228%2E2526796%2E1XZFBO)

body:
