| | **CfA Requests Criminal Investigation into Tennessee Speaker Cameron Sexton’s Per Diem Requests** _“On top of criminal and IRS investigations, the Tennessee legislatures, which recently — and in record speed — expelled two legislators for protesting on the House floor, ought to just as quickly consider whether Speaker Sexton, as the highest official in the House, should be expelled for his apparent ethical lapses.” — CFA Executive Director Michelle Kuppersmith_ | [SIGN ON TO SUPPORT OUR DEMAND FOR SEXTON’S RESIGNATION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62369293/403226368/1593217285?refcode=AU_TNDP_EG_GEN_RES_AC_20230426_PM1_V2_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzEzNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2M2Y2ZDg1Ni04YWU0LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=X55RaqQm7FRZoITmWWVLAJ5mk3ttvi8Qo7mqyeecNkU=&emci=8d6143aa-83e4-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=63f6d856-8ae4-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=6362892)
---
Peter — The corruption within the Tennessee GOP starts at the top with Cameron Sexton.
The Campaign for Accountability, a nonpartisan watchdog organization, has just requested state officials investigate Cameron Sexton for defrauding the people of Tennessee out of nearly **$80,000.**
Sexton has gone to great lengths to hide the fact that he and his family live and reside in Nashville, despite the fact that the district he was elected to serve is nearly two hours away. Sexton has even gone so far as to confirm with reporters that it's just “easier” to have his family in Nashville.
**According to Tennessee state law, that makes him a Nashville resident, and unfit to serve in his current position.** [**We’re tired of Sexton defrauding the people of Tennessee. Will you join us in our demand for Sexton’s resignation, Peter?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62369301/403226376/1593217285?refcode=AU_TNDP_EG_GEN_RES_AC_20230426_PM1_V2_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzEzNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2M2Y2ZDg1Ni04YWU0LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=X55RaqQm7FRZoITmWWVLAJ5mk3ttvi8Qo7mqyeecNkU=&emci=8d6143aa-83e4-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=63f6d856-8ae4-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=6362892)
[ADD MY NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62369302/403226377/1593217285?refcode=AU_TNDP_EG_GEN_RES_AC_20230426_PM1_V2_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzEzNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2M2Y2ZDg1Ni04YWU0LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=X55RaqQm7FRZoITmWWVLAJ5mk3ttvi8Qo7mqyeecNkU=&emci=8d6143aa-83e4-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=63f6d856-8ae4-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=6362892)
---
The trails are leading right back to the Speaker’s desk, Peter. Not only does it seem that he wrongly applied for thousands of dollars in per diem requests, he then self-approved these requests, putting tax-payer dollars directly into his personal bank account.
We’re sick and tired of the corruption, Peter. **Add your name** **to stand with us today.**
[ADD MY NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/62369304/403226379/1593217285?refcode=AU_TNDP_EG_GEN_RES_AC_20230426_PM1_V2_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzEzNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2M2Y2ZDg1Ni04YWU0LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=X55RaqQm7FRZoITmWWVLAJ5mk3ttvi8Qo7mqyeecNkU=&emci=8d6143aa-83e4-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=63f6d856-8ae4-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=6362892)

| | Good credit score?? Well, TOUGH LUCK says Joe Biden.
Interest rates for mortgages have nearly DOUBLED over the past year, friend. You’ve probably seen it in the news, or even felt the sting of this harsh reality personally.
Well, buckle up because the Biden Administration isn’t coming with any kind of relief for hard working Americans any time soon.
I**n fact, Joe Biden is about to begin forcing good-credit home buyers to pay MORE for their mortgages to subsidize loans to those who haven’t maintained good credit.**

name: Lucas Kunce
subject: The boldest campaign in Missouri history
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
We’re throwing out the rulebook and running this campaign the right way.
#
Hi Peter, it’s Lucas Kunce.
I wanted to take some time today to tell you a little more about the grassroots movement we’re building to defeat Josh Hawley here in Missouri — and why it’s already the boldest campaign our state has ever seen.
**So before I ask you to[add a donation of any amount toward our goal of raising $20,000 online before the end of April,](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/31715?refcode=em20230426-3048&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=3048%2E614464%2EOaRTDw) will you please let me explain?**
**[ADD A DONATION NOW](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/31715?refcode=em20230426-3048&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3048%2E614464%2EOaRTDw)**
For decades, lying politicians have let massive corporations strip our communities for parts — and Missouri has had a front row seat.
I can’t accept a status quo where politicians who take massive donations from Big Ag tell us it’s normal for billionaires in China and Brazil to buy up our farmland and put hard-working family farmers out of business. And I won’t stand for another twenty years of members of Congress who’ve never worn a uniform sacrificing American lives and tax dollars on forever wars, while refusing to invest into the everyday people who make our country strong.
Out-of-touch elites like Josh Hawley have spent decades wasting our money on tax breaks and subsidies for Wall Street, Big Pharma, Big Tech, and just about everything else that’s gutting our country. They’re willing to lie, cheat, and steal from the American people to protect the corporate PACs and mega-donors who own their careers. And they’ll even raise their fist to look strong before they start running from threats to our democracy.
**We don’t need any more frauds in Congress.** That’s why I’m running for U.S. Senate. It’s why I’m not taking a single cent from corporate PACs. **[And it’s why today, I’m asking you to make your first donation of $10 or whatever you think is best toward our goal of raising $20,000 before the end of April. Can I count on you to help us hit our goal, defeat Josh Hawley, and take this seat back for working people?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/31715?refcode=em20230426-3048&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=3048%2E614464%2EOaRTDw)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/31716?refcode=em20230426-3048&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=4&akid=3048%2E614464%2EOaRTDw) [Contribute $15](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/31716?refcode=em20230426-3048&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=15&t=5&akid=3048%2E614464%2EOaRTDw) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/31716?refcode=em20230426-3048&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=6&akid=3048%2E614464%2EOaRTDw) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/31716?refcode=em20230426-3048&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=7&akid=3048%2E614464%2EOaRTDw) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/31716?refcode=em20230426-3048&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=8&akid=3048%2E614464%2EOaRTDw) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/31716?refcode=em20230426-3048&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=9&akid=3048%2E614464%2EOaRTDw) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/31715?refcode=em20230426-3048&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=10&akid=3048%2E614464%2EOaRTDw)

Our mission of taking power back for everyday people has earned our movement national media attention. And our commitment to running this campaign the right way, without a cent from corporate PACs, has given us the ability to run the boldest campaign in Missouri history — taking on corrupt political elites like Hawley without hesitation about some mega-donor being upset.
More than just fighting to codify protections for abortion access — **I’m running to end the filibuster so we can actually get it done.**
More than just banning insider trading among members of Congress and their families — **I’m running to put them in jail if they steal from us.**
More than just breaking up Big Pharma — **I’m running to prosecute the insulin cartels who are killing people.**
And more than just rejecting corporate PAC money — **I’m running to abolish corporate PACs altogether.**
This campaign is powered by the people because that’s exactly who I’ll work for in the U.S. Senate — I'll be accountable to real, everyday Americans, not some corporate executive or political machine. We’re throwing out their rulebook and building a grassroots movement to fundamentally change who has power in our country. **And I want you to be part of it:**
**[So if you’re ready to help us take back power for everyday people in Missouri and across the country, please add a donation of $15, $10, or whatever you can toward our April end-of-month fundraising goal today.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/31715?refcode=em20230426-3048&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=11&akid=3048%2E614464%2EOaRTDw)**
**[ADD A DONATION NOW](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/31715?refcode=em20230426-3048&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=12&akid=3048%2E614464%2EOaRTDw)**
For too long, our country’s corrupt politicians have bought their way into power and maintained a broken status quo. That cycle stops with our movement.
Thanks for being part of it,
Lucas Kunce

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lk-email-footer?refcode=em20230426-3048-footer&t=13&refcode2=3048_614464_OaRTDw&akid=3048%2E614464%2EOaRTDw)**

clean_body: We’re throwing out the rulebook and running this campaign the right way. Hi Peter, it’s Lucas Kunce. I wanted to take some time today to tell you a little more about the grassroots movement we’re building to defeat Josh Hawley here in Missouri — and why it’s already the boldest campaign our state has ever seen. So before I ask you to will you please let me explain? For decades, lying politicians have let massive corporations strip our communities for parts — and Missouri has had a front row seat. I can’t accept a status quo where politicians who take massive donations from Big Ag tell us it’s normal for billionaires in China and Brazil to buy up our farmland and put hard-working family farmers out of business. And I won’t stand for another twenty years of members of Congress who’ve never worn a uniform sacrificing American lives and tax dollars on forever wars, while refusing to invest into the everyday people who make our country strong. Out-of-touch elites like Josh Hawley have spent decades wasting our money on tax breaks and subsidies for Wall Street, Big Pharma, Big Tech, and just about everything else that’s gutting our country. They’re willing to lie, cheat, and steal from the American people to protect the corporate PACs and mega-donors who own their careers. And they’ll even raise their fist to look strong before they start running from threats to our democracy. We don’t need any more frauds in Congress. That’s why I’m running for U.S. Senate. It’s why I’m not taking a single cent from corporate PACs. name: Mariah Morgan
subject: RE: Hip, hip, hooray 🎉

body:
Hi there, Peter –
As we head into our end-of-month fundraising push, I wanted to make sure you saw Wiley’s email from yesterday.
Wiley is serving in Congress to create a country where his kids, Prescott and Adeline, and every other child in America can live up to their full potential. We need leaders like Wiley in Congress so the best interests of our youngest generation are at the forefront of their decision making.
See his message below, and chip in any amount you can to help us close our April on a high note. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2304-q2-wn-eom?refcode=230426-email]
Thanks,
Mariah
----- Original Message -----
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2304-q2-wn-eom?refcode=230426-email [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2304-q2-wn-eom?refcode=230426-email]Did you see the photo of my son I shared the other day on social media?
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2304-q2-wn-eom?refcode=230426-email [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2304-q2-wn-eom?refcode=230426-email]
I love this photo so much. As a parent, there’s nothing better than experiencing joy with your kids, and this photo reminds me of that.
I’m serving in Congress because I want to create a brighter future for my kids and shape a country where they can be anyone they want to be. In order to keep up this important work, I have to continue building up my campaign.
We’re approaching our first end-of-month deadline of Q2, and we have no other choice but to show up strong. So, Peter, can you help us do just that by chipping in $25 today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2304-q2-wn-eom?refcode=230426-email&amount=25]
Thank you,
Wiley Nickel
Wiley Nickel is the Congressman for NC-13. His 2022 opponent, Bo Hines, has announced he'll run against Wiley in 2024. Support #TeamWiley with a monthly donation today!
